title: iOS developer
description:
We now have a new requirement and are looking for a consultant colleague with the qualifications listed below. The position is part of our consulting business, which means you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments.

*As part of your application, you may be presented to clients/partners as part of the recruitment process. If selected for the assignment, you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments as part of our consulting business.*

 **Your Profile (Must-have requirements)**  

* **Deep iOS expertise** — Swift, SwiftUI
**Strong testing discipline** — unit and integration testing; you write readable, maintainable, and testable code

**Agile experience** — comfortable with modern software tech company practices and iterative delivery

**UX passion** — drive to create delightful user experiences

**Collaboration skills** — open communicator, eager to help and equally comfortable asking for help

 **Application deadline:** 07-05-2026

 **About Us**  

We currently employ experienced consultants in areas such as System Development, AI, Machine Learning, Testing, Cloud, Infra DevOps, and IT Project Management.  

  

Working at Deploja is something entirely different from working at an ordinary consulting company—and we are really proud of that. So, what makes us unique?  

  

We simply offer more than just a high salary and greater freedom; that’s just the beginning. With us, you’ll find the work environment and opportunities you deserve. Welcome to Deploja, where the grass is indeed greener!

 **Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**


Exciting assignments with our many clients. We focus on long-term projects, which gives you the opportunity to create value for the client while also developing yourself.


A secure monthly salary – together we’ll agree on a base salary depending on your assignments.


Company car – we encourage you to choose an electric car for a more sustainable future.


Occupational pension and great opportunities for salary conversion.


Vacation – Would you like more than 30 days of vacation, perhaps 60 days?


Private health insurance, accident insurance, and life insurance for increased security.


Skills development – you set your own budget and choose the training you wish to attend.


Quality of life – Are you struggling to balance everyday life and wish to work a little less while still earning as much, if not more?

*We handle applications continuously, and due to the high workload, it's especially important to include a short motivation for the position, explaining how you meet the requirements.*

title: Apputvecklare (fokus Android) till Bokus Play
description:
*Vill du följa med på vår resa? Vi bygger vidare på våra native-appar för Android och iOS, med ambitionen att steg för steg dela mer av kodbasen för att öka tempo och kvalitet. Därför satsar vi på Kotlin Multiplatform för de delar som lämpar sig att dela – samtidigt som vi behåller det bästa av respektive plattform. Vill du vara med och skapa nya användarupplevelser med teknik som utmanar och utvecklar?*


Bokusgruppen är på en spännande digital och teknisk resa under varumärkena Akademibokhandeln, Bokus och Bokus Play. Ambitionen är att bygga nya digitala erbjudanden och boktjänster som kommer att förändra hur vi läser böcker. Vi söker nu App-utvecklare (tyngdpunkt Android) till våra produkter Bokus Play och Bokus Reader. Målet är att tillsammans med modern teknik uppnå nya spännande användarupplevelser på både Android och iOS.


Bokus Play är svaret på den växande streamingmarknaden för ljudböcker. Tjänsten ska vara flexibel, prisvärd och erbjuda enkla och unika abonnemang för alla som lyssnar på ljudböcker. Bokus Reader är vår nya app för att konsumera digital styckköpt litteratur.

**Om rollen**


I rollen som App-utvecklare kommer du att vara med och forma vår gemensamma kodbas och driva utvecklingen framåt främst för Android men även iOS. Du tar ägandeskap för lösningar som delas mellan plattformarna (t.ex. domänlogik, nätverk, persistens och test), och samarbetar nära med plattformsutveckling för UI och plattformsspecifika integrationer. Det finns stora visioner för hur apparna ska vidareutvecklas och du har en stor möjlighet att påverka riktning, arbetssätt och teknikval tillsammans med teamet.


Du kommer vara en del av Bokus Plays app-team som består av UX-designer, apputvecklare (Android & iOS), testare och backend-utvecklare. Backend är skrivet i Java och vi integrerar mot Firebase. Vi jobbar molnbaserat i GCP. I apparna använder vi Kotlin Multiplatform för att dela kod mellan Android och iOS, samtidigt som vi bygger plattformsspecifik UI och integrationer där det behövs.


Tillsammans i teamet kommer ni att skapa den bästa upplevelsen för användare av Bokus Play och Bokus Reader och på så sätt bidra till kunskap, glädje och inspiration.

**Om dig**


Vi söker dig som älskar att skriva kod i Kotlin och som är nyfiken på att bygga lösningar som fungerar lika bra på både Android och iOS. Du trivs med att dela kod när det skapar värde, och du har förståelse för att vissa delar behöver vara plattformsspecifika. Du hittar nya vägar för att lösa problem, tar ägandeskap och gillar att jobba med teknik som utmanar. Du använder även gärna AI som ett bollplank i din utveckling. För att trivas och lyckas i rollen behöver du också brinna för att lära dig nya saker och aktivt söka rätt information för att få saker att hända.

**Vi tror att du**

* Har gedigen erfarenhet av Androidutveckling (måste-krav) och har varit med och utvecklat samt lanserat appar
* Vill arbeta plattformsöverskridande och är nyfiken på Kotlin Multiplatform (eller har erfarenhet av det)
* Har erfarenhet av Jetpack Compose, Kotlin Coroutines och streaming media (t.ex. ljud-/videouppspelning, offline, buffering)
* Har intresse för testdriven utveckling och kvalitet i delad kod
* Gillar teamarbete och agil metodologi


Som person tror vi att du är nyfiken, positiv, social och engagerad. Vårt arbete på Bokusgruppen ledsagas av våra värdeord *Kunder, Mod, Ansvar, Tillsammans* och *Göra skillnad!*

**Rekryteringsprocessen**  

Välkommen med din ansökan. Urvalet fokuserar på dina meriter och vi ber dig därför att inte inkludera foto i din ansökan. Intervjuer kommer ske löpande. Bakgrundskontroll görs på slutkandidaten.

*Bokusgruppen äger Akademibokhandeln, Bokus, BTJ och Bokus Play. Bokusgruppen har ca 491 anställda på kontor och i butik, huvudkontor i Stockholm samt kontor i Malmö, Göteborg och Lund. Den årliga omsättningen är cirka 2,2 miljarder. Bokusgruppen är sedan juni 2021 noterat på Nasdaq First North Premier Growth Market. Mer information* *www.bokusgruppen.com**.*

title: Senior iOS Developer
description:
We are looking for a **Senior iOS Developer** for a global automotive company in **Stockholm.**

**Start is in May 2026, 2 years limited contract to begin with, possibility of extension after that.**

**What You'll Do:**


As an iOS developer in our Onboarding product team, you will:

* **Discover and deliver** mobile application experiences in an empowered, cross-functional product team


- **Shape the first-time user experience** in our app - ensuring new customers connect their car, enable key functionality (digital key, internet contracts), and get started quickly

* **Design and build** applications for the iOS platform with focus on performance, quality and responsiveness
* **Rapid prototyping** of new concepts alongside regular product development
* **Collaborate closely** with Android, iOS and backend engineers to define, design and ship new features


- **Maintain code quality** - fix bugs, uphold code standards, and drive automatization


- **End-to-end ownership** - test in-car, coordinate with backend partners, and ensure a smooth onboarding flow from app to vehicle


You'll be based in Stockholm at our Software Technology Centre, with close collaboration with teams in Gothenburg and Lund.

**Skills & Requirements**

**Must have**

* **Deep iOS expertise** — Swift, SwiftUI
* **Strong testing discipline** — unit and integration testing; you write readable, maintainable, and testable code
* **Agile experience** — comfortable with modern software tech company practices and iterative delivery
* **UX passion** — drive to create delightful user experiences
* **Collaboration skills** — open communicator, eager to help and equally comfortable asking for help

**What we value**

* Curiosity and a drive to push barriers
* Ability to build relationships quickly across teams and cultures
* Compassion, positive attitude and empathy — contributing to a safe, inclusive team environment


This is a full-time consultant position **in Stockholm** through Incluso. **Start is in May 2026, 24-month** limited contract to begin with, with possibility of extension after that. This role is 100% onsite in **Stockholm.**  

  

Please submit your CV as soon as possible since we will review the applications on an on-going basis.


For more information about this role, please contact **Kanika Singhal**recruiter at Incluso.

title: Voice Developer
description:
**About the Role**
------------------

**Are you looking for a role where your talents are truly valued and your professional growth is a priority? We are looking for a Voice Developer with deep expertise in real-time communication systems and a passion for bridging the gap between high-quality code and robust infrastructure. But you won't just be filling a seat; you’ll be joining an excellent team of talented colleagues.**  

  

**We are looking for someone with a passion for bridging the gap between high-quality code and robust infrastructure. This role is ideal for a developer who thrives on the unique challenges of VoIP, solving complex routing logic, managing media servers, and ensuring the reliability of global voice traffic.**

**You will be the driving force behind developing our core SIP applications and the associated developer experience tools. While your primary focus is software development, you are someone who "speaks" infrastructure, ensuring our real-time communication stacks are scalable, automated, and resilient. You’ll collaborate across cross-functional teams to deliver seamless, high-performance voice solutions within our modern cloud environment.**

**Key Responsibilities and Qualifications**
-------------------------------------------

* **SIP & Media Development: Design, develop, and maintain SIP-based applications using Kamailio, alongside media servers like Asterisk.**
* **Application Ownership: Take full-cycle ownership of telephony-related applications and integrations (developed in mainly Python and PHP)**
* **CI/CD & Automation: Build and maintain robust deployment pipelines.**
* **Developer Experience: Improve the local development environment and build automated testing frameworks to streamline how we ship voice features.**
* **Linux Systems: Manage day-to-day operations, troubleshooting, and application deployments within a Linux environment.**
* **Collaboration: Work closely with other engineering teams to ensure our voice infrastructure delivers maximum value to our customers.**
* **Innovation: Interest in Generative AI and LLMs.**

**Nice to have**
----------------

* **Cloud Infrastructure: Experience managing voice-specific architectures within AWS.**
* **Systems Architecture: Deep understanding of redundancy, security, and performance optimization for real-time media.**
* **Monitoring & Observability: Expertise in telephony-specific monitoring (e.g., automated call testing and Kamailio-specific alerting) and general dashboarding.**
* **Infrastructure as Code: Familiarity with tools like Terraform for managing cloud-native services.**
* **Familiarity with Generative AI technologies and Large Language Models**
* **Design, optimize, and manage relational databases like MySQL**

**Our Ways of Working**
-----------------------

**Each team has clear responsibilities and goals and the freedom to collaborate on the optimal design for the products and solutions we build. We want to hear your opinion!**

**We have an agile approach to processes and teamwork and we constantly evaluate and adapt. Our Product and UX teams are closely integrated with development. We use modern frameworks and the best tools available.**

**We work flexibly and have fun at work. Delivering customer value is as important as the wellbeing of our friends and colleagues. We value personal growth and encourage learning, and embrace every opportunity to share knowledge in the team.**

**Where you’ll be and how you’ll work**
---------------------------------------

**We have three offices: London, Uppsala, and Paris. This role is based in the Uppsala office. We work business hours, but we understand that life sometimes gets in the way.**

**Kaisa Culture**
-----------------

**What makes Kaisa stand out? Our values, guiding us every day:**

* **Innovate with Agility - We move fast, think creatively, and adapt seamlessly.**
* **Win Together - Success is a team effort, and we celebrate it as one.**
* **Own It - Accountability drives progress, and we take pride in our work.**
* **Champion Sustainability and Diversity - We foster inclusivity and make responsible choices.**
* **Spread the Vibe - A positive atmosphere fuels great ideas and connections.**

title: Math Curriculum Developer
description:
#### **About Magma**


Magma is a startup that has quickly grown to become the leading platform for data-driven math education. By leveraging handwritten solutions in a digital format, Magma allows teachers to place emphasis on creativity in math, while gaining key insights into student progression. This creates a more engaging, inclusive and pedagogical math class for all students.


Math remains the largest challenge for schools, where one in five students in year 9 are low performers. Math is one of the core pillars on which careers are built, and we believe that school math represents one of the largest opportunities at improving educational outcomes and career prospects for children and young adults.


Magma is now growing rapidly across Europe and the US. We are an ambitious team on a meaningful mission of improving math education for millions of children.  

‍

#### **The Role**


You will primarily work with the international part of the content team, i.e., those responsible for all the math problems that teachers share with their students in equivalent elementary and high schools in the USA and the UK. The primary focus of this work is to create and organize math problems to support schools and school districts in the US and UK, as well as utilize lots of AI technology to make your work efficient. In addition, you may grow into a project management role, taking ownership of individual projects and leading them to completion. You will also get the chance to work closely with users through classroom visits to observe how the content functions in practice, and you will identify opportunities for improvement from both the student and teacher perspectives.


At Magma, we work very closely together in the different teams. This offers the opportunity to gain insight into, for example, how sales processes, product development, customer success, and content, operate together within a company like ours. For those who are interested and eager to try new things, there are endless opportunities to expand responsibilities and grow within the company.


‍

**Who you are and what you know**


We are looking for you who have graduated from Swedish high school before August 2026, and are:

* Very social and enjoys collaborating with others
* Fluent in English, both spoken and written, as a large part of the work is conducted in English
* Eager to learn new things, and eventually take the step towards becoming a project manager
* Goal-oriented and accustomed to working towards deadlines
* Flexible and open to rapid changes in a dynamic work environment
* Great at communicating
* Interested in growing together with us

 **To succeed in the role you need to:**

* Be hardworking and willing to join a fast-paced and rapidly growing startup
* Strike the right balance between being efficient and producing high-quality content‍
* Take initiative to grow in your role as well as give feedback to others

**Requirements**

* Swedish high school diploma
* At least math content knowledge up to Matematik 3b
* Excited about working with a team, in office, and not remotely‍

#### **What we offer**

* Play a key role in an exciting journey. We are a young company with ambitious targets and meaningful goals
* Fantastic colleagues in a fun environment with great opportunities to learn
* Full-time job with salary and benefits
* An opportunity to work on a meaningful mission and have an exceptional impact on education, society, and how children learn math across the world.

**Start:** Beginning/middle of August 2026

**Location:** Stockholm, Stora Nygatan 27

**Note:** We are hiring at least 2 people for this position

title: Backend Software Engineer
description:
Are you interested in working on exciting challenges within high transaction environments? We are looking for you who are curious, can take initiative and come up with new creative solutions, and care about ultimately delivering a great product.  
 


  

 The Role
   


 Our Engagement Area in Product Development is growing and we are now looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to join! Engagement at Betsson Group ensures our customers come back for more. It’s all about loyalty. We provide a world class customer experience beyond the game play featuring Tournaments, Dynamic personalized campaigns and much more! 
 


  


 You will be part of preparing our journey to containerization, increasing the scalability of our systems while also maintaining their high quality. To accommodate new requirements, we are constantly re-evaluating our systems design and working on exciting new features.
 


  

 You have experience in
   

  
* C#, .NET, .NET Core
  
* SQL Server and NoSQL databases
  
* Unit testing frameworks
  
* Messaging within a micro service architecture
  
* Agile development
  
* Collaboration / knowledge-sharing
  


  

 Extra awesome
   

  
* Kafka
  
* Experience in a modern front-end framework (e.g. Angular)
  
* Docker containerization
  
* Domain driven design
  


  

 What’s in it for you?
   


 We can offer you an environment full of ambition and passion. One day is never like the other as the only constant is change, to the better, to the greater. We strive to be the best in whatever field we choose to play on, and we make sure to have fun along the way!
 


  

  
* A friendly, open and humble working environment, where you will have the chance to work alongside with colleagues from all over the world
  
* A chance to evolve your skills together with your colleagues with various programs and initiatives
  
* Personal development through courses, in-house training and external certification
  
* Freedom with responsibility
  


  

 Challenge Accepted?
   


 Check out the Betsson Group Blog to find out what our tech colleagues are talking about.
 


  


 By submitting your application, you understand that your personal data will be processed as set out in our Privacy Policy

title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
Are you driven by innovation and looking to thrive in a fast-paced, growing environment? Join us at Verint and be part of our dynamic team! Help us in reshaping the landscape of customer experience - where every interaction becomes an opportunity, and every insight drives meaningful change.
   

  

 Verint are he trailblazers in customer experience intelligence! Revolutionizing the way organizations connect with their customers, we empower businesses to elevate every interaction to new heights. Our cutting-edge cloud platform, coupled with AI-driven analytics tools, unlocks the true essence of customer sentiment, turning data into actionable insights with lightning speed.
   

  

 As a Senior Software Engineer, you will be part of an innovative, collaborative team responsible for building and delivering new functionality across our product suite. You will play a key role in driving feature development from concept to deployment, working closely with product owners, agile coaches, and fellow engineers to ensure high-quality solutions that deliver real value to customers.
   

  

 Our agile methodology empowers you to focus on meaningful work, prioritize customer impact, and continuously improve both products and processes.
   

  

**What You'll Be Doing**
* Design, build, and maintain high-quality web and cloud-based applications.
* Collaborate closely with product owners and customers to translate ideas and requirements into scalable, high-impact solutions.
* Drive the implementation and deployment of new features end-to-end.
* Take initiative in improving products, systems, and development processes.
* Contribute to and promote best practices across the team and broader organization.
* Solve complex technical problems with innovative, scalable solutions.
* Actively participate in agile ceremonies and contribute to continuous delivery and team flow.
* Support and mentor team members, offering guidance and troubleshooting assistance when needed.
* Partner across teams to ensure alignment and consistency in architecture and development approaches.
* Stay current with emerging technologies and industry trends, including the use of AI tools in development workflows.


**What We're Looking For**
* A proactive, ownership-driven engineer who takes initiative and drives work forward.
* Strong collaborator who enjoys working cross-functionally with product, engineering, and customers.
* Ability to influence decisions and challenge ideas constructively to achieve the best outcomes.
* A problem solver who can navigate ambiguity and tackle complex challenges without predefined solutions.
* A team player who actively supports others and contributes to a positive, knowledge-sharing culture.
* Someone recognized as a subject matter expert in a technical or business domain.
* Passion for delivering customer value and continuously improving the user experience.
* Strong analytical and troubleshooting mindset.


**Requirements**
* 7+ years of backend development experience (e.g., C#, Java).
* 7+ years of experience with web technologies (e.g., HTML, JavaScript frameworks/libraries)
* 5+ years of experience working with cloud platforms such as Azure and/or AWS.
* 7+ years of experience working within agile development methodologies.
* 7+ years of experience with database programming fundamentals.
* 3+ years of experience with test-driven development (TDD).
* 3+ years of experience with pair programming and/or mob programming.
* Demonstrated experience using AI tools in day-to-day development workflows.

Our commitment is to continue to keep our people healthy, focused, and inspire creativity.  Our team members are offered comprehensive benefits for various life circumstances and needs, great opportunities for career development, and a balanced work-life to achieve personal and professional success (all benefits are subject to eligibility requirements). title: Software Engineer
description:
**About Us**
 Legora is on a mission: to redefine how legal work gets done. From the very start we have been very clear about the fact that we are not building a solution for lawyers, we are building it with them, because it is the only way to make sure it gets done the right way; working side-by-side every step of the way.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace empowers legal professionals not just to work faster - but to ask better questions, unlock new insights. Every day, we push the boundaries of legal tech to make complex processes smarter, faster, and more human. From thousands of documents analysed in minutes to intelligent workflows designed in collaboration with leading practices, we’re turning possibility into reality.
   

  

 Today we are trusted by global firms like Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Bird & Bird and Linklaters in over 40 countries, but we have no plans on stopping here. We ship fast, we iterate effectively, and we scale rapidly - not by accident, but by design.
   

  

 When you join Legora, you become part of a team that believes "good enough" isn’t good enough and that the way to win is together, by empowering lawyers to do their best work with technology that truly understands them. If you’re excited by building from first principles, working with exceptional people, and accelerating change in a high-stakes, high-impact domain—then this is the moment and the place.
   

  

**We’re not just shaping the future of legal tech — we’re defining it. Ready to join us in building the intelligent future of law?**
**The role**
 As a Senior Software Engineer at Legora you will build, review and ship amazing products helping legal professionals all over the world in their day-to-day job. You’ll get the chance to work across the entire tech stack with clear ownership and autonomy.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing**
* Architect and implement features end-to-end for our web platform
* Take ownership of our codebase, balancing high-quality code, security and speed of development
* Work with technologies such as React, Node.js, AWS, Azure and Kubernetes
* Review code and mentor junior colleagues to support them in their development, making the team even better!
* Drive continuous improvement and challenge us, the industry and yourself


**Who You Are**
* A passionate engineer with a several years of experience building great products using cutting-edge technologies
* You feel comfortable working across the entire tech stack, with focus on backend development
* You’re autonomous and take pride in the code you write
* You’re a problem solver who’s not afraid to come up with creative solutions and think holistically about software architecture
* Someone who enjoys being in the office 5 days a week. A key component of Legora’s success has been in-person collaboration and we want you to be part of that.
* Experience in infrastructure and integrations are a big plus


**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: Full Stack Developer – Connectivity & API Department | SEB, Solna
description:
Do you want to shape how customers and partners connect with one of the leading banks in the Nordics? At SEB, we’re building the next generation of external API channels and connectivity platforms—and we’re looking for a full-stack developer to help make it happen.
   

  

**About The Role**
 You’ll join the Customer & Partner Experience team, responsible for SEB’s external API channels and Bank 4.0. We build business-critical applications that connect customers and partners with SEB’s products and services. Within the Business Infrastructure domain, our mission is to deliver user-friendly and secure solutions that work reliably across SEB’s product landscape, business teams, and external ecosystem.
   

  

 In this role, you’ll design and build solutions across the stack—from intuitive frontend experiences to the backend services that power them—and take ownership through the full lifecycle, ensuring what you deliver is reliable, maintainable, and built to scale.
   

  

 Collaboration is at the heart of how we work: we bring together business, design, and engineering perspectives to make sure we’re solving the right problems and delivering them in the right way.
   

  

 As a Full Stack Developer in the Connectivity & API department, you’ll be a key player in one of Sweden’s most exciting technology journeys—enabling and accelerating SEB’s API ecosystem.
   

  

**About Our Team**
 You’ll join a friendly and highly skilled team of UX designers and fullstack developers who enjoy solving real problems through code. We value a great work environment built on trust, open dialogue, and supportive collaboration. At the same time, we respect focus and autonomy—giving everyone space to work independently, take initiative, and do their best work.
   

  

 We work agile in short iterations, with regular demos, feedback, and continuous improvement.
   

  

**Key responsibilities:**
* Writing efficient, well-structured Golang and C# based microservices and APIs, supported by robust unit tests
* Writing and improving Angular based frontend code for customer facing interfaces.
* Collaborating closely with other developers, architects, and stakeholders to support team and business objectives


**To thrive in this role, we believe you have:**
* Backend development experience using languages such as Go or C# (5+ years)
* A strong understanding of modern API design, microservices, and distributed systems
* Having a solid understanding of the .NET ecosystem, including frameworks, tooling, and development patterns
* Frontend experience (2+ years) with modern frameworks such as Angular or similar
* Experience with AI‑assisted development tools, such as GitHub Copilot, to improve code quality, productivity, and developer experience
* A solid grasp of design patterns and modern software development practices
* Experience working in complex technical environments
* Strong communication and problem-solving skills
* Fluent in English (written and spoken); Swedish is a plus.
* A solution-oriented mindset and a passion for building high quality, maintainable systems


**Bonus points for experience with:**
* CI/CD (GitHub Actions)
* Container/orchestration (Kubernetes)
* Microservices architecture and REST-based API


**What we offer:**
* Opportunities to contribute to SEB’s top priority initiatives
* A collaborative, friendly, and welcoming culture
* Diverse, international teams in a global working environment
* Competitive compensation with exclusive SEB staff banking benefits
* A modern hybrid work model and state of the art office space


**Do you want to be a part of SEB?**
 It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.
   

  

 Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today via the link in this ad, but no later than 20th of May. If you have questions about the position, please contact anton.hanni@seb.se, but we will not process applications via email.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.
   

  

 SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, why this position might be covered by internal redeployment
   

  

 Learn more about working at SEB on our Career website or through our Career podcasts.
   

  

 sebgroup.com/career
   

  

 bit.ly/SEBcareer

description:
Vi har nu ett nytt behov och söker därför en konsult och kollega med nedan kvalifikationer. Tjänsten är en del av vår konsultverksamhet vilket innebär att du blir anställd av oss och arbetar hos kund alt. interna projekt och åtaganden.
   

  

**Din profil (Skall krav)**
 Vi använder Kotlin, MariaDB, Grafana, Kafka och Kubernetes, och önskar att du har erfarenhet av flera av dessa . Vi vill se att du är progressiv när det kommer till AI-driven utveckling och har erfarenhet av att jobba med resiliens. Vi ser också gärna att du drivs av att jobba med användarens behov i fokus eftersom vi jobbar hela vägen från hur våra interna användare använder våra produkter.
   

  

**Sista ansökningdatum:** 
 06-05-2026
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**
 🚀 Spännande uppdrag hos våra många kunder. Vi fokuserar på långsiktiga uppdrag, vilket ger dig möjlighet att skapa värde för kunden samtidigt som du utvecklas själv.
   

  

 🌟 En trygg månadslön – tillsammans bestämmer vi en grundlön baserad på dina uppdrag.
   

  

 💼 Tjänstepension och stora möjligheter till löneväxling.

 🏥 Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring, olycksfallsförsäkring och livförsäkring för ökad trygghet.
   

  

 📚 Kompetensutveckling – du får själv sätta din budget och välja vilka utbildningar du vill delta i.
   

  

 🕑 Livskvalitet - Har du kanske svårt att få ihop pusslet i vardagen och önskar arbeta lite mindre och ändå kunna tjäna lika mycket om inte mer?
   

  

* Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande, med hänsyn till höga arbetstrycket är det extra viktigt med en kort motivering för tjänsten som förklarar hur man möter kraven.

title: Software Engineer - Fullstack
description:
****About Us****
 Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.
   

  

 At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.
   

  

 Join Visa and do work that matters – to you, to your community, and to the world. Progress starts with you.
   

  

****Job Description****
**Company Description**
 Visa is a world leader in payments and technology, with over 259 billion payments transactions flowing safely between consumers, merchants, financial institutions, and government entities in more than 200 countries and territories each year. Our mission is to connect the world through the most innovative, convenient, reliable, and secure payments network, enabling individuals, businesses, and economies to thrive while driven by a common purpose – to uplift everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.
   

  

 Make an impact with a purpose-driven industry leader. Join us today and experience Life at Visa.
   

  

****Job Description****
 Tink was founded in 2012, and a decade later became part of Visa in 2022. Tink was created with the aim of changing the banking industry for the better. We have built Europe’s most robust open banking platform – with the broadest, deepest connectivity and powerful services that create value out of the financial data. We offer the tools that allow anyone – from big banks and fintechs to startups – to build the future of financial services across Europe.
   

  

 Tink is building an open banking platform that enables banks, fintechs and startups to develop data-driven financial services. Through one API, Tink allows customers to access aggregated financial data, initiate payments, enrich transactions and build personal finance management tools. Tink connects to more than 3,400 banks that reach over 250 million bank customers across Europe. Our solutions are ready-to-go products, each developed to solve specific problems and bring value to both businesses and their customers.
   

  

  

  

**The Opportunity:** 
  

  

 We are looking for talented, curious, and energetic Fullstack Software Engineers who embrace solving complex challenges on a global scale.  You will be an integral part of a cross-functional development team inventing, designing, building, and testing software products that reach a truly global customer base. While building components of cutting-edge payment technology, you will get to see your efforts shaping the digital future of monetary transactions.
   

  

  

  

**The Work itself:** 
  

  

* Design frontend and backend systems while influencing Visa’s internal standards for scalability, security, and reusability
* Collaborate cross-functionally to create design artifacts and develop best-in-class software solutions for multiple Visa technical offerings
* Actively contribute to product quality improvements, value added service technology, and new business flows in diverse agile squads
* Develop robust and scalable products intended for a myriad of customers including end-user merchants, b2b, and business to government solutions
* Leverage innovative technologies to build the next generation of Payment Services, Transaction Platforms, Real-Time Payments
* Opportunities to make a difference on a global or local scale through mentorship and continued learning opportunities


**Essential Functions:** 
  

  

* Works under close guidance to implement basic enhancements and modifications to existing software that complies with design specifications and meets security best practices.
* Learns about automations that improve effectiveness and efficiency of systems and tools.
* Engages with team members to receive feedback on code.
* Follows instructions from manager to implement improvements to code, processes, and designs with and understands customer/business objectives.
* Leverage Artificial Intelligence (AI) technologies to optimize code performance, enhance system automation, and deliver smarter solutions that meet evolving business and user needs.


 This is a hybrid position. Expectation of days in office will be confirmed by your hiring manager.
   

  

****Qualifications****
**Qualifications & The Skills You Bring** 
 :
   

  

* Education & Experience: Bachelors degree OR relevant work experience
* Technical Expertise: Experience developing back-end code (e.g. Java, Node.js, Golang), front-end code (e.g., Angular, React), and APIs for software applications. Knowledge of database software for maintaining and manipulating data. Understanding of systems integration processes and data structures for efficient operations
* Growth & Innovation Mindset: Curiosity and passion for technology, comfort in challenging traditional solutions, and a drive to learn modern tools like Angular, React, Kubernetes, and Docker.
* Problem-Solving: Ability to approach problems logically and creatively, asking questions and seeking solutions.
* Collaboration: Willingness to work in a team, share ideas, and learn from peers and mentors.
* Adaptability: Openness to feedback, learning new technologies, and adapting to changing priorities.
* Learning Mindset: Constant drive to learn new technologies such as Angular, React, Kubernetes, Docker, etc.
* We don’t expect you to have years of experience — instead, we’re looking for graduates with the right mindset, curiosity, and foundational skills to grow into outstanding engineers.


**Visa is an EEO Employer**
 Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.

title: Software Engineer - AI Enablement & Workplace Technology
description:
**About Us**
 Legora is on a mission: to redefine how legal work gets done. From the very start we have been very clear about the fact that we are not building a solution for lawyers, we are building it with them, because it is the only way to make sure it gets done the right way; working side-by-side every step of the way.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace empowers legal professionals not just to work faster - but to ask better questions, unlock new insights. Every day, we push the boundaries of legal tech to make complex processes smarter, faster, and more human. From thousands of documents analysed in minutes to intelligent workflows designed in collaboration with leading practices, we’re turning possibility into reality.
   

  

 Today we are trusted by global firms like Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Bird & Bird and Linklaters in over 40 countries, but we have no plans on stopping here. We ship fast, we iterate effectively, and we scale rapidly - not by accident, but by design.
   

  

 When you join Legora, you become part of a team that believes "good enough" isn’t good enough and that the way to win is together, by empowering lawyers to do their best work with technology that truly understands them. If you’re excited by building from first principles, working with exceptional people, and accelerating change in a high-stakes, high-impact domain—then this is the moment and the place.
   

  

**We’re not just shaping the future of legal tech — we’re defining it. Ready to join us in building the intelligent future of law?**
**About The Team**
 AI Enablement is the centre of gravity for automation and integration internally at Legora. The AI & Integrations Engineering pod is the build muscle behind our automate-and-integrate-the-enterprise strategy. Workplace Technology builds our capabilities to support Legora at scale.
   

  

 These are founding engineering roles: we build and operate the Claude / MCP integrations, agents, automations, observability, and the internal-platform infrastructure that Legora runs itself, and we partner with Information Security on compliance-as-code and detection & response. You should be equally comfortable automating things with AI or with traditional deterministic integrations. You must have experience building with Claude Code.
   

  

**This job posting represents multiple roles across multiple seniorities and domains from IT to Infra, and AI. Apply and we’ll figure out together what opportunity at Legora allows you to thrive.**
**What You'll Be Doing**
* Build internal skills, plugins, MCP integrations, agents, and cross-system automations against Claude, Claude Code, and the Anthropic Admin / Enterprise API.
* Ship integrations and automations from AI Programme Manager specs — deterministic or agentic as the problem demands.
* Stand up and operate AWS accounts and IaC foundations for self-hosted internal apps (Gumloop, Serval, and the next ones) — CI/CD, runtime guardrails, observability.
* Build compliance-as-code and automated evidence collection alongside Information Security; build and run detection & response (SIEM tuning, detections, IR playbooks, on-call) for the corporate and production environments.
* Operate observability, alerting, and runtime guardrails across the AI / integrations / infrastructure surface; participate in on-call.


**Who You Are**
* 6+ years engineering experience for the Senior track; 10+ years and a track record of influencing technical direction across teams for the Staff anchor.
* A proficient software developer with hands-on experience in agentic software development with Claude Code — this is the core requirement.
* Experienced and comfortable developing in TypeScript; Python is a plus.
* Pragmatic about deterministic vs agentic — you reach for whichever fits the problem rather than fitting the problem to your favourite tool.
* Curious, builder-minded, and fluent partnering with non-engineers (programme managers, security, business stakeholders) to ship outcomes rather than just code.


**Optional Experiences**
* Production experience with the Anthropic Admin / Enterprise API and MCP integration patterns.
* Infrastructure-as-code (Pulumi or Terraform) and AWS at multi-account scale (IAM, VPC, ECS / EKS / Lambda, RDS, secrets, observability).
* CI/CD pipeline design and secrets / KMS management.
* LLM operational concerns — MCP gateways, tool-use telemetry, prompt-injection detection, model governance.
* IAM fundamentals and SAML / SCIM integration patterns.
* SIEM tuning and detection engineering; SOC 2 fieldwork, control mapping, and evidence production.
* Experience self-hosting third-party SaaS-style applications (Gumloop, Serval, n8n, Airbyte, Temporal, Retool) for internal use.


**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: SOFTWARE ENGINEER AWS / AI TILL AXFOOD IT
description:
**Är du i början av din karriär och vill jobba med applikationsutveckling och molnlösningar? Nu finns chansen att bli en del av Axfood Tech Development Program med start i augusti 2026 – ett ettårigt talangprogram riktat mot nyutexaminerade techtalanger. Genom att börja din karriär med ett talangprogram får du den ultimata övergången mellan studier och arbetsliv.**
**Att jobba med tech på Axfood**
 Axfoods syfte är att skapa bättre livskvalitet till alla och har visionen att vara ledande inom prisvärd, bra och hållbar mat. Som en av dagligvarubranschens största aktörer gör Axfoods olika bolag stor skillnad i miljontals människors liv – varje dag. Var med på en resa i en spännande bransch där nytänkande, engagemang är viktiga ingredienser.
   

  

 Dagligvarubranschen befinner sig i ett skifte med digitalisering och automation högt på agendan. Genom att arbeta både snabbare och mer strategiskt med data kan Axfood möta en ökad konkurrens och nya krav från kunder.
   

  

 Du blir en del av Axfood IT som har en av matbranschens största IT-avdelningar med drygt 300 medarbetare. Här får man vara med i arbetet som ökar effektiviteten i organisationen genom ett mer datadrivet arbetssätt och fortsätter utveckla framtidens logistiklösningar. Axfood IT ligger i framkant vad gäller digital utveckling och ny teknik inom områden som det digitala kundmötet, e-handel och arbetssätt.
   

  

**Rollen som Software Engineer**
 Som utvecklare ingår du i teamet CS AWS (Central systemutveckling AWS). Du arbetar i projekt som drivs genom Axfoods AI-center och samarbetar med data scientists, AI-ingenjörer, affärsutvecklare, software engineers och arkitekter. Arbetet varierar mellan frontend, backend, integrationer och agentiska lösningar, och du är involverad i både nyutveckling, vidareutveckling och förvaltning. Rollen följer principen
 *you build it, you run it,* 
 vilket innebär att du är med i hela livscykeln – från idé till drift och förbättring.
   

  

 Du kommer bland annat att:
   

  

* Utveckla fullstack-applikationer i AWS
* Bygga integrationer och API:er
* Implementera AI-drivna funktioner och agentiska lösningar
* Arbeta med CI/CD i Bitbucket och bidra till automation
* Delta i arbetet med applikationssäkerhet och LCM-aktiviteter
* Samarbeta och dokumentera i Jira och Confluence


**Talangprogram – bryggan mellan studier och karriär**
 Nexer Tech Talent är specialister på att ge unga techtalanger den ultimata starten på arbetslivet. Vi skräddarsyr talangprogram som ger en sömlös övergång mellan studier och karriär där arbete kombineras med utbildning, handledning och sociala aktiviteter.
   

  

 Som deltagare i ett talangprogram kommer du att vara anställd hos Nexer Tech Talent men ha en roll som Applikationsutvecklare på Axfood i Stockholm. Du blir en del av en grupp talanger som alla deltar i ett skräddarsytt utbildningsprogram där ni månadsvis får möjlighet att utveckla och fördjupa era tekniska kunskaper i kombination med utbildning inom tex. ledarskap och personlig utveckling. Du kommer att coachas av en mentor på Axfood samt en konsultchef på Nexer Tech Talent. Efter framgångsrikt genomförande av talangprogrammet är intentionen att du erbjuds en anställning på Axfood.
   

  

**Vi söker dig som har:**
* Högskole-/universitetsexamen inom systemvetenskap, datateknik eller liknande.
* Ett intresse för programmering, molntjänster/cloud och dagligvarubranschen.
* Programmeringskunskaper i TypeScript och Python.
* Grundläggande förståelse eller erfarenhet inom AI/ML.
* Intresse för molntjänster och serverless-arkitektur (AWS).
* Förmåga att arbeta med både frontend och backend.
* Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska.


**Som person ser vi att du har följande egenskaper:**
* Nyfiken och ansvarstagande i din egen kompetensutveckling.
* Samarbetsinriktad och prestigelös.
* Trivs i team där man bygger, testar och förbättrar tillsammans.
* Kommunikativ och trygg i att ställa frågor och söka stöd.


**Ansökan**
 Talangprogrammet startar i Augusti 2026 och riktar sig till dig som är nyexaminerad inom IT/tech. Vi arbetar löpande med rekryteringen, så skicka in din ansökan snarast möjligt. Om du har du frågor eller funderingar är du välkommen att kontakta Tech Recruiter Molly Rytter på molly.rytter@nexergroup.com
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot att höra från dig!
   

  

**Om Nexer Tech Talent**
 Nexer Tech Talent är en del av Nexer Group med väletablerade ramavtal, långsiktiga samarbete och några av Sveriges mest välkända och betydelsefulla kunder. Tillsammans är vi över 2500 medarbetare i 16 länder som i mer än 35 år hjälpt våra kunder ligga steget före både strategiskt, teknologiskt och kommunikativt. Läs mer om oss här.
   

  

**Om Axfood**
 Axfood grundades år 2000 och har visionen att vara ledande inom prisvärd, bra och hållbar mat. Koncernen består av en familj av varumärken och är unik i sitt slag på den svenska marknaden. I Axfood ingår butikskedjorna Willys, Hemköp, Tempo och Handlar’n. Grossistförsäljning sker genom Snabbgross, och Dagab ansvarar för koncernens produktutveckling, inköp och logistik. I Axfood ingår även Middagsfrid och Urban Deli samt delägda Apohem, Eurocash, City Gross och Mathem.
   

  

 Hos Axfood finns trygghet och stora utvecklingsmöjligheter. Medarbetarnas olika kunskaper, kompetenser och perspektiv skapar nya möjligheter och genererar bättre beslut. Genom att erbjuda en arbetsplats som speglar det samhälle vi lever i vill Axfood skapa ett öppet klimat där alla medarbetare har möjlighet att utvecklas. Axfood växer och utvecklas tillsammans vilket gör det möjligt att leda vägen och utmana en hel bransch. Välkommen till en familj av möjligheter!

title: Junior Womenswear Designer - Temporary Position
description:
H&M is a fashion brand that offers the latest styles and inspiration, from fashion pieces and unique designer collaborations to affordable wardrobe essentials. Our business idea is fashion & quality at the best price in a sustainable way. Learn more about H & M here.
   

  

  

  

  

  




**Job Description**

**WHAT YOU’LL DO**




 Are you a creative Junior Designer with a great fashion sense and commercial awareness? We are always interested in hearing from talented candidates for our different customer groups: Womens, Mens, Kids, H&M Move, or H&M Home.
   

  





 As a Junior Designer you will be responsible for assisting in creating the most current & updated assortment relevant for our customer. This involves a curiosity and understanding of the customer together with insight of upcoming new trends and key products. You are a part of creating the best products with incredible attention to detail and ensuring the collection is fashion forward speaking to our target customer.
   

  





**WHO YOU’LL WORK WITH** 





 You will be assisting our Product Designers working together with our wider team including Product Manager, Pattern Maker, Print Designer, Planner, Buyer, Product Developer and Business Controller. The role involves, but is not limited to, flat sketching updating collection overviews etc and working with technical packs, assisting on the concepts. You will be involved in developing collections sold globally in all H&M markets. We have high ambitions and a great team spirit. As a team we are a forward thinking, innovative and energetic!
   

  





 You need to be adaptable and able to juggle different tasks simultaneously. Able to bring your perspectives when it comes to influences/trends. This is a great opportunity to develop your design skills while learning from our global teams.
   

  





**WHO YOU ARE**




 We are looking for people with:
   

  




* A BA degree in Textile/Fashion Design
* At least 1 year’s work experience as a Junior Designer
* Passion and understanding of our H&M customer
* Strong skills in Adobe Suite programs
* Experience in 3D CLO is a plus
* Attention to detail and fabric knowledge
* A creative and visionary mindset for fashion
* Strong communication skills and flexibility
* Ability to prioritize with an organized approach
* Enjoy working in diverse teams and contributing your perspective
* Thrive in a fast-paced, ever-changing environment
* Strong self-drive and initiative
* English fluency (Swedish is not necessary)



**WHO WE ARE​**




 H&M Group is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.​
   

  





 ​We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future. ​
   

  





 ​
 **WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING HERE:**
  

 At H&M Group, we are proud to be a vibrant and welcoming company. We offer our employees attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe. ​
   

  





 All our employees receive a staff discount card, usable on all our H&M Group brands in stores and online. Brands covered by the discount are H&M (Beauty and Move included), COS, Weekday, Monki, H&M HOME, & Other Stories, ARKET, Afound. In addition to our staff discount, all our employees are included in our H&M Incentive Program – HIP. You can read more about our H&M Incentive Program here
 




**JOIN US​**




 Our uniqueness comes from a combination of many things – our inclusive and collaborative culture, our strong values, and opportunities for growth. But most of all, it’s our people who make us who we are.​
   

  





 ​Take the next step in your career together with us. The journey starts here.​
   

  





 If you would like to be considered for our Open Application, please apply by sending in your
 **CV and portfolio** 
 pdf (max 10mb/upload). All documents should be in English.
   

  





 ​
   

  





 The journey starts here
   

  

  

  




**Additional Information**

 This position is based in Stockholm. You will report to the department Assortment Designer.
   

  





 If your experience, skills, and ambitions are right for this role, please send your application asap including CV and relevant portfolio work (pdf max 10mb/uploading) Portfolio should include vision/mood boards, full design process and final collections and products from a variety of fashion design projects. All documents should be in English. Please ensure to include some work clearly relatable to the aspirational H&M Women’s target customer. We would like see work that shows your creative aspirational side and your sense for commercial fashion.
   

  





 For any internal applicants please have a dialogue with your current manager before applying.
   

  





**Benefits:**
  

 We offer all our employees at H&M Group attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe. All our employees receive a staff discount card, usable on all our H&M Group brands in stores and online. Brands covered by the discount are H&M (Beauty and Move included), COS, Weekday, Monki, H&M HOME, & Other Stories, ARKET. In addition to our staff discount, all our employees are included in our H&M Incentive Program – HIP. You can read more about our H&M Incentive Program here.
   

  





 In addition to our global benefits, all our local markets offer different competitive perks and benefits. Please note that they may differ between employment type and countries.
   

  





 Inclusion & Diversity
   

  

 H&M is a part of H&M Group. At H&M Group, we’re determined to create and maintain inclusive, diverse, and equitable workplaces throughout our organization. Our teams should consist of a variety of people that share and combine their knowledge, experience, and ideas. Having a diverse workforce leads to a positive impact on how we address challenges, on what we perceive possible and on how we choose to relate to our colleagues and customers all over the world. Hence all diversity dimensions are taken into consideration in our recruitment process. We strive to have a fair and equal process and therefore kindly ask you not to attach a cover letter in your application as they often contain information that easily can trigger unintentional biases.

title: iOS Developer
description:
Vi har nu ett nytt behov och söker därför en konsult och kollega med nedan kvalifikationer. Tjänsten är en del av vår konsultverksamhet vilket innebär att du blir anställd av oss och arbetar hos kund alt. interna projekt och åtaganden.
   

  

**Din profil (Skall krav)**
* 5+ years of overall experience with iOS development
* Advanced knowledge of programming using Swift
* Deep understanding and several years of hands-on experience in iOS application development (architectures, design, tools, SDKs), asynchronous server communication, and UX optimization
* Experience in debugging and troubleshooting complex systems
* Leading, planning, and executing the development of core features and modules for iOS applications
* Ability to navigate and research requirements in the scope of a big cross-functional team
* Ability to dive into complicated, unique problems, find a clear path forward, and drive the work to a successful conclusion.
* Experience in agile development
* Fluent English skills, oral and written


**Sista ansökningdatum:** 
 12-05-2026
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**
 🚀 Spännande uppdrag hos våra många kunder. Vi fokuserar på långsiktiga uppdrag, vilket ger dig möjlighet att skapa värde för kunden samtidigt som du utvecklas själv.
   

  

 🌟 En trygg månadslön – tillsammans bestämmer vi en grundlön baserad på dina uppdrag.
   

  

 💼 Tjänstepension och stora möjligheter till löneväxling.
   

  

 🌴 Semester - Önskar du mer än 30 dagar semester, kanske 60 dagar?
   

  

 🏥 Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring, olycksfallsförsäkring och livförsäkring för ökad trygghet.
   

  

 📚 Kompetensutveckling – du får själv sätta din budget och välja vilka utbildningar du vill delta i.
   

  

 🕑 Livskvalitet - Har du kanske svårt att få ihop pusslet i vardagen och önskar arbeta lite mindre och ändå kunna tjäna lika mycket om inte mer?
   

  

* Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande, med hänsyn till höga arbetstrycket är det extra viktigt med en kort motivering för tjänsten som förklarar hur man möter kraven.

title: Solutions Architect
description:
**About us:** 




 At Dabster, we are your one-stop destination for talent acquisition and digital innovation. Our customized, scalable talent solutions empower organizations to concentrate on their core business while we expertly match the right talent to the right roles.
 



  





**Who will you work with:** 




 A global IT services and consulting organization driving digital, cloud, data, automation, and AI transformation for large enterprises across industries. Our teams work on complex, outcome‑driven projects in domains such as banking, manufacturing, retail, healthcare, and telecom, within a collaborative, learning‑focused culture.
 



  





**Job Description:** 




 We are looking for a senior hands-on developer / solution architect with deep expertise in card issuing, payments and modern backend engineering. This is a key role in shaping scalable, secure and compliant payment solutions in a fast‑growing, global IT‑services organization.
 



  





**Key responsibilities:** 



* Act as a senior developer and evolve into the technical leader for the card issuing platform.
* Design and oversee scalable, secure and compliant solutions for card issuing and transaction processing.
* Contribute hands-on technical expertise across design, implementation and code review.
* Collaborate with product owners, developers and external partners to align business goals with technical solutions.
* Drive architectural decisions and best practices for card issuing, transaction flows and related payment services.
* Ensure solutions comply with PCI DSS, DORA and other relevant banking and regulatory standards.
* Mentor and support development teams, providing technical leadership and knowledge transfer.



  





**Skills & experience:** 



* Extensive, proven experience in
 **card issuing** 
 (mandatory) and strong understanding of the payment ecosystem (acquiring, processing, clearing, settlement).
* Documented experience as Tech Lead, Solution Architect or Senior Developer in complex, business‑critical environments.
* Strong backend experience with
 **Python** 
 .
* Experience developing and maintaining Oracle SQL / PL-SQL or other deep database expertise.
* Experience with Python web frameworks such as
 **FastAPI** 
 and
 **Django** 
 .
* Solid database skills (SQL; Oracle PL/SQL a plus).
* Cloud-based architecture experience on at least one major provider (Oracle, AWS, GCP or Azure).
* Linux experience in production environments.
* Frontend familiarity (React/JavaScript) is a plus; the focus is on backend and architecture.
* Knowledge of security, encryption and compliance frameworks in payments and card issuing.



  





**Personal attributes:** 



* Consultant mindset: self-directed, solution‑oriented, comfortable working with a high degree of independence.
* Strategic and analytical thinker with strong problem‑solving skills.
* Comfortable operating in fast‑changing, highly complex environments.
* Collaborative, supportive leader who can inspire and guide technical teams.



  





**What you can expect:** 



* Be part of one of the fastest‑growing IT‑services companies, driven by team spirit and technology.
* Entrepreneurial culture where you can influence architecture and own core platform decisions.
* Clear ownership of your career path, with opportunities to grow into broader architectural and leadership responsibilities.
* Healthy work–life balance and competitive market‑level benefits.



  





**How to apply:** 




 If your expertise meets the above job, we would love to hear back from you, kindly share your resume to swaroop.swain@dabster.net
