title: Senior Platform Engineer
description:
EQT is looking for a Senior Platform Engineer to join our engineering platform team in Stockholm. This is a hands-on role for an experienced engineer who enjoys building reliable platforms, working closely with teams, and driving long-term impact.
   

  

**About The Engineering Platform Team**
 The engineering platform team builds and operates EQT’s core platform, enabling product teams to run secure, reliable, and scalable services, data-products and agentic ai. The team works closely with developers and security partners, with a strong focus on automation, standards, and operational excellence.
   

  

**About The Role**
 In this role, you will work across EQT’s engineering platform and lead the design and delivery of key platform initiatives. You will collaborate with teams across the organization to drive adoption, improve reliability, and enhance the developer experience.
   

  

* Lead the design, architecture, and rollout of platform projects from start to finish.
* Collaborate with engineers across the organization to align on platform standards and best practices.
* Operate and continuously improve the engineering platform.
* Contribute to on-call rotations and support platform reliability.
* Improve platform reliability, security, and developer experience.
* Support incident response, troubleshooting, and root cause analysis.


**About You**
 You enjoy working in a high-trust environment and take ownership of building strong technical foundations. You are collaborative, structured in your approach, and motivated by enabling others to succeed.
   

  

**Essential skills and experience:**
* Experience as a senior Platform, SRE, or Infrastructure Engineer.
* Proven experience leading platform projects from concept through to production.
* Hands-on experience running Kubernetes production environments.
* Experience working with cloud platforms, preferably Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
* Experience with infrastructure as code, preferably Terraform.
* Familiarity with GitOps and CI/CD workflows.


 Tech Stack / Environment: GCP, GKE, ArgoCD, Gatekeeper, Cilium, Terraform, CircleCI, GitHub, Cloudflare, Datadog, incident.io, Snowflake, DBT, Hex, Go, Python, Next.js
   

  

**Nice to have:**
* Experience with platform security.
* Knowledge of authentication and identity systems.
* Strong networking knowledge across cloud and Kubernetes environments.
* Interest in the Agentic AI ecosystem
* Experience improving platform and production environment resilience.


**What We Offer**
 At EQT, you will work in a collaborative and high-trust environment where your ideas and contributions matter. You will have the opportunity to shape a modern engineering platform, work with experienced colleagues, and continue to grow your skills while delivering meaningful impact.
   

  

**Inclusion at** 
**EQT**
*Our vision for EQT employees is to build high performing & engaged teams. Our competitive edge comes from fostering an environment where every individual feels valued, empowered, and motivated to drive business impact. Our commitment to inclusion is not just about fairness; We understand and believe that being a great place to work drives the best performance.At EQT, inclusion is a business imperative and it's embedded into our talent strategy, decision-making, and culture to ensure that every individual and team operates at their full potential. By doing so, we unlock better collaboration, stronger innovation, and superior investment outcomes.*
**About EQT**
*EQT is a purpose-driven global investment organization focused on active ownership strategies. With a Nordic heritage and a global mindset, EQT has a track record of over three decades of developing companies across multiple geographies, sectors and strategies. EQT has investment strategies covering all phases of a business’ development, from start-up to maturity. EQT has EUR ‌ 270 billion in total assets under management (EUR ‌ ‌141 billion in fee-generating assets under management), within two business segments – Private Capital and Real Assets.
   

  

 With its roots in the Wallenberg family’s entrepreneurial mindset and philosophy of long-term ownership, EQT is guided by a set of strong values and a distinct corporate culture. EQT manages and advises funds and vehicles that invest across the world with the mission to future-proof companies, generate attractive returns and make a positive impact with everything EQT does. EQT has offices in more than 25 countries across Europe, Asia and the Americas and has more than 1,900 employees.*
*More info: www.eqtgroup.com
   

  

 Follow EQT on LinkedIn, X, YouTube and Instagram*

title: Back End Staff Software Engineer (Bangkok based, Relocation provided)
description:
**About Agoda**
 At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.
   

  

 Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.
   

  

 No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.
   

  

**Get to Know our Team**
 In Agoda’s Back-End Engineering department, we build scalable, fault-tolerant systems and APIs that host our core business logic. Our systems cover all major areas of our business: inventory and pricing, product information, customer data, communications, partner data, booking systems, payments, and more. We employ state-of-the-art CI/CD and testing techniques to ensure everything works without downtime. Our systems are self-healing, responding gracefully to extreme loads or unexpected input. We use modern languages like Kotlin and Scala, Data technologies Kafka, Spark, MLflow, Kubeflow, VastStorage, StarRocks and agile development practices. Most importantly, we hire great people from around the world and empower them to be successful.
   

  

**The Opportunity**
 Agoda Platform team is looking for developers to work on mission-critical systems that serve millions of users daily. You will have the chance to work on innovative projects, using cutting-edge technologies, and make a significant impact on our business and the travel industry.
   

  

**What You’ll Need To Succeed**
* 10+ years of experience developing performance-critical applications in a production environment using Scala, Java, Kotlin, C#, Go or relevant modern programming languages.
* Strong RDBMS knowledge (SQL Server, Oracle, MySQL, or other).
* Ability to direct significant company-wide projects and sets technical vision.
* Good command of the English language.
* Deeply involved in making architectural decisions, setting the standard and direction for the team.
* Implement advanced CI/CD pipelines and robust testing strategies to ensure seamless integration, deployment, and high code quality.
* Passion for software development and continuous improvement of your knowledge and skills.


**It’s Great if You Have**
* Knowledge in NoSQL, Queueing systems (Kafka, RabbitMQ, ActiveMQ, MSMQ), and Play framework.


**This position is based in Bangkok, Thailand (Relocation Provided)**
 #Bengaluru #Hyderabad #Gurgaon #SouthKorea #Berlin #London #Pakistan #Pune #SanFrancisco #SanJose #Seattle #TelAviv #Jakarta #Colombia #NewYork #Vietnam #Russia #Madrid #SaoPaulo #Noida #Toronto #Chennai #Singapore #Ukraine #UAE #Sunnyvale #BuenosAires #Austin #Barcelona #Nigeria #Mumbai #Paris #Egypt #Stockholm #Amsterdam #Romania #Serbia #NewDelhi #MountainView #Chile #Warsaw #Sydney #Bangladesh #Peru #SantaClara #Chicago #Gurgaon #Munich #Montreal #Bangkok #Tallinn #Vilnius #Riga #Dublin #IT #ENG #5
   

  

 Please review our Hiring Process Guidelines before your interview — click here to learn how interviewing at Agoda works.
   

  

**Discover More About Working At Agoda**
* Agoda Careers https://careersatagoda.com
* Facebook https://www.facebook.com/agodacareers/
* LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/company/agoda
* YouTube https://www.youtube.com/agodalife


**Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Agoda, we pride ourselves on being a company represented by people of all different backgrounds and orientations. We prioritize attracting diverse talent and cultivating an inclusive environment that encourages collaboration and innovation. Employment at Agoda is based solely on a person’s merit and qualifications. We are committed to providing equal employment opportunity regardless of sex, age, race, color, national origin, religion, marital status, pregnancy, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, citizenship, veteran or military status, and other legally protected characteristics.
   

  

 We will keep your application on file so that we can consider you for future vacancies and you can always ask to have your details removed from the file. For more details please read our privacy policy.
   

  

**Disclaimer**
 We do not accept any terms or conditions, nor do we recognize any agency’s representation of a candidate, from unsolicited third-party or agency submissions. If we receive unsolicited or speculative CVs, we reserve the right to contact and hire the candidate directly without any obligation to pay a recruitment fee.

title: Senior Cloud Data Engineer | SEB, Solna
description:
*SEB is a leading northern European financial services group, and at the same time, one of the largest IT employers in the Nordics. Banking is changing rapidly, and we are proud of our reputation of being entrepreneurial and innovative in the face of change.*
 Are you a cloud data engineer who wants to create value through data and innovation and is motivated by delivering customer value with high quality? Do you also have a proactive attitude when it comes to continuous improvements and investigating new technologies and concepts, while having experience of Financial Products? If so, this is probably a position for you! We are now looking for a Cloud Data Engineer to our Regulatory team within Trading Technology.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing**
 As a cloud data engineer, you will work with Regulatory and business-related development in our high-priority trading area. You will help develop our cloud-based data warehouse to further support our trading business. You will belong to our cross-functional team in which you will work with requirements, test, development, and deployment as well as having a dialogue with stakeholders around the solutions. In addition, you will also collaborate with other developers in the team through coaching, performing code reviews, and being involved in design decisions, etc.
   

  

**Who We Are Looking For**
 You are a confident and skilled developer with strong technical expertise and a genuine interest in the Trading area, motivated by creating highvalue, businessdriven solutions.
   

  

 You are also a self‑motivated individual who demonstrates respect for others, takes an active interest in collaboration, and contributes positively as a team player with an open mindset.
   

  

**You are also proficient in:**
* Data engineer with minimum 3 years of experience in the field
* Data integration, data modelling and data pipelines in the cloud
* SQL and programming skills (preferably Python)
* Version Control (i.e., Git) and Agile development
* Testing and test-automation


**Highly meriting is also:**
* Google Cloud Platform (other cloud providers)
* BigQuery, Dataflow, Cloud Run, PubSub and Cloud Storage
* Dataform /dbt
* Airflow
* Terraform
* Monitoring and alerting of Data Warehouse
* Data management/data mesh
* Other cloud providers
* GCP Cloud Data Engineer Certified (or equivalent)


**Your team** 
  

  

 You will join our Regulatory team of 12 highly collaborative members, where everyone contributes across the full development lifecycle. We pride ourselves on a strong team culture built on openness, trust, and active knowledge sharing. We work in an agile setup following SEB’s implementation of SAFe, with daily stand-ups, regular reviews, and retrospectives that support continuous improvement.
   

  

 The team is responsible for two applications, both under active and continuous development.
   

  

 We strongly encourage professional growth and see GCP certifications at various levels as a natural and valued part of your development journey. We also encourage active and responsible use of Copilot and LLMs to support development and enhance productivity.
   

  

**What We Offer**
* The chance to develop a new data warehouse on the Google Cloud Platform (GCP)
* A varying position where you will be part of building our new platform as well as take end to end responsibility of the Regulatory use cases
* A highly regarded team of experienced colleagues who value collaboration and openness
* Opportunity to share knowledge by pair- and mob-programming, demos and more
* A modern office with restaurants and gym next to Mall of Scandinavia in Solna
* A workplace where we care about the work-life balance
* An innovative company in forefront of technology


**Ready to join?**
 Since we review applications and select potential candidates on a continuous basis, you are welcome to send your application as soon as possible, but no later than
 **31st of May 2026** 
 . For questions regarding the position or the recruitment process, please contact Ali Rezai at ali.rezai@seb.se

title: Senior iOS Developer - Stockholm
description:
**Hello, let’s meet!** 




**Who We Are** 




 While Xebia is a global tech company, our journey in CEE started with two Polish companies – PGS Software, known for world-class cloud and software solutions, and GetInData, a pioneer in Big Data. Today, we’re a team of 1,000+ experts delivering top-notch work across cloud, data, and software. And we’re just getting started.
 



**What We Do** 




 We work on projects that matter – and that make a difference. From fintech and e-commerce to aviation, logistics, media, and fashion, we help our clients build scalable platforms, data and AI solutions, and cutting-edge applications to shape the future of tech. Our clients include McLaren, Aviva, Deloitte, Spotify, Disney, ING, UPS, Tesco, Truecaller, AllSaints, Volotea, Schmitz Cargobull, Allegro, InPost, and many, many more.
 



 We value smart tech, real ownership, and continuous growth. We use modern, open-source stacks, and we’re proud to be trusted partners of Databricks, dbt, Snowflake, Azure, GCP, and AWS. Fun fact: we were the first AWS Premier Partner in Poland!
 



**Beyond Projects** 




 What makes Xebia special? Our community. We support tech communities, organize meetups (Software Talks, Data Tech Talks), and have a culture that actively support your growth via Guilds, Labs, and personal development budgets — for both tech and soft skills. It’s not just a job. It’s a place to grow.
 



**What sets us apart?** 




**Our mindset. Our vibe. Our people. And while that’s hard to capture in text – come visit us and see for yourself.** 




**You will be:** 




  




* **work from the office in Stockholm 2-3 times per week - is a must** 
 ,
* designing, developing, and maintaining high-quality iOS applications using Swift and modern iOS frameworks,
* collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver scalable, user-focused features end-to-end,
* contributing to app architecture decisions and continuously improve performance and code quality,
* integrating mobile applications with backend services and handle asynchronous data flows,
* troubleshooting, debugging, and resolving complex issues in production environments while supporting ongoing improvements.



**Your profile:** 



* **work from the office in Stockholm 2-3 times per week - is a must** 
 ,
* 5+ years of iOS development experience in commercial products,
* advanced proficiency in Swift; deep understanding of iOS frameworks, SDKs, and design patterns,
* strong grasp of app architecture (MVC, MVVM, Clean Architecture, etc.) and performance optimization,
* solid experience with asynchronous programming and server communication,
* proven ability to debug and troubleshoot complex, production-level issues,
* practical experience using AI-powered assistants (e.g. Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Cursor) to improve productivity, quality, or decision-making in software delivery.



**Work from the European Union region and a work permit are required.** 




**Nice to have:** 



* experience with SwiftUI,
* familiarity with CI/CD tools - GitHub Actions, Fastlane, or similar,
* experience mentoring or onboarding junior developers,
* experience applying GenAI in a more structured way within the SDLC, including defined workflows, prompt patterns, or tool integrations embedded into daily work,
* interest in and familiarity with emerging AI-driven practices (e.g. agent-based workflows, automation patterns, AI-augmented development), with a willingness to explore and experiment beyond standard approaches.

title: Senior Consultant - Intelligent Automation & AI
description:
Roboyo is a category shaper in Agentic Automation. We help leading brands embed autonomous, AI‑powered agents into their workflows, processes, products and services so they can scale faster and operate smarter.
   

  

 Built on a strong automation heritage, we focus on seamless integration of AI into enterprise level organization, not just proving concepts, but owning outcomes and driving value in every industry we are present. At Roboyo, you’ll join a global team of builders, consultants and engineers that are top practitioners of taking solutions to the next level for clients in pursuit of excellence.
 



  
 



**Senior Consultant - Project management** 



 Location: 
 **Stockholm (hybrid - in person some days of the week)** 




**About Roboyo & Role**

  
 


 Are you ready to be part of something extraordinary? We’re not just another tech or consulting company —
 **we’re a powerhouse of innovation, energy, and ambition** 
 . Our mission? To
 **revolutionize the way businesses work through AI, Agentic AI, intelligent automation** 
 and digital transformation. And we’re doing it with the best team in the game.
 

  
 





 We’re growing fast — and we’re just getting started. With bold expansion plans ahead, we’re looking for passionate people who want to shape the future with us. 
 **You’re the conductor of digital ecosystems** 
 . You bring together 
 **different technologies and platforms, creating smart AI automation solutions** 
 that connect people and systems in new ways. You aren’t afraid to switch perspectives, 
 **bringing automation and AI to life in real projects** 
 . Curious, resilient, intrinsically motivated, honest, communicative, self-driven, and proud of the quality you bring to your work.
 

  
 





 We work with the world’s leading 
 **AI and Automation technologies** 
  — including 
 **OpenAI, Microsoft, UiPath, Google, AWS** 
 and more — to build high-impact, value-driven solutions that truly make a difference for our clients. From developing a tailored AI strategy to implementing and operating scalable solutions, we deliver end-to-end support that drives real business transformation.
 

  
 






 This role is a hybrid between
 **consulting and technology** 
 — perfect for someone who not only enjoys working directly with 
 

 clients, but
 

  also has a genuine passion for technology. 
 

 We’re
 

  looking for someone 
 

 who’s
 

  curious, eager to dive into technical concepts, and excited to explore how AI can solve 
 

 real business
 

  challenges. You should feel comfortable working with modern AI platforms and 
 

 tools, and
 

  be motivated to continuously deepen your technical understanding while translating it into meaningful client impact. 
 


  
 



**Role Overview**

  
 


 The Senior Consultant (L3) is a hands-on delivery and advisory role at the heart of Roboyo's client work. You will own defined workstreams within client engagements, act as the day-to-day point of contact for your scope, and translate complex business challenges into pragmatic automation and AI solutions.
 

  
 





 This is not a conceptual role. You will be expected to be delivery-capable — understood as a trusted consultant by the client, a reliable team member by your engagement manager, and a practical mentor to junior colleagues.
 

  
 



**What You Will Do**

  
 

**Client & Delivery**

  
 



* **Lead defined workstreams** 
 within larger client projects, owning deliverables end to end.
* Serve as the day-to-day
 **client contact for your scope** 
 — facilitating workshops, managing clarifications, and walking through solution designs.
* **Translate business problems into pragmatic automation and AI solutions** 
 that can realistically be delivered.
* Prepare and facilitate 
 **process discovery, solution design, and value realisation** 
 workshops.
* Contribute actively to
 **project planning, risk identification, and delivery quality** 
 assurance.
* Present recommendations and results clearly to client stakeholders at all levels.



**Seniority & Team Contribution**

  
 



* **Mentor** 
 Associate Consultants and Consultants on delivery best practices and professional conduct.
* **Review team deliverables** 
 and provide structured, actionable feedback.
* **Contribute to the development** 
 of Roboyo methodologies, templates, and internal best practices.
* Act as a
 **role model for client-facing professionalism** 
 and delivery discipline.



**Technology & Solution Focus**

  
 





 Senior Consultants at L3 are expected to be delivery-capable across Roboyo's core stack — not necessarily the deepest technical expert in the room, but able to understand solution trade-offs and design choices well enough to guide delivery and advise clients.
 

  
 




**RPA**

  
 





 UiPath Studio, Orchestrator, REFramework, attended & unattended automation
 

  
 




**Process Excellence**

  
 





 Celonis, process mapping, Lean / Six Sigma principles
 

  
 




**AI & Intelligent Automation**

  
 





 Document Understanding, IDP, AI Center, GenAI-enabled use cases
 

  
 




**Low-code / Platforms**

  
 





 Appian, workflow and integration platforms (project-dependent)
 

  
 




**Value Realisation**

  
 





 Automation roadmaps, business cases, benefits tracking
 

  
 





  
 



**What We Are Looking For**

  
 

**Experience**

  
 



* 3–6 years of experience in intelligent automation, process consulting, or a related field.
* Demonstrable delivery experience on client-facing projects — owning workstreams, not just supporting them.
* Hands-on experience with at least one core platform in Roboyo's stack (UiPath strongly preferred; Celonis, Appian, or AI/IDP tools a strong advantage).
* Experience working in consulting, systems integration, or a client-delivery environment.



**Skills & Capabilities**

  
 



* Strong ability to structure and communicate complex ideas to non-technical stakeholders.
* Confident facilitator — comfortable leading workshops, requirements sessions, and solution walkthroughs.
* Analytical mindset with the ability to identify automation and AI opportunities from business process analysis.
* Organised and delivery-disciplined — able to manage your own scope and flag risks early.
* Natural collaborator who enjoys contributing to team knowledge and supporting junior colleagues.



**Nice to Have**

  
 



* UiPath certifications (Associate, Developer, or Advanced Developer).
* Celonis certification or Appian delivery experience.
* Exposure to GenAI-enabled use cases or AI-augmented process automation.
* Experience in a specific industry vertical (Financial Services, Manufacturing, Healthcare, etc.).


  
 **What We Offer** 

**Career Path at Roboyo**

  
 





 The L3 Senior Consultant role is a key step in Roboyo's consulting career framework. Strong performers at L3 progress towards Engagement Manager (L4) — taking on broader account responsibility, delivery management, and commercial ownership. Roboyo supports this progression through structured mentoring, internal certification programmes, and exposure to increasingly complex engagements.
 

  
 



* A team that’s not just good — we’re 
 **high-performing** 
 . We support each other, celebrate together, and push boundaries.
* A culture of 
 **empowerment, ownership, and bold ideas** 
 .
* The chance to work with 
 **cutting-edge AI technologies and strategic partners** 
 .
* Continuous and ever expanding learning, 
 **career development, and growth opportunities** 
 .
* A
 **front-row seat** 
 in a company with ambitious growth plans and a vision to lead the AI revolution.
* A place where 
 **you can be yourself** 
 , make an impact, and help us shape the future.




**Sounds like your kind of challenge? Then 
 

 let’s
 

  shape the future together!**





*Roboyo is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome applications from candidates of all backgrounds and are committed to building diverse, inclusive teams.*

  
 




  
 



 We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.
 



**Privacy Notice:** 
 By applying, you consent to the processing of your personal data for recruitment purposes in line with our Privacy Policy: https://roboyo.global/data-privacy/

title: Business Developer Green Industry Transformation
description:
**Build with us and get the best colleagues in the industry**
 At NCC, we are driven to continuously develop – whether it concerns our construction projects or our personal expertise. Every day, we move the industry’s most exciting and complex projects forward through close collaboration between employees, partners and customers. With us, you are a key contributor to the landmarks that define our cities and communities.
   

  

 Here, our employees take an active role in a corporate culture based on stable values and behaviors for a safe and secure workplace. Our collective expertise and diverse backgrounds make a difference.
   

  

**NCC – one of the leading construction companies in the Nordics**
**We kindly but firmly decline contact from advertisers and providers of recruitment services.**
**Business Developer – Green Industry Transformation**
 The green industrial transition is driving a historic transformation of society and industry, creating significant value economically,technologicallyand environmentally. NCC Green Industry Transformation plays a key role in enabling this transition through large,complexand strategically important industrial and infrastructure projects across the Nordics.
   

  

 We are now looking for a Business Developer who wants to be at the forefront of identifying,analysingand actively driving new business opportunities, with a clear focus on building and processinga strong and commercially relevant project pipeline that supports NCC’s long-term growth and profitability.
   

  

**The Role And Key Responsibilities**
 As a Business Developer, reporting to the Head of Strategy and Business Development, you will havea central rolein driving early-phase business development byidentifying,analysingandprioritisingnewprojectsof interest.
   

  

 You will work closely with senior management and key stakeholders across the business area as well as the wider NCCorganisation, combining strong analytical capabilities with a proactive,hands-onand commercially driven approach.
   

  

 The role includes taking initiative in early customer dialogue, building trust-basedrelationshipsand actively pushing opportunities forward to a stage where they are ready to enter contracting and tender processes. You will own and drive selected segments and customer relationships, working cross-functionally to create momentum and ensure alignment.
   

  

 The positionis located inSolna, Malmö,GöteborgorLuleå, travelsto other offices in the business area isrequiredas part of the job.
   

  

**Youwill:**
* Identifyandanalysenew segments of interest aligned with strategic priorities, quantify business opportunities and assess how the segments contribute to the overall business area strategy
* Ensure continuous market, customer and project insight through structured analysis and active external engagement to supportprioritisationand decision-making across geographies in scope
* Prepare,initiateand develop early customer interactions, ensuring clear positioning,trustand continuity
* Act as customer responsible for one or severalprioritisedsegments in close collaboration with relevant functions and business area management
* Build, develop andmaintainstrong internal networks within NCC and relevant external industry networks
* Interact with business area management through continuous updates on business development status, ensuring alignment with strategic direction and priorities


**Your Experience And Background**
 We believe you have several years of hands-on experience from roles within business development, sales, strategy or project development inconstruction-related sectors,and a strong interest in creating new business opportunities and driving them forward.
   

  

 You have a good understanding of market dynamics, customerneedsand early-stage project development, and are comfortable working with structured analysis and decision support.
   

  

 You are a driven,curiousand forward-leaning professional with strong business acumen and the ability to engage stakeholders atdifferent levels. You enjoy taking initiative, buildingrelationshipsand turning insights into concrete opportunities.
   

  

 You are fluent in both Swedish and English, with English as the primary business language.
   

  

 Academic degree equivalent to an MSc, or equivalent work experience in a relevant field.
   

  

**Requestedqualifications**
* Understanding of industrial projects and the early phases of the project lifecycle
* Strong analytical and hypothesis-driven problem-solving skills
* Excellent presentation andcommunicationskills
* Strong networking and relationship-building capabilities
* An enthusiastic, outgoing personality – able to be “tough with a smile”
* Valid driver’s license (Category B)


 You lead and act in line with NCC Star Behaviors:
   

  

 Passion to perform,Buildtogether,Followthrough and follow up, Act with care.
   

  

 Background checks are conductedin accordance withNCC’s security culture.
   

  

**About The Business Area – NCC Green Industry Transformation**
 NCC Green Industry Transformation is a newly established business area focusing on large-scale, complex industrial and infrastructure projects within the green transition. The business area delivers projects in the SEK billion range and plays a key role in enabling fossil-free and sustainable industrial development across the Nordics.
   

  

**NCC offers**
 At NCC, we strive to be an attractive employer where employees thrive,developand feel well. We offer a wide range of employee benefits and have collective agreements that provide security and clear employment conditions. You will also have access to insurance, wellness allowance, reduced workinghoursandadditionalbenefits through our benefits portal.
   

  

**Contact and application**
 For questions about the recruitment process, please contact
   

  

 Recruitment Specialist Nathalie Löfvenmark, nathalie.lofvenmark@ncc.se, +46 72 235 30 23
   

  

 Last day to apply: 17 May 2026.
   

  

 Selectionisongoingand the position may be filled before the application deadline.
   

  

**Welcomewithyourapplication!**

title: Senior Security Engineer
description:
**About Us**
 Legora is on a mission: to redefine how legal work gets done. From the very start we have been very clear about the fact that we are not building a solution for lawyers, we are building it with them, because it is the only way to make sure it gets done the right way; working side-by-side every step of the way.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace empowers legal professionals not just to work faster - but to ask better questions, unlock new insights. Every day, we push the boundaries of legal tech to make complex processes smarter, faster, and more human. From thousands of documents analysed in minutes to intelligent workflows designed in collaboration with leading practices, we’re turning possibility into reality.
   

  

 Today we are trusted by global firms like Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Bird & Bird and Linklaters in over 40 countries, but we have no plans on stopping here. We ship fast, we iterate effectively, and we scale rapidly - not by accident, but by design.
   

  

 When you join Legora, you become part of a team that believes "good enough" isn’t good enough and that the way to win is together, by empowering lawyers to do their best work with technology that truly understands them. If you’re excited by building from first principles, working with exceptional people, and accelerating change in a high-stakes, high-impact domain—then this is the moment and the place.
   

  

**We’re not just shaping the future of legal tech — we’re defining it. Ready to join us in building the intelligent future of law?**
**The Role**
 At Legora, we prioritise security. Always.
   

  

 We are looking for Application Security Engineers who can think like an attacker, build like a developer, and operate like an SRE. In this role you will work across our whole tech stack, from our Azure cloud infrastructure, JavaScript and Python services, to our AI integrations and workflows. Your goal is to ensure everything we ship and build is secure-by-default and resilient to evolving threats.
   

  

 At Legora we don't believe that “shifting left” is sufficient, our goal is to build a secure and resilient ecosystem for our engineers so that they can build tomorrows features with confidence and speed.
   

  

* This is a Stockholm-based, 5-day in-office role, we believe building together in person drives better outcomes.


**What You Will Be Doing**
* Embed security into our software development lifecycle; conduct design reviews, threat modelling, and secure code reviews for our JavaScript and Python codebases.
* Architect and implement security controls for our cloud infrastructure, ensuring Zero Trust principles in across our networks, identities, and service-to-service communication.
* Build and maintain secure-by-default tooling, templates, and guardrails for our developers.
* Ensure our AI workflows and pipelines are secured and resilient against prompt injection, data leakage, and abuse.
* Develop and maintain vulnerability management pipelines, triaging and driving fixes with engineering teams.
* Automate security processes in CI/CD, including secret scanning, artifact signing, and policy-as-code checks.
* Partner with our information security team to ensure compliance and automate evidence collection efforts.


**Who You Are**
* Experience with Security Engineering or Product Security roles
* Able to produce production grade code.
* You understand Zero Trust architecture
* You have experience with secure SDLC practices, application security testing, and vulnerability management.
* You thrive in cross-functional work, explaining security risks to engineers, influencing design choices, and collaborating to deliver secure features on time.


**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: System- och applikationsansvarig för analysapplikationer
description:
**Professional Summary**
 Senior Cloud Platform Engineer/DevOps Engineer with 16+ years of experience designing, automating, and operating
   

  

 secure and scalable cloud platforms in complex enterprise environments across Europe.
   

  

 Strong focus on Azure platform engineering, Infrastructure as Code, CI/CD automation, and operational reliability (SRE
   

  

 practices) in regulated and high-availability environments.
   

  

 Currently working on enterprise Azure platform engineering using Terraform, Bicep, GitHub Actions, and Azure DevOps,
   

  

 enabling standardized deployments, governance, and developer self-service across multiple teams.
   

  

 Experienced in working closely with application teams to ensure smooth deployment, troubleshooting, and operational
   

  

 readiness of applications in shared platform environments.
   

  

 Expanding hands-on experience in AWS (EKS, IAM, networking, observability) and actively applying AI-assisted engineering (Azure
   

  

 OpenAI, Copilot) to improve automation and operational efficiency.
   

  

**Skills**

 hands-on), Cloudflare

**Professional Experience**

* Drove cost optimization initiatives (autoscaling, reservations, right-sizing), achieving ~15% annual cost reduction
* Led traffic unification and edge security transformation by consolidating DDoS, WAF, Bot Protection, CDN, and

* Defined high availability, disaster recovery, and cost optimization approaches.

 NMBS/SNCB (Belgian Railways), Brussels, Belgium

title: Technical Product Manager, Private Cloud Domain
description:
**About Agoda**
 At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.
   

  

 Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.
   

  

 No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.
   

  

**Get to Know our Team**
 Agoda’s Technical Product Management (TPM) organization drives internal platforms and tools that enable thousands of engineers to build, ship, and operate world‑class products efficiently and reliably. Our TPMs bridge business, data, and technology—translating complex engineering and operational needs into scalable solutions that empower teams across the company.
   

  

 The Production Deployments domain owns the end‑to‑end lifecycle of production services at Agoda—from initial deployment through operating, scaling, day‑to‑day management, and eventual retirement. This work spans more than a thousand services in production and includes deployment orchestration, private cloud runtime environments, service controls, and cost‑aware resource management. The domain is central to Agoda’s Production Excellence, balancing developer autonomy with the guardrails required for reliability, security, and efficiency at scale.
   

  

**The Opportunity**
 As a Technical Product Manager for Production Deployments, you define and evolve the platforms that govern how services are deployed, operated, scaled, and managed in production. You partner with platform engineers, SREs, and application teams to improve not only how software is released, but also how it consumes resources, manages risk, and operates cost‑effectively across its lifecycle.
   

  

 This is a high‑impact role shaping how thousands of services run in production—enabling teams to move quickly while providing the visibility, controls, and standards required to operate reliably at scale.
   

  

**In This Role, You’ll Get To:**
* Own the full product lifecycle for production deployment and runtime platforms—from discovery and design through adoption and continuous improvement.
* Define a clear long‑term vision for managing production services, including deployment, operating, scaling, upgrades, and decommissioning.
* Partner with platform engineers, SREs, and service owners toidentify operational challenges and prioritize high‑impact platform capabilities.
* Enable safer and more efficient releases through automation, standardization, and platform guardrails.
* Drive visibility and controls around resource usage and cost, enabling teams tooptimize and right‑size their services.
* Design and evolve self‑service capabilities and controls that allow teams to manage services independently while meeting reliability and security standards.
* Balance delivery velocity with reliability, capacity management, and cost efficiency.
* Define and track key metrics across the service lifecycle, including deployment frequency, change failure rates, resourceutilization, cost efficiency, and recovery time.
* Communicate clearly across engineering and leadership, including during complex or high‑impact production situations.
* Demonstrate strong ownership and execution, driving initiatives from concept through broad adoption across a large engineering organization.
* Stay current with industry practices in CI/CD, cloud platforms, platform engineering, cost optimization, and large‑scale service operations, and apply them pragmatically.


**What You’ll Need to Succeed:**
* Experience working in or closely with production environments, with understanding of how services are deployed,operated, scaled, and supported in live systems.
* Ability to understand developer and service‑owner requirements at a technical level, including the workflows and controls needed tooperate applications in production.
* Proven ability to navigate differing requirements, such as speed vs. safety, flexibility vs. standardization, and team‑specific needs vs. platform consistency.
* 3+ years of experience in technical product or program management within a highly technical environment.
* Strong product thinking and communication skills, with the ability to influence and align engineering teams without direct authority.
* Experience defining strategy, setting priorities, and delivering platform capabilities used by many teams.
* Experience leading complex, cross‑functional initiatives involving infrastructure, cloud, or internal developer platforms.
* Excellent stakeholder management skills, able to clearly articulate technical trade‑offs and decisions.
* Working familiarity with common production concepts such as containerized services, service discovery, service meshes, or orchestration platforms.
* Data‑driven mindset; comfortable working with metrics, dashboards, or SQL to inform decisions and measure impact.
* Highly organized and adaptable, comfortable operating in ambiguous spaces with evolving requirements.
* Hands‑on experience with product and delivery tools such as JIRA and Confluence.
* Curiosity, ownership, and a continuous‑improvement mindset, focused on enabling engineers tooperate services effectively at scale.
* This position requires a successful candidate to relocate fully to Bangkok, Thailand, where relocation support is provided.\*\*\*


 #bangkok #sanjose #losangeles #sydney #melbourne #perth #vancouver #shanghai #beijing #shenzhen #copenhagen #paris #hongkong #budapest #jakarta #dublin #telaviv #milan #rome #tokyo #kualalumpur #amsterdam #oslo #jerusalem #moscow #barcelona #madrid #stockholm #zurich #taipei #london #wroclaw #warsaw #chennai #pune #toronto #austin #sydney #chichago #noida #delhi #seattle #hyderabad #gurgaon #newyork #bangalore #boston #bengaluru #berlin #mumbai #IT #4 #5
   

  

 Please review our Hiring Process Guidelines before your interview — click here to learn how interviewing at Agoda works.
   

  

**Discover More About Working At Agoda**
* Agoda Careers https://careersatagoda.com
* Facebook https://www.facebook.com/agodacareers/
* LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/company/agoda
* YouTube https://www.youtube.com/agodalife


**Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Agoda, we pride ourselves on being a company represented by people of all different backgrounds and orientations. We prioritize attracting diverse talent and cultivating an inclusive environment that encourages collaboration and innovation. Employment at Agoda is based solely on a person’s merit and qualifications. We are committed to providing equal employment opportunity regardless of sex, age, race, color, national origin, religion, marital status, pregnancy, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, citizenship, veteran or military status, and other legally protected characteristics.
   

  

 We will keep your application on file so that we can consider you for future vacancies and you can always ask to have your details removed from the file. For more details please read our privacy policy.
   

  

**Disclaimer**
 We do not accept any terms or conditions, nor do we recognize any agency’s representation of a candidate, from unsolicited third-party or agency submissions. If we receive unsolicited or speculative CVs, we reserve the right to contact and hire the candidate directly without any obligation to pay a recruitment fee.

title: Regional Sales Manager, Nordics | Extremities Product Portfolio
description:
**The Job’s Mission:**
 At Stryker, we are looking for a talented, highly motivated sales leader who will be responsible for driving our
 **Extremities** 
 business in the
 **Nordics** 
 .
   

  

 Stryker’s innovative Extremities business offers market-leading implants for the treatment of bone fractures. Some examples of our portfolio can be found via:
   

  

* Upper Extremities: https://www.stryker.com/us/en/portfolios/orthopaedics/upper-extremities.html
* Foot & Ankle: https://www.stryker.com/us/en/portfolios/orthopaedics/foot-and-ankle.html


 In this role, you will be part of a high caliber, achievement-driven sales team who shares a strong belief in helping our customers to improve patient care through the use of our products. You will lead your team with full accountability for sales performance, turnover and cost control, ensuring excellent customer service while driving the acquisition of new customers. For this position, you
 **reside either in Finland, Sweden or Norway** 
 .
   

  

 This is a great opportunity to join one of the world’s leading medical technology organizations and make a difference towards our mission of making healthcare better!
   

  

**What you will do:**
* In your new role, you will start with a familiarization phase to learn about our portfolio and build relationships with internal/external stakeholders.
* Lead, develop and inspire a sales team of direct reports: you will coach/develop your team to achieve their full potential and promote an environment that fosters engagement and individual growth. Here, you will also act as a developer of people, creating a future pipeline of talent for Stryker.
* Support and drive your team strategically and tactically to accelerate business through the Extremities portfolio, in alignment with the annual marketing plan.
* You will deliver/exceed against the quarterly and yearly business budget whilst managing equipment utilization, recurring revenue pipeline development alongside accurate forecasting vs. budget.
* Build up a network with key customers, decision-makers, and key opinion leaders (KOLs).
* In close collaboration with Marketing, you will understand and utilize market dynamics to support business acceleration, taking a creative approach to new business development for both current and future technologies.
* Provide solutions for customers and KOLs, adding value to the Sales process – resulting in winning business and positive customer experience.
* Closely support and collaborate with enabling function teams such as tender & pricing, compliance, customer service and finance, to ensure smooth order to cash process is maintained and our customers receive the highest levels of service.
* Collaborate with Sales Managers of other divisions of Stryker to foster cross-departmental opportunities.


**What you need:**
 Required:
   

  

* Degree or equivalent.
* 8+ years of experience, including Sales and/or Marketing experience in industries such as MedTech, Biotech, Pharma or related.
* Excellent communication, negotiation and presentation skills with proficiency in spoken and written English.
* You have already proven your leadership skills in successfully managing or coaching a team.
* Business acumen in setting sales coverage, leveraging territory coverage and customer focus. You have experience in delivering market share growth and financial commitments.
* Ability to build relationships, excellent collaboration and cross-functional influencing skills & teamwork – your personality also makes it easy for you to inspire, motivate and develop others.
* Adaptability, analytical and organizational skills with a strategic approach to business planning.
* Demonstrated proficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word & PowerPoint).
* As this position involves customer interactions in the field, you have a valid driver’s license and flexibility to travel in the region.
* Ethics and integrity in ensuring the delivery of Stryker’s mission of making healthcare better.


 Preferred:
   

  

* Orthopaedics/anatomy knowledge is not mandatory, but would be an advantage.


**What we offer:**
* Flat hierarchies and a culture committed to achieve our mission and deliver remarkable results.
* We grow talent: we offer great personal and internal career development for our employees, with the possibility to make both vertical and lateral position movement.
* An attractive salary and benefits package, including a pension plan.
* Recognition of your performance: at Stryker, outstanding individual and cross-functional team performance is rewarded. Ideas, projects, or other exceptional achievements can be submitted for various awards on a local and global level.
* Collaborative and inclusive environment: join a team that values diversity and inclusion, fostering a supportive and innovative workplace.
* Quality products that improve the lives of our customers and patients.
* Ability to discover your strengths, follow your passion and own your career.


 Stryker is a global leader in medical technologies and, together with its customers, is driven to make healthcare better. The company offers innovative products and services in MedSurg, Neurotechnology, Orthopaedics and Spine that help improve patient and healthcare outcomes. Alongside its customers around the world, Stryker impacts more than 150 million patients annually.

title: CRM Solutions Development Consultant
description:
**Sammanfattning**
 Avanade arbetar med att utveckla och implementera lösningar baserade på Dynamics 365 för organisationer i olika branscher. Genom djup kompetens inom Microsofts plattform och erfarenhet av verksamhetsnära projekt hjälper vi våra kunder att använda teknik för att effektivisera arbetssätt och skapa affärsnytta.
   

  

 Som D365 Customer Engagement (CE) Developer arbetar du med att designa och utveckla CRM-lösningar genom hela projektets livscykel. Du samarbetar nära projektledare, funktionella konsulter, arkitekter och andra utvecklare för att säkerställa att lösningen möter både tekniska krav och verksamhetens behov.
   

  

 Rollen passar dig som har god teknisk kompetens inom Dynamics 365 CE och vill arbeta i projekt där kvalitet, struktur och samarbete är centralt.
   

  

**Ansvarsområden**
* Rådgiva kunder och interna intressenter kring hur teknik kan användas för att lösa affärsproblem
* Utveckla applikationer, skriva och underhålla komplex kod samt genomföra tester och komponentdesign
* Ta fram tekniska specifikationer och samarbeta med funktionella konsulter för att säkerställa att kraven är tydliga och korrekt implementerade
* Prototypa, konfigurera och testa verksamhetsprocesser
* Bidra till design av konceptuell arkitektur och tekniska lösningar
* Använda KPI:er för att mäta och kvalitetssäkra leveranser
* Identifiera förbättringsmöjligheter i kundens CRM-lösning och stödja kontinuerlig utveckling
* Säkerställa att utvecklingen följer Avanades riktlinjer för kvalitet och prestanda
* Använda etablerade ramverk och komponenter för att effektivisera utvecklingsprocessen
* Samarbeta med intressenter för att identifiera möjligheter till AI-driven automatisering och implementera funktioner i Copilot Studio för förbättrat kundengagemang


**Qualifications**
**Kompetens & erfarenhet**
* Erfarenhet av minst en fullständig implementation av Microsoft Dynamics 365 CE eller Dynamics CRM.
* Erfarenhet av att analysera, designa, utveckla, anpassa, konfigurera, implementera och förvalta applikationskod i Microsoft Dynamics CRM och Power Platform, särskilt inom Sales och Customer Service.
* Erfarenhet av arbete i Software-as-a-Service (SaaS)-miljöer samt med Microsoft SQL Server, HTML, JavaScript, Microsoft ASP, Microsoft .NET och Azure DevOps.
* Erfarenhet av att integrera och anpassa workflows med Copilot Studio för att bygga konversationsbaserade AI-lösningar och automatisera affärsprocesser.
* Förmåga att arbeta kundnära och tillsammans med kund ta fram och följa en handlingsplan.
* Erfarenhet av samarbete med globala team i projekt kring implementation och förvaltning av CE-lösningar.
* God konsultmässighet och erfarenhet av kundnära arbete, antingen hos implementeringspartner eller som slutanvändarorganisation.
* Kandidatexamen inom datavetenskap, datateknik, systemvetenskap, Management Information Systems, eller motsvarande, alternativt relevant arbetslivserfarenhet..


**Personliga egenskaper vi tror att du har för att lyckas i rollen**
* Analytisk, nyfiken och anpassningsbar
* Lagspelare med god kommunikativ förmåga
* Lösningsorienterad, tålmodig och kvalitetsmedveten
* Självgående och drivande
* Innovativt förhållningssätt


**En arbetsplats att växa på**
 Hos Avanade får du arbeta med affärskritiska och ledande teknologilösningar i en miljö som präglas av samarbete, inkludering och ambition. Du blir en del av ett kunnigt och stöttande team som delar med sig av sin erfarenhet – och som värdesätter din.
   

  

 Här finns möjligheterna. Nu är frågan – är du redo att ta dem?
   

  

**A great place to work**
 As you bring your skills and abilities to Avanade, you’ll get distinctive experiences, limitless learning, and ambitious growth in return. As we continue to build our diverse and inclusive culture, we become even more innovative and creative, helping us better serve our clients and communities. You’ll join a community of smart, supportive collaborators to lift, mentor, and guide you, and to lean on your expertise. You get a company purpose-built for business-critical, leading-edge technology solutions, committed to improving the way humans work, interact, and live. It’s all here, so take a closer look!
   

  

 We work hard to provide an inclusive, diverse culture with a deep sense of belonging for all our employees. Visit our Inclusion & Diversity page.
   

  

**Create a Future For Our People That Focuses On**
* Expanding your thinking
* Experimenting courageously
* Learning and pivoting


 Inspire greatness in our people by
   

  

* Empowering every voice
* Encouraging boldness
* Celebrating progress


 Accelerate the impact of our people by
   

  

* Amazing the client
* Prioritizing what matters
* Acting as one


**Learn more**
 Interested in knowing what’s going on inside Avanade? Check out our blogs:
   

  

* Avanade Insights That Matter
* Inside Avanade – explore what life is like workin

title: D365 CE Functional Consultant
description:
På Avanade ser vi varje dag hur kraften i Dynamics 365 formar framtidens företag. Genom att kombinera vår oöverträffade Microsoft-kompetens med ett kreativt innovationssätt och stark branschkunskap skapar vi stora möjligheter för Microsoft, våra kunder och för dig. Hos Avanade finns otaliga karriärvägar att utforska – en av dem leder garanterat till din unika version av framgång.
   

  

**Bli en del av oss**
 Som D365 Customer Engagement (CE) Functional Consultant kommer du att arbeta kundnära och samarbeta tätt med kunder för att designa, implementera och optimera D365 Customer Engagement-lösningar, så att de stödjer verksamhetens mål. Du löser problem med hjälp av din D365-kompetens och fungerar som en länk mellan Avanades kunder, ditt projektteam och den bredare interna CE-communityn.
   

  

 Rollen ger dig möjlighet att arbeta för Microsofts främsta partner, med ett oöverträffat fokus på personlig utveckling och utbildning – både inom teknik och konsultfärdigheter.
   

  

 Tillsammans gör vi det som är viktigt.
   

  

**Vad du kommer göra**
 Rollen kräver en stark förståelse för affärsprocesser, utmärkt förmåga att hantera intressenter samt kompetens att konfigurera och anpassa D365 CE-applikationer.
   

  

**Huvudsakliga Ansvarsområden**
* Samarbeta med kunder för att förstå deras affärsbehov och översätta dem till funktionella krav.
* Designa och implementera Microsoft Dynamics 365 CE-lösningar, inklusive modulerna Sales, Customer Service, Marketing och Field Service.
* Leda workshops, kravinsamlingssessioner och dialoger med intressenter för att definiera lösningsroadmaps.
* Konfigurera, anpassa och vidareutveckla D365 CE med hjälp av Power Platform (Power Automate, Power Apps, Power BI).
* Arbeta tillsammans med tekniska konsulter och utvecklare för att leverera helhetslösningar.
* Ge vägledning kring best practice, lösningsarkitektur och förbättring av affärsprocesser.
* Genomföra systemtester, användarutbildningar och stödja förändringsledningsaktiviteter.
* Felsöka problem och ge löpande support till kunder efter implementering.
* Hålla dig uppdaterad kring de senaste trenderna och uppdateringarna inom Microsoft Dynamics 365 och Power Platform.
* Samarbeta med intressenter för att identifiera möjligheter till AI-driven automatisering och implementera Copilot-funktioner för förbättrat kundengagemang.


**Qualifications**
**Kompetens & erfarenhet**
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet som Functional Consultant inom Dynamics 365 CE, antingen i konsultroll eller annan kundnära roll.
* God kunskap inom Microsoft Dynamics 365 CE (Sales, Customer Service, Marketing, Field Service).
* Erfarenhet av Power Platform (Power Apps, Power Automate, Power BI) är meriterande.
* Förmåga att översätta verksamhetskrav till tekniska lösningar.
* God förståelse för CRM-best practice och aktuella branschtrender.
* Kännedom om Copilot och dess möjligheter att bygga och implementera AI-lösningar i Dynamics.
* Erfarenhet av konfiguration och anpassning av D365 CE, inklusive workflows, affärsregler, formulär och vyer.
* Mycket god kommunikativ förmåga och vana att arbeta med olika intressenter.
* Kunskap om datamigrering, integrationer och rapporteringsverktyg.
* Microsoft-certifieringar är meriterande.


**A great place to work**
 As you bring your skills and abilities to Avanade, you’ll get distinctive experiences, limitless learning, and ambitious growth in return. As we continue to build our diverse and inclusive culture, we become even more innovative and creative, helping us better serve our clients and our communities. You’ll join a community of smart, supportive collaborators to lift, mentor, and guide you, and to lean on your expertise. You get a company purpose-built for business-critical, leading-edge technology solutions, committed to improving the way humans work, interact, and live. It’s all here, so take a closer look!
   

  

 We work hard to provide an inclusive, diverse culture with a deep sense of belonging for all our employees. Visit our Inclusion & Diversity page.
   

  

 Create a future for our people that focuses on
   

  

* Expanding your thinking
* Experimenting courageously

* Empowering every voice
* Encouraging boldness

 Accelerate the impact of our people by

 Learn more
