title: Brand & Content Specialist
description:
****The Role****
 Most companies in trust & safety sound the same. Dense, defensive, forgettable. We want to be the one that doesn't.
   

  

 This role exists to make Besedo turn heads — in the feeds our buyers scroll, at the events they attend, in the conversations they're already having about AI, compliance, and what it actually takes to keep a platform safe. Your job is to take the marketing strategy and make something people actually stop for.
   

  

 You're a storyteller first. You make things — videos, posts, decks, event moments, press pitches — and you make sure they reach the right people. AI is already part of how you work, because you figured out it makes your output better and faster. You're comfortable being the only creative in the room and you don't need a team or agency behind you to produce work you're proud of.
   

  

****Why this matter****
 Trust and safety used to be a back-office function. It's now part of the strategy conversation.
   

  

 Digital platforms — marketplaces, dating apps, classifieds, communities — run on user-generated content: the listings, profiles, messages, reviews, and posts that users create. That content is also where the harm happens. Scams, fraud, harassment, illegal goods, CSAM, manipulated images. AI has made all of it easier to produce and harder to catch, and the volume is past what human teams can review alone.
   

  

 Besedo has been protecting users for over twenty years, long before it was a category. That hasn't changed but our platform has. We're building the marketing function to make sure the right people hear it — and that's where this role comes in.
   

  

****Key Responsibilities****
* Thought leadership — work with our Head of Marketing, CEO, CCO, and subject matter experts to turn their expertise into content that earns attention. Conference talks, industry reports, bylines, podcasts — and pitch them to get Besedo into the conversations that matter.
* Events & webinars — run Besedo's event presence and webinars end-to-end. Logistics, content, speaker prep, promotion, follow-up.
* Video & creative content — produce short-form video and visual assets. Talking-head clips, event coverage, animated posts, webinar trailers.
* LinkedIn end-to-end. Write it, film it, design it, post it.
* Distribution — getting something made is half the job. You know how to make sure it actually reaches people.
* Brand consistency — the internal reference point for how Besedo looks and sounds across every external touchpoint.


****What we're looking for****
* A natural storyteller who works across formats — written, visual, video — without losing the thread of what makes something worth paying attention to.
* Hands-on creative range: you can film and edit a short video, design a social asset, and write a press pitch in the same week without breaking a sweat.
* Comfortable with direct outreach — pitching our experts onto podcasts, stages, and content collaborations, plus traditional press when it's the right fit.
* Experience running events and webinars end-to-end.
* Skilled at working with senior subject matter experts — turning what's in their heads into content that earns reach and credibility.
* Self-directed and used to building from scratch in lean teams. You know what that actually involves and you've done it before.
* Disciplined and delivery-focused — you hit your cadence, flag issues early, and don't let things slip quietly.
* Native level / fluency in English.


****Icing on the cake****
* Familiarity with trust & safety, content moderation, AI, or digital compliance.
* Basic SEO fundamentals.
* Existing relationships with European tech, compliance, or marketplace media.
* Additional European languages — German, French, or Spanish.


****What it's like to work with us****
 At Besedo, people from diverse cultures and backgrounds come together with shared values:
   

  

 🎯 We are action-oriented and focused on meaningful outcomes
   

  

 🤝 We support each other’s growth and succeed as a team
   

  

 📚 We continuously learn, share knowledge, and enjoy the journey
   

  

 ⚖️ We offer a flexible, hybrid work environment designed to support both performance and well-being.
   

  

**About Besedo**
 Besedo is a global leader in trust & safety, helping digital platforms keep their communities safe. Every year we review more than 500 million pieces of user-generated content and block over 40 million fraud attempts for platforms that can't afford to get trust wrong.
   

  

 Our platform Implio combines, rule based automation, AI with expert human moderation and analytics. Headquartered in Stockholm with 300+ people across 5 offices.

title: Nätverkstekniker
description:
Vill du arbeta operativt med nätverk, säkerhet och brandväggar i en verksamhet som är avgörande för att samhället ska fungera? Vi söker nu en erfaren nätverkstekniker som vill arbeta med drift och förvaltning av en omfattande och samhällskritisk nätverksmiljö. Var med och gör samhället möjligt.
   

  

**Om jobbet**
 Som nätverkstekniker ingår du i ett driftteam med ansvar för Skatteverkets nätinfrastruktur. Rollen är operativ och omfattar drift och livscykelarbete såsom patchning och uppgraderingar, driftsättning samt hantering av beställningar i nära samarbete med andra intressenter inom organisationen.
   

  

 En viktig del av arbetet är att bidra i hanteringen av allvarliga incidenter kopplade till it‑infrastrukturen, med särskilt fokus på brandväggar och nätverkssäkerhet, där verksamheten behöver snabbt, strukturerat och kvalificerat stöd. Arbetet bedrivs i produktionsmiljö och ställer höga krav på kvalitet, säkerhet och stabilitet. Vid behov medverkar du även i utvecklings- och införandeprojekt av nya nätverks- och säkerhetslösningar.
   

  

 Skatteverket går in i en ny fas av uppbyggnad och innovation då vi kommer att stärka vår leverans av it-tjänster och it-drift till fler statliga myndigheter. Vi bygger just nu nästa generation av våra infrastrukturtjänster, där vi designar och bygger ett nytt datacenter, ytterligare ökar automatiseringen och vidareutvecklar vår molnlösning. Därför skalar vi nu upp och stärker våra team med nya kollegor. Du blir en viktig medarbetare inom enheten Skatteverkets Tekniska Tjänsteenhet. Förutom dina närmsta kollegor inom nätverkssektionen kommer du att samarbeta med flera andra team inom bl.a.virtualisering, lagring, windows server och red hat linux.
   

  

 Vi erbjuder goda semestervillkor, tjänstepensionsvillkor samt förmåner för dig som är förälder. Det är viktigt för oss att du har balans mellan jobb och fritid och du får en friskvårdstimme i veckan och friskvårdsbidrag.
   

  

 Placerings ort för denna tjänst är Sundbyberg
   

  

 Skatteverkets it-avdelning arbetar aktivt för att främja en inkluderande arbetsplats som präglas av jämställdhet och mångfald där alla medarbetare får lika möjligheter att bidra och utvecklas. Läs mer på Jobba med it hos oss
   

  

 Du tillhör Nätverkssektionen, med placering i Sundbyberg. Vi är 30 medarbetare på sektionen.
   

  

**Om dig**
 För att göra ett bra jobb och trivas hos oss på Skatteverket behöver du vara lyhörd, tänka nytt och ta ansvar. I arbetet är gott omdöme och förståelse för rättssäkerhet och säkerhet viktigt. Du ska också leva upp till vår medarbetarpolicy.
   

  

**I Det Här Jobbet Ska Du**
* ha god samarbetsförmåga, vara kommunikativ, hjälpsam och ha ett gott bemötande
* ta initiativ, tänka nytt och ta ställning i frågor
* ha förmågan och viljan att lära dig nya saker och kunna ställa om vid förändringar
* agera medvetet och professionellt utifrån en god självinsikt
* kunna analysera informationsflöden, se samband, mönster och göra avgränsningar
* ha god kommunikationsförmåga och lätt för att uttrycka dig i tal och skrift på svenska


**Du Ska Även Ha**
* flerårig och relevant arbetslivserfarenhet av operativ nätverksdrift i större miljö
* goda kunskaper och arbetslivserfarenhet inom LAN/WAN/WLAN
* relevant arbetslivserfarenhet av arbete med brandväggar i produktionsmiljö, gärna från flera olika leverantörer
* arbetslivserfarenhet av arbete med nätverk i datacentermiljö
* erfarenhet av att arbeta med säkerhetsrelaterade frågor inom nätverk


 Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet eller kunskap inom ett eller flera av följande områden: DNS och DHCP samt Identitets- och åtkomstlösningar, så som exempelvis Cisco ISE.
   

  

**Bra att veta**
 Anställningen är tillsvidare och kan inledas med provanställning i sex månader.
   

  

 En anställning hos oss kan innebära placering i säkerhetsklass. En säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) kan därför komma att genomföras före beslut om anställning. För en del av våra arbetsuppgifter i säkerhetsklass krävs svenskt medborgarskap.
   

  

 På skatteverket.se/jobb kan du exempelvis läsa om vår samhällsbärande roll, fördelarna med att jobba hos oss och hur det går till när du söker våra jobb.
   

  

 När du ansöker bifogar du ditt cv. Vi använder inte personligt brev i våra rekryteringar och du ska därför inte bifoga det i din ansökan.
   

  

 Välkommen med din ansökan!

title: Teamchef Tech Systems
description:
Arbetsuppgifter
   

  

* Leda och utveckla teamet Tech Systems
* Utveckla strategier och aktiviteter för applikationsförvaltning
* Stötta systemägare och vara en brygga mot övriga SBAB


 Att jobba som Teamchef Tech Systems
   

  

 Vill du leda ett team som är hjärtat i SBAB:s tekniska systemförvaltning? Brinner du för teknik, kvalitet och samarbete? Som Teamchef Tech Systems får du möjlighet att påverka och utveckla hur vi arbetar med våra applikationer och system – och samtidigt bidra till en hållbar och inkluderande arbetsplats.
   

  

 I rollen som Teamchef Tech Systems ansvarar du för att våra applikationer och system håller hög kvalitet – både genom förvaltning av interna system och kravställning mot externa leverantörer. Du leder och utvecklar teamet Tech Systems, som stöttar systemägare och driver arbetet med strategier och policyer för applikationsförvaltning. Du har även ansvar för underhåll av vårt systemregister och för att säkerställa effektiva processer inom Identity and Access Management (IAM).
   

  

 Utöver detta säkerställer du att uppsatta mål för SLA:er och KPI:er uppnås, ansvarar för teamets budget och kostnadsuppföljning samt hanterar incidenter och avvikelser för att minimera påverkan på verksamheten. Rollen innebär nära samarbete med övriga delar av SBAB och du blir en nyckelperson i Tech-organisationen. Du rapporterar till Tech Operations Manager.
   

  

 För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du har:
   

  

* Flera års erfarenhet av ledarskap och personalansvar
* Erfarenhet av leverantörsstyrning inom systemförvaltning
* En teknisk bakgrund inom IT-drift samt god förståelse för systemförvaltning och IT-processer
* Förmåga att skapa tillit och engagemang i teamet
* En god kommunikativ förmåga, då rollen innebär många kontaktytor inom organisationen
* Erfarenhet av att driva förändring inom systemförvaltning exempelvis behörighetsstyrning


 Som ledare på SBAB utgår du ifrån vårt värderingsdrivna arbetssätt och skapar förutsättningar för självdrivande medarbetare. Du har personalansvar och ansvar för arbetsmiljöfrågor där du skapar en hållbar arbetsplats där vi tillsammans driver utveckling framåt.
   

  

 Vi gillar att ses- det är en del av vår kultur. Till våren flyttar vi in på Drottninggatan 89, ett kontor som ger plats för både fokus och gemenskap, med stadens puls precis utanför dörren.
   

  

 Har du check på allt?
   

  

* Helhetsperspektiv
* Inkluderande
* Kommunikativ
* Ödmjuk
* Prestigelös

title: IT/OT specialist
description:
* Urval sker löpande
* Hybrid


 Arbetsuppgifter
   

  

*Hela samhället ställer om mot en fossilfri framtid. Vi vill visa vägen i utvecklingen av vår bransch, så att fler kan ta sig fram, ta hand om sitt fordon och driva verksamheter med ett så lågt klimatavtryck som möjligt. Vill du vara med och bidra till hållbar utveckling, på riktigt? Välkommen att följa med på vår resa!*
 Kvalifikationer
   

  

 Som IT/OT‑specialist blir du en nyckelperson i vår depåverksamhet. Du ansvarar för drift, utveckling och säkerhet inom våra OT‑, SCADA‑ och stödjande IT‑miljöer och bidrar till att våra kritiska processer fungerar stabilt, säkert och långsiktigt hållbart.
   

  

 Rollen är central i en säkerhetskänslig verksamhet och innebär ett nära samarbete med driftorganisationen, IT‑funktionen, externa leverantörer samt verksamhets‑ och IT‑ledning inom Terminals SE.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 I rollen som IT/OT‑specialist kombinerar du djup teknisk kompetens inom industriell automation och OT med ett helhetsperspektiv på IT/OT‑säkerhet, arkitektur och verksamhetsstöd. Du arbetar både operativt och rådgivande och är med och utvecklar våra IT/OT‑miljöer i linje med verksamhetens krav, säkerhetsmål och långsiktiga strategi.
   

  

 Du fungerar som en teknisk brygga mellan verksamhet, IT och leverantörer och säkerställer att lösningar är robusta, säkra och anpassade för drift i en samhällsviktig miljö. Resor förekommer regelbundet inom depånätverket.
   

  

**Huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter**
**Drift, OT och industriell automation**
* Övervaka, konfigurera och optimera OT‑, SCADA‑ och automationssystem för säker och stabil drift
* Felsöka kommunikation, prestanda och funktion i industriella styrsystem
* Arbeta med livscykelhantering: uppgraderingar, redundans, backuper och återställning
* Medverka vid förändringar, tester, driftsättningar och leverantörsarbete


**IT/OT‑ och cybersäkerhet**
* Implementera och upprätthålla säkerhetskontroller i IT/OT‑miljöer, exempelvis nätverkssegmentering, brandväggar, kontohantering och patchhantering
* Genomföra riskbedömningar och bidra till utveckling av säkerhetsstrategier för OT
* Arbeta strukturerat med hotbilder, åtgärdsplaner och prioritering av säkerhetsinsatser
* Säkerställa efterlevnad av relevanta regelverk och standarder, såsom IEC 62443 och NIS2


**Incidenthantering och analys**
* Delta i och driva hantering av incidenter som påverkar IT/OT‑system
* Samverka med IT‑funktion, SOC och externa leverantörer
* Genomföra rotorsaksanalyser och identifiera förebyggande åtgärder


**Styrning, dokumentation och samverkan**
* Upprätta och underhålla teknisk dokumentation, rutiner och riktlinjer för IT/OT‑drift och säkerhet
* Fungera som teknisk rådgivare till verksamhets‑ och IT‑ledning
* Säkerställa att lösningar är i linje med målarkitektur, säkerhetskrav och långsiktiga utvecklingsplaner
* Bidra till struktur, transparens och kvalitet i samverkan med interna och externa intressenter


**Vi söker**
 Du är en erfaren IT/OT‑specialist som trivs i gränslandet mellan teknik, säkerhet och verksamhet. Du har ett starkt säkerhetstänk, är trygg i komplexa miljöer och kan kombinera praktiskt tekniskt arbete med analys, struktur och utveckling.
   

  

 Du har god förmåga att kommunicera tekniska frågor på ett pedagogiskt sätt – både med tekniska specialister och med verksamhets‑ och IT‑ledning.
   

  

**Kompetenskrav**
* Flera års erfarenhet av IT/OT‑miljöer, industriell automation eller OT‑system
* God förståelse för SCADA, PLC, industriella nätverk och protokoll (t.ex. Modbus, OPC, Profinet)
* Erfarenhet av felsökning i komplexa OT‑ och automationsmiljöer
* Erfarenhet av arbete med IT/OT‑ och cybersäkerhet
* God administrativ förmåga och vana vid dokumentation
* B‑körkort


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet av Siemens‑miljöer (PCS 7, TIA Portal, S7, WinCC eller motsvarande)
* Certifieringar inom OT/ICS‑säkerhet (t.ex. ISA/IEC 62443, GICSP, CISSP)
* Erfarenhet från energi‑, process‑, petro‑ eller annan säkerhetskritisk industri
* Kunskap om relevanta regelverk såsom säkerhetsskyddslagstiftning, LBE, Seveso och NIS2


**Vi erbjuder**
 Hos oss arbetar du i en samhällsviktig och säkerhetsklassad verksamhet där din kompetens gör verklig skillnad. Du får en central roll med stort ansvar, hög teknisk nivå och möjlighet att påverka både den dagliga driften och den långsiktiga utvecklingen av våra IT/OT‑miljöer.
   

  

 Vill du bidra till säkra, robusta och framtidssäkra IT/OT‑lösningar inom OKQ8? Välkommen med din ansökan.
   

  

**Övrig information**
 Har du frågor om rekryteringsprocessen vänligen kontakta Talent Partner, Nabila Ur-Rehman (
   

  

***Vi tar inte emot ansökningar via mail.***
**Säkerhetsprövning genomförs innan anställning. Depåområdet är rökfritt.**
**Placeringsort:** 
 Stockholm/Malmö
   

  

**Tillträde:** 
 Enligt överenskommelse.
   

  

**Anställningsform:** 
 Tillsvidareanställning med sex månaders provanställning
   

  

 Inför denna roll kommer en
 **säkerhetsprövning** 
 att genomföras i enlighet med gällande lagstiftning. Tjänsten är placerad i
 **befattning med säkerhetsnivå 3** 
 , vilket innebär att godkänd säkerhetsprövning samt medborgarskap är ett krav för anställning.
   

  

**Välkommen med din ansökan!**

title: Account Executive Nordic region
description:
**About Toka**
 Toka provides advanced cyber and intelligence solutions to government, law enforcement, and national security agencies worldwide. Our mission is to empower those who protect their nations with the tools to combat evolving digital threats and safeguard critical infrastructure.
   

  

**Position Overview**
 We are looking for a
 **high-impact Account Executive** 
 to lead Toka’s expansion across the Nordic region, with a focus on
 **Sweden and Norway** 
 .
   

  

 This is a unique role requiring a
 **trusted insider profile** 
 - someone who understands the
 **local government, intelligence, and national security ecosystem from within** 
 , and can translate that experience into meaningful commercial success.
   

  

 The ideal candidate is a
 **true “hunter” with strong patriotic drive** 
 , who has either worked within
 **federal agencies, intelligence organizations, or closely alongside them** 
 , and is now leveraging that background to drive strategic sales.
   

  

**This is not a standard sales role.**
 We are looking for someone who has
 **been inside the system** 
 and knows how it really works.
   

  

 Someone who understands
 **national security, intelligence environments, and government decision-making** 
 not from the outside… but from experience.
   

  

**Who You Are**
* You’ve worked within federal agencies, intelligence organizations, or closely alongside them
* You understand the mission, the urgency, and the responsibility of protecting your country
* You are deeply connected, you know the people, the structure, and how decisions actually get made
* And today you are a top-performing salesperson, or ready to become one
* If you’re a well-connected insider with a sales mindset - this is where you can have real impact.
* This role is for true operators turned hunters.


**What You’ll Do**
* Own and build Toka’s presence across the Nordic region and additional European countries
* Open doors that others simply can’t
* Drive and close complex, high-trust deals in intelligence and government environments
* Operate independently in a market where credibility is everything


 Requirements:
   

  

* Native-level fluency in Swedish or Norwegian + strong English
* Must be based in Sweden or Norway
* Proven experience in B2G / government sales, ideally in national security domains. a top-tier sales performer who can operate independently and open doors others cannot
* Strong track record of closing complex, high-value deals
* Deep familiarity with:
* Government / federal structures
* Intelligence or security agencies
* Background working in or closely with government / intelligence organizations (strong advantage)
* Strong network within relevant agencies - a credible insider, not just someone who sells into the market, but someone who has been part of it
* Ability to obtain and maintain local security clearance
* Willingness to travel across the region.


 Advantages:
   

  

* Experience in cybersecurity / intelligence technologies
* Experience working with resellers, partners, or government frameworks
* Background combining operational + commercial experience

title: Technology & Operations - System Consultant
description:
**Who we’re looking for!**
 We’re excited to announce an opportunity for a System Consultant! We are now looking for analytical System Consultants who wants to join our group of highly skilled and motivated employees within banking, finance and IT.
   

  

 As a
 **System Consultant** 
 you will have a great career opportunity and a chance to develop your skills and competence within the FinTech area. We offer our employees great opportunities for personal growth and development, and we acknowledge the importance of a positive and dynamic company culture. We are looking for a person that can work in collaboration with our customers to offer excellent service and you are an important part of our customer on boarding. You enjoy teamwork and collaboration and are good at combining your adoption to different environment without losing your critical thinking. A person who would enjoy a journey from traditional data extracting to designing specific datasets for our customers.
   

  

**What does the role look like?**
* Data Collection and Customer integration: Gathering and analyze data from various sources, such as databases, APIs, and external providers, and integrating it into a unified system. Develop integration layers and perform data validation according to set methods and data analysis tools. Scripting data formats for the unified system and monitor and troubleshoot data-related issues and provide timely resolutions and develop and create Power BI reports.
* Data Storage and Management: Ensure efficient storage and retrieval of data, data aggregation, management and storage. Tuning and performance handling of customer data into the unified system
* Data Security and Compliance: Ensure data security and compliance with relevant regulations and standards.
* Data Pipeline Development: Building and maintaining data pipelines that automate the flows, optimizing database performance and ensure data integrity. Ensuring data quality by cleaning and preprocessing data to remove errors and inconsistencies


**Your profile**
 To succeed in the role as a System Consultant, we think that you have great analytical skills and a thrive to work with complex systems. You enjoy working with improvements and dares to suggest changes. If you also understand the commercial drivers within banking and finance, we believe that you have very good opportunities to succeed in the role as a System Consultant. All our solutions are based on Microsoft platforms, with SQL Server as the basis for our development. We enjoy working with new and exciting solutions in Banking and Finance, and we want you to feel the same!
   

  

**Succeeding the Banqsoft way – Employee DNA**
**Curiosity:** 
 We embrace the 'Why?’ It’s the spark that ignites learning, innovation, and progress.
   

  

**Collaboration:** 
 Team players with diverse perspectives have more fun building together
   

  

**Competence:** 
 We're hungry for more! Ever ready for new skills and always seeking to learn.
   

  

**Customer Focus:** 
 We're dedicated to enabling our customers' success. We deliver the benefits of technology to make a difference in society, business, and everyday life.
   

  

**Are we a great match?**
* You enjoy working in a hybrid international environment and look forward to setting the way forward in the BA area with us.
* You are fluent in English with effective communication skills, self-organized and work well both independently as well as in a team.
* At least 2-4 years’ experience of system development and/or data migration
* High expertise in SQL and basic knowledge of C#
* Very comfortable with customer contact and dialogue
* Analytical and structured
* Proactive and driven.
* You have broad experience with agile way of working.
* Strong alignment with our Employee DNA.


 Take the opportunity to join a small effective team, with an opportunity to develop within the support area. If you are a people person and believe this role aligns with your career aspirations, we would very much like to hear from you!
 *Please, send your CV in English.*

title: Virtual Desktop Engineer
description:
*Vill du arbeta med virtuella arbetsplatser och vara med och utveckla en plattform som används för åtkomst till verksamhetskritiska system? Hos Bankgirot får du möjlighet att ta ett stort tekniskt ansvar i en miljö där kvalitet, säkerhet och långsiktig stabilitet står i fokus.*
 På Bankgirot har vi gjort ett aktivt val: att ta ansvar för något större än oss själva. Vi är en samhällsviktig aktör som sedan 1959 har sett till att Sveriges betalsystem fungerar – varje dag, i alla lägen. Vi befinner oss i en transformation där vi utvecklar svensk betalinfrastruktur anpassad till internationell standard, samtidigt som vi förvaltar och säkrar driften av dagens betalsystem.
   

  

 Nu söker vi en Virtual Desktop Engineer som vill ta ett tekniskt ägarskap för vår virtuella klientmiljö och vara med och utveckla området framåt.
   

  

**Hos oss får du:**
* Arbeta med en affärskritisk plattform
* Vara del av Bankgirots större tekniska transformation där intern kapacitet byggs upp
* Kombinera tekniskt djup med påverkan, förbättringsarbete och långsiktig utveckling
* Tillhöra en arbetsplats där du ses, hörs och där din kompetens gör skillnad


**Om rollen**
 Rollen är bred och kombinerar tekniskt specialistarbete, koordinering och arbete i en beställarkontext. Du blir teknisk ägare för den virtuella desktopmiljön och arbetar nära både interna team och extern leverantör för att säkerställa att plattformen utvecklas, fungerar stabilt och möter verksamhetens behov. Miljön är idag Citrix-baserad och används av flera externa leverantörer som behöver åtkomst till Bankgirots system.
   

  

 I rollen ingår att:
   

  

  

* Driva tekniska förbättringar och förändringar inom den virtuella desktopmiljön
* Kravställa och ta fram lösningsförslag tillsammans med leverantör och interna intressenter
* Arbeta med paketering, patchning och vidareutveckling av applikationer
* Delta i test, implementation och kvalitetssäkring av förändringar
* Följa upp incidents-, problem- och change-ärenden kopplat till plattformen
* Bidra till stärkta processer, proaktiv livscykelhantering och teknisk roadmap


 Du behöver ha tillräcklig teknisk höjd för att förstå lösningar, ställa krav och säkerställa kvalitet i arbetet.
   

  

**Vi vill att du**
 Har en teknisk bakgrund inom Virtual Desktop- eller Workplacemiljöer och trivs i en roll där du får kombinera tekniskt djup med ansvar och samarbete. Du är lösningsorienterad, strukturerad och tycker om att arbeta i en miljö där du får påverka och skapa långsiktig struktur.
   

  

 För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du har:
   

  

  

* Erfarenhet av Citrix, gärna med fokus på förvaltning och vidareutveckling av platformen
* Erfarenhet av Windows-administration samt grundläggande förståelse för Linux-miljöer
* Erfarenhet av skriptning och automatisering
* God förståelse för ITIL-processer
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta nära användare, leverantörer och interna intressenter


**Så arbetar vi tillsammans:** 
 Hos oss arbetar vi gärna tillsammans på kontoret – det stärker samarbete, lärande och vår gemensamma kultur. Här finns goda möjligheter att utvecklas i yrkesrollen och ta nästa steg över tid. Vi erbjuder också förmåner som gör skillnad i vardagen, som eget gym, generöst friskvårdsbidrag, cykelförmån samt trygga pensions- och försäkringslösningar.
   

  

**Säkerhetsprövning:** 
 För den här rollen genomförs säkerhetsprövning innan anställning i enlighet med Säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) - en naturlig del av vårt ansvar att tillsammans värna tryggheten i Sveriges betalsystem.
   

  

**Anställningsform:** 
 Tillsvidare
   

  

**Tillträde:** 
 Enligt överenskommelse
   

  

**Vill du vara med och skapa framdrift? Då kan du bli en av oss!**
 I den här rekryteringen samarbetar vi med Ants Tech Recruiters. Kontakta gärna Cornelia Eriksson på cornelia.eriksson@ants.se för mer information. Urval sker löpande – välkommen med din ansökan!
   

  

**Om Bankgirot**
 Sedan starten 1959 har vi stått för den tekniska strukturen som binder samman Sveriges banker i vårt nationella betalsystem. Vår historia är rik på innovation, engagemang, och stolthet över vårt samhällsviktiga uppdrag. Genom vår expertkunskap och vår starka kultur, Bankgiroandan, arbetar vi varje dag för att säkerställa att varje transaktion sker sömlöst och effektivt.
   

  

 Tillsammans med våra kunder och samarbetspartners skapar vi resultat och långsiktigt värde som gynnar marknaden, samhället och Bankgirot. Som en förenande kraft gör vi det möjligt att forma en moderniserad och framtidssäkrad svensk betalinfrastruktur. Vi förenar, förvaltar och förnyar betalsverige! Läs mer på www.bankgirot.se
   

  

 Bankgirot är ett svenskt clearinghus och teknikbolag med över 60 års erfarenhet av att leverera finansiell infrastruktur till banker. I samverkan med betalsektorn ser vi till att privatpersoner och företag enkelt kan göra överföringar och betalningar. Bankgirot säkerställer att det nuvarande betalsystemet fungerar felfritt, samtidigt som vi utvecklar framtidssäkrade lösningar. Vi säkrar och utvecklar Sveriges betalningar.
   

  

 Läs mer på www.bankgirot.se

title: Digital Sales and Marketing Analyst
description:
*We are Strawberry. With over 245 hotels, 120 restaurants, 20 spas and more, we create thousands of experiences every day. With urban Comfort Hotel®, warm Quality Hotel™, stylish Clarion Hotel® and cosy Home Hotel and more than 40 unique independent hotels, our guests can pick and choose. Our team of 20,000 passionate individuals from more than 120 countries is what makes us grow! Strawberry is built on our core values: energy, courage and enthusiasm.*




**About the role**
 We are looking for a Digital Sales & Marketing Analyst to join our Commercial Insights & Personalization team. In this role, you will partner closely with Digital Sales and Marketing teams to provide insights on traffic, campaigns, channel performance, and on-site conversion, helping guide decisions on where and how we grow. You will play a key role in understanding what drives digital performance across channels and turning data into clear recommendations that improve commercial outcomes.
   

  





 We are looking for someone who is not only analytical, but also curious, proactive, and confident in challenging ideas - a true sparring partner and enabler to Digital Sales and Marketing teams. This is a hands-on analytical role. You will work directly with data and analysis.
   

  





**What you will do** 



* Analyze digital performance across channels (e.g. SEO, paid media, partnerships, direct traffic)
* Evaluate campaign effectiveness and marketing ROI
* Provide insights on traffic drivers, customer acquisition, and channel contribution
* Support understanding of the digital funnel from traffic to conversion
* Contribute to CRO initiatives by analyzing on-site behavior, identifying conversion drop-offs, and supporting A/B test evaluations
* Contribute to tracking and implementation activities needed by the stakeholders
* Work directly with data (e.g. GA4, datasets) to generate insights
* Translate analysis into clear, actionable commercial recommendations
* Proactively identify trends, opportunities, and risks, besides responding to requests
* Act as a sparring partner and enabler to Digital Sales and Marketing teams by bringing data into planning and decision-making



**What we are looking for** 



* At least 5 years of experience in digital analytics, marketing analytics, or performance marketing
* Experience analyzing campaign performance and marketing ROI
* Strong hands-on experience with web analytics tools (e.g. GA4, Adobe Analytics, similar tools) and SQL or data querying skills
* Proficiency in reporting and dashboarding skills (PowerBI or similar)
* Some exposure to CRO analysis (e.g. funnel analysis, on-site behavior, or A/B test evaluation)
* Ability to turn data into insights and business recommendations
* A curious and proactive mindset - you explore, question, and challenge
* Confidence to engage stakeholders and act as a sparring partner
* Strong communication and storytelling skills



**Nice to have** 



* Understanding of attribution models or media mix
* Experience in e-commerce, hospitality, travel, or digital-first businesses
* Experience with CRO tools (e.g. DynamicYield, Hotjar, Optimizely, or similar)



**Why join us?!**




 Room for great ideas. You’ll join one of the most exciting brands in the Nordics. We offer a fast-paced environment where your ideas actually get implemented. If you have the drive to push our tech stack forward, we have the platform to let you do it. Did we mention…?
 


* We’re a social and friendly team, and you’ll have energetic and caring people all around you, and many opportunities to socialize throughout the year.
* We dream big and aim high - we have big ambitions and are not afraid of taking a bit of risk.
* We have great employee benefits - amazing discounts at our hotels and restaurants, and from external partners.
* As a SuperColleague, you get 4 free hotel stays per year.
* Offices in Stockholm or Oslo, with lunch at a friendly price.
* If you are ready to take on this exciting challenge and contribute to our innovative marketing initiatives, we encourage you to apply!

title: Orbit and Attitude  Control Engineer
description:
**ABOUT THE ROLE** 

  
 





 We are building software that tracks what moves in orbit and flags what matters. You will be working with orbit determination in the intersection between orbital mechanics, mission operations, and intelligence.
 

  
 





  
 





 While you will touch upon many of our projects, your primary work will be to lead the technical work on our LSSA-Pilot project, developing the algorithms, data pipelines, and operational framing that make space situational awareness usable for non-engineers. You will work with our flight dynamicsists, who know the orbital mechanics. Your job is to translate sensor data into orbit knowledge and on to Space Situational Awareness. This role grows naturally toward technical leadership.
 

  
 




  





**WHAT YOU WILL WORK ON** 

  
 



* Orbit determination, object tracking, and proximity analysis algorithms
* Integration of external space object catalogs and data sources
* Conjunction screening, collision avoidance computation, and launch safety analysis
* Defining CONOPS-level requirements: what operational users need to see, when, and why
* Collaboration with research and industry partners in the SSA domain



  





**WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR** 

  
 




**Mid-to-senior candidate, 5–8 years of experience. Operational instinct comes from years in mission rooms; we need seniority here.** 

  
 





  
 



* Experience with how real missions are operated — not just the physics, but the process
* Background in controls engineering, preferably applied to orbital mechanics and flight dynamics
* Ability to bridge the gap between rigorous analysis and what decision-makers need to act on
* Strong programming skills in Python
* Understanding of orbit determination or propagation techniques
* MSc or PhD in control engineering, aerospace engineering, physics, applied mathematics, or equivalent



  





**USEFUL BUT NOT REQUIRED** 

  
 



* Experience with space object catalogs, TLE formats, or conjunction data messages
* Familiarity with CCSDS standards
* Interest in defense applications
* Background in mission control, flight operations, or CONOPS development



  





**REQUIREMENTS** 

  
 



* Fluent in English; Swedish is a plus
* EU or EES citizen



  





**ABOUT VINTERSTELLAR** 

  
 





 Vinterstellar is a Stockholm-based aerospace company doing mission analysis and flight dynamics for satellite operators and space agencies — from GEO telecommunications to Earth observation to deep-space trajectory design. Founded in 2018, we are five people and growing, with multiple funded development projects running and a product evolving into a decision-oriented mission analysis platform for the European market.
 

  
 





  
 





 At Vinterstellar you will have real ownership from day one. Together we work hybrid and have a lot of freedom when it comes to structuring our time and the way we want to work.
 

  
 





  
 




  





**HOW TO APPLY** 

  
 





 Send your CV and a short note about yourself to:
 

  
 





  
 




**Applications:** 

 careers@vinterstellar.se
 

  
 




**Role questions:** 

 Emil Vinterhav, CEO — emil.vinterhav@vinterstellar.se
 

  
 




**Process questions:** 

 Andreas Thorell Berchtold — andreas.thorell@vinterstellar.se
 

  
 





  
 




*Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis. We hire as soon as we find the right person.*

title: Data Engineer
description:
At Qred, we’re building the bank for small businesses. Since launching 10 years ago, we’ve grown from startup to profitable fintech scale-up, now generating over 1 billion SEK in annual revenue and supporting 50,000+ entrepreneurs across Northern Europe. We combine smart technology, real data, and human judgment to make financing simple, fast, and fair. With bold growth plans and strong momentum across multiple markets, we’re now looking for a Data Engineer for the next phase of growth.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Data Engineer at Qred, you will play an essential role in building and improving the foundation of our data lake and warehouse. This role offers an end-to-end view of how data flows through a modern Fintech, giving you the ownership to bridge the gap between technical execution and real-world business impact. You will be on a mission to ensure our data is accessible, reliable, and ready for Scaling.
   

  

 Key responsibilities
   

  

* Build and iterate on automated data pipelines to ensure high-quality data integration from various sources.
* Assist in the management of our data warehouse and lake to maintain reliable storage and processing.
* Translate business requirements into clean, analytics-ready data models in collaboration with our analysts and engineers.
* Write comprehensive tests and maintain clear data lineage to ensure high standards of data quality and governance.
* Deploy infrastructure updates using IaC tools like AWS CDK to maintain a modern, cloud-native environment.


 What we’re looking for
   

  

 We are looking for an ambitious professional with a structured mindset and a strong desire to learn within a fast-paced environment. You should be comfortable taking initiative and driving alignment with your peers to solve technical challenges. You are motivated by the chance to build scalable frameworks and contribute to a high-growth financial platform.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* A few years of experience, or a strong academic and internship background, focused on ETL processes and data pipeline orchestration.
* Foundational knowledge of Python and SQL, with an interest in schema design and dimensional modeling.
* Experience with cloud platforms, ideally AWS, and exposure to data warehousing tools like Redshift or Snowflake.
* Understanding of modern analytics engineering workflows, such as dbt or version control with Git.
* Academic background in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related technical field.


 Why Qred?
   

  

 This is the place to be if you’re looking for a place to grow. Qred is growing fast, and our Qredsters along with it. With a non-bureaucratic organization and delegated responsibilities, we make sure there’s a short path from idea to action. In addition to our great culture, you get to work with the latest cutting-edge techniques, full ownership, and last but not least a bunch of great competent colleagues to learn from!
   

  

 One Last Thing
   

  

 This is a full-time, permanent position based in our headquarters in Stockholm. While we encourage a hybrid setup, we do expect you to be at least four days per week at the office. We review applications on a rolling basis and while the start date is flexible, the right candidate can join us immediately.
   

  

*Qred celebrates diversity and does not discriminate based on ethnicity, religion, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability status, or any other applicable characteristics protected by law.*
 Qred is an international FinTech scale-up that specializes in digital financing solutions for small businesses, with operations in the Nordics, Benelux, Germany and Brazil. We are passionate about helping small businesses thrive and grow, by providing them with business loans and credit cards. Right now we’re in an exciting phase of our journey that focuses on growth through smart product development and technology fueled by international expansion.

title: Business Analyst to Deloitte’s Internal IT Organization
description:
Deloitte is a global leader in Audit & Assurance, Tax & Legal and Consultative Services. With more than 470,000 employees in over 150 countries, we help our clients and our communities solve complex problems and achieve ambitious goals through domain and industry expertise, global reach and alliances with the largest tech providers. What defines Deloitte is our drive to make a meaningful difference. For us, this means long-term development and results for our clients and their companies, ideas and actions that also contribute to positive societal development. It is also about empowering our people and promoting their development.
   

  

  




**Job Description**

 We are now looking for a Business Analyst to join our internal IT organization. In this role, you will drive the analysis, structuring, and documentation of business requirements across diverse IT projects and service improvements within the Nordic region. You will ensure that IT solutions and services align with business objectives and deliver measurable value, while collaborating closely with stakeholders and cross-functional teams. You will translate complex business needs into actionable specifications, validate solutions, and champion continuous service optimization. Your work will bridge business and technology, support strategic objectives, and deliver tangible results for our internal IT organization.
   

  

  





**Key Responsibilities**




 As a Business Analyst, your key responsibilities will include:
   

  

  




* **Requirements Analysis & Structuring** 
 – Lead elicitation, analysis, and documentation of business requirements; facilitate stakeholder workshops; translate business goals into clear, prioritized functional and non-functional requirements
* **Solution Specification & Translation** 
 – Convert business requirements into detailed specifications, user stories, and acceptance criteria; collaborate with technical teams on feasibility and architectural alignment
* **Validation & Quality Assurance** 
 – Define acceptance criteria; lead or participate in testing and user acceptance validation; ensure solutions deliver expected business value
* **Process & Service Optimization** 
 – Identify and drive process improvements and automation opportunities; analyze workflows and contribute to post-implementation reviews
* **Governance & Documentation** 
 – Maintain comprehensive documentation aligned with Nordic IT governance standards; ensure traceability between requirements and delivered functionality


 You will work collaboratively with Business Relationship Managers, IT Project Managers, Solution Architects, and domain specialists to ensure that IT solutions are not only technically sound but also strategically aligned with business objectives. Your role will be instrumental in driving continuous service optimization and ensuring that every IT initiative delivers measurable value to the organization.
   

  

  

**Qualifications**

 We are looking for candidates who have:
   

  

  




* Bachelor's degree
* 3-5 years of experience in business analysis or requirements management within complex IT organizations
* Strong skills in requirements elicitation, analysis, and documentation
* Ability to translate business needs into structured, actionable solution inputs
* Analytical thinking and problem-solving abilities
* Knowledge of IT service environments and delivery lifecycles
* Experience with validation, quality assurance, and user acceptance processes
* Excellent communication, facilitation, and stakeholder engagement skills
* Experience managing change initiatives and process improvements
* Comfort collaborating across borders and managing diverse cultures in the Nordic region
* Professional English proficiency; Swedish is a bonus
* Valid work permit in Sweden


**Additional Information**

**What We Offer**




 As part of Deloitte, you gain access to the world’s largest consulting network with colleagues around the globe that you can leverage to develop yourself, our clients, and our business. You will work on exciting, complex projects at both global and Nordic levels, in a team that always values your perspective and is at the forefront of digitalization. We place great emphasis on offering you opportunities to drive your personal development through practical experience, a personal coach who supports you in your career, and continuous feedback from experienced colleagues. You have the opportunity to work in a company that helps our clients on their journey toward a more sustainable organization, while we work purposefully toward our own ambitions in climate, environment, and social responsibility. We see value in our employees having diverse experiences, which promotes innovation and contributes to multiple perspectives.
   

  

  





**How to Apply**




 You apply online. Your application should consist of:
   

  

  




* CV
* A short motivation for why you are interested in the role


**Please submit your application as soon as possible, as we work with ongoing selection.**

 At Deloitte, we value different skills, perspectives, and experiences, as it enables us to effectively solve complex challenges for our clients. We encourage you to apply for the position if you believe your skills can contribute to our team’s success.
   

  

  





*As a qualitative part of Deloitte’s recruitment process, our final candidates undergo a background check, to increase awareness of our future employees, secure the working environment for our employees and meet regulatory requirements. The background check process is carried out in collaboration with ToFindOut. https://tofindout.se/en/background-check/*




**Questions?**




 If you have any questions regarding the role or the application process, please contact Sara Johansson, Manager Talent Acquisition, at sajohansson@deloitte.se.
   

  

  





**We are looking forward to your application!**




**What impact will you make?**




 Every day, your work will make an impact that matters, while you thrive in a dynamic culture of inclusion, collaboration and high performance. We do not just aspire to make solutions. We wish to create an impact that makes a positive and crucial difference for the people around us, our clients and our society. Deloitte is where you’ll find unlimited opportunities to succeed and realize your full potential.

title: Data Engineer (Consultant)
description:
**Come work with us** 




 Netlight strives to be a truly diverse, equitable and inclusive organization. Regardless of who you are, what personality, background, and experience you have, you enrich our culture through your values. Netlight’s purpose is to unleash full potential, realize great careers, and fulfill personal growth. To achieve this, we have a highly engaged network organization, where every employee gets a mentor, delivery coach and personal communities. The key to our continued success is trust and personal responsibility, diverse experiences, challenging opportunities and developing from personal values. Every Netlighter is an active part of building and shaping this culture, which leads to a clear correlation between personal growth and the growth of Netlight.
 



  





**About us** 




 Netlight provides a full range of premium IT-consulting services at the forefront of the digital industry and stands out for its product- and technology-independent expertise in a wide range of industries and clients. We are a network organization of more than 2 000 role models making aspiring digital leaders successful in their business-critical IT projects. Netlight has been awarded several times as top employer, as well as for growth, continued profitability and engagement for diversity, equity and equality within the IT industry. Today we are growing all across Europe, currently with more than 13 active international offices.
 



  





**What does it mean to be a Data Engineer Consultant at Netlight?** 




 It will vary a lot between Netlighters as we, around the right person, will design a role together with you. You will be starting somewhere familiar with your experience, and from there it is your call how your career at Netlight will look, ranging from which clients you will work with, what role you want to take (based on your personal experience, strengths, your personal interest) and how your relationship with your mentor/coach/EDGE networks/social networks will look like. As a consultant at Netlight, you will build the products, systems, and technical solutions of today and tomorrow. This means that our consultants get the opportunity to help build and scale existing and new products and companies and also continuously learn and master a variety of technical tools. At Netlight, we will challenge you. Our clients will challenge you. You will challenge our clients. You will challenge us. We will grow together and unleash the potential in each other.
 



  





 As a Data Engineer Consultant, you will help our clients in projects with roles in Data Engineering. It can be working within Data Engineering, Data Architecture, or project management in terms of working with data or utilizing data to make product decisions to mention a few examples.
 



  





**Minimum Qualifications** 



* Master Degree in Engineering or Technology
* Verbal and written fluency in English
* 0,5-5 years of work experience within the data engineering field related to IT and software products in agile teams



  





**Application** 




 We are always looking for new Netlighters, so feel free to apply if you meet the qualifications. We will get in touch within two weeks if we find that your profile and experiences are a match beyond the qualifications at this time.

title: Senior Backend Engineer
description:
A specialist in identity, secure transactions, and digital services, IN Groupe is the global leader in secure identity and trust services. Every day, our 4,000 employees across 40 countries work to ensure that everyone has access to a reliable and secure identity, both in the physical and digital worlds. With our solutions and our international network of 10 R&D centers, we support governments and businesses in more than 130 countries.
   

  

 Joining IN Groupe means helping to shape the future of the identity and secure transaction market. Become part of our international teams — driven by innovation and proud to design solutions that make life easier and protect personal data for millions of people around the world.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are looking for a Senior backend engineer to join our Stockholm office with strong, hands‑on expertise in modern Java, experienced in building and maintaining legacy Java code as well as setting up new microservice based applications. Brings solid proficiency in CI/CD and Azure DevOps (or comparable platforms), along with practical knowledge of cloud environments, containerization technologies such as Docker and Kubernetes, automated testing practices, and operating services reliably in production.
   

  

**Main Responsibilities**
* Focus on backend development, with responsibility for services, databases, and system integrations.
* Develop, improve, and maintain services with a strong focus on reliability, scalability, and long-term maintainability.
* Select and use technologies based on problem-solving value, not trendiness.
* Ensure that deliveries are on time and secure, always balancing speed with quality.
* Collaborate closely with teammates and stakeholders, enabling fast and sustainable delivery.
* Over time, take a leading role in driving improvements in both technology and ways of working.


**Our Tech Stack (key areas for this role)**
* Java (primary language: deep expertise required)
* SQL
* REST
* Docker, Kubernetes
* Azure dev ops


**About You**
* Highly experienced in backend Java development and proficient with Azure.
* Results-oriented: you deliver what is needed, when it is needed.
* Pragmatic: you enjoy new technology but choose what best solves the current problem while limiting technical debt.
* Humble and grounded: you listen, collaborate, and keep the team's best in mind.
* Independent yet collaborative: you take initiative but thrive in teamwork.
* User-focused: the end user's experience is always your guiding star.


**Qualifications**
* Extensive experience in Java backend development (main requirement).
* Experience with both legacy Java code and modern development practices.
* Solid understanding of deploying in Containers
* Cyber security in general and PKI experience in particular is beneficial.
* Professional proficiency in English.

title: Research Scientist - Music
description:
We are seeking a Research Scientist to join our Artist-First AI Music lab. Our team pioneers and advances state-of-the-art generative technologies for music that create breakthrough experiences for fans and artists. We invent entirely new listening experiences that center and celebrate artists and creatives. All of our products will put artists and songwriters first, through these four principles:
   

  

**Partnerships with record labels, distributors, and music publishers:** 
 We’ll develop new products for artists and fans through upfront agreements, not by asking for forgiveness later.
   

  

**Choice in participation:** 
 We recognize there’s a wide range of views on use of generative music tools within the artistic community. Therefore, artists and rightsholders will choose if and how to participate to ensure the use of AI tools aligns with the values of the people behind the music.
   

  

**Fair compensation and new revenue:** 
 We will build products that create wholly new revenue streams for rightsholders, artists, and songwriters, ensuring they are properly compensated for uses of their work and transparently credited for their contributions.
   

  

**Artist-fan connection:** 
 AI tools we develop will not replace human artistry. They will give artists new ways to be creative and connect with fans. We will leverage our role as the place where more than 700 million people already come to listen to music every month to ensure that generative AI deepens artist-fan connections.
   

  

 For more information, see this press release: https://newsroom.spotify.com/2025-10-16/artist-first-ai-music-spotify-collaboration/
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Conduct ground breaking research in music generation (diffusion, flow matching, or autoregressive models), as well as related domains like ML-based audio processing, music information retrieval, machine learning, and signal processing.
* Run large-scale experiments with access to Spotify’s extensive infrastructure and an audience of more than 700 million monthly active users.
* Create practical applications that harness generative technologies, pushing the boundaries of what’s possible in listening experiences.
* Collaborate as part of a cross-functional team—working closely with scientists, engineers, product managers, designers, user researchers, and analysts—to craft innovative solutions to complex challenges.
* Have a direct impact on Spotify’s products, tools, and services, working on projects that influence the entire organization.
* Engage with the broader research community by publishing your findings, delivering talks, and attending top conferences.


 Who You Are
   

  

* You have a Ph.D. degree in Computer Science, Mathematics, Engineering, or a related field. Previous industry experience is helpful.
* You have experience in one or more of the following fields: generative modeling, machine learning, music information retrieval, speech processing, audio processing, signal processing, probabilistic modeling, computer vision, or related areas.
* You have publications in communities such as ICASSP, ISMIR, INTERSPEECH, ICLR, AAAI, IJCAI, NeurIPS, ICML, CVPR, ECCV, ICCV, or related.
* You have strong coding skills in the following languages/libraries: Python, PyTorch, NumPy.
* You are a creative problem solver who is passionate about building outstanding products that add real value to millions of people.
* You are enthusiastic about learning more about turning research ideas into products operating at scale.
* You can explain complex topics in simple terms, and you enjoy building strong relationships with colleagues and stakeholders.


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! For this role, you can be within the EMEA region as long as we have a work location
* This team operates within the Central European and GMT time zone for collaboration.
* Core working hours are CET 3pm-6pm / EST 9am-12pm.


 Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 Spotify transformed music listening forever when we launched in 2008. Our mission is to unlock the potential of human creativity by giving a million creative artists the opportunity to live off their art and billions of fans the chance to enjoy and be passionate about these creators. Everything we do is driven by our love for music and podcasting. Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: Product Operations Manager
description:
**About Us**
 Legora is on a mission: to redefine how legal work gets done. From the very start we have been very clear about the fact that we are not building a solution for lawyers, we are building it with them, because it is the only way to make sure it gets done the right way; working side-by-side every step of the way.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace empowers legal professionals not just to work faster - but to ask better questions, unlock new insights. Every day, we push the boundaries of legal tech to make complex processes smarter, faster, and more human. From thousands of documents analysed in minutes to intelligent workflows designed in collaboration with leading practices, we’re turning possibility into reality.
   

  

 Today we are trusted by global firms like Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Bird & Bird and Linklaters in over 40 countries, but we have no plans on stopping here. We ship fast, we iterate effectively, and we scale rapidly - not by accident, but by design.
   

  

 When you join Legora, you become part of a team that believes "good enough" isn’t good enough and that the way to win is together, by empowering lawyers to do their best work with technology that truly understands them. If you’re excited by building from first principles, working with exceptional people, and accelerating change in a high-stakes, high-impact domain—then this is the moment and the place.
   

  

**We’re not just shaping the future of legal tech — we’re defining it. Ready to join us in building the intelligent future of law?**
**About The Role**
 As a
 **Product Operations Manager** 
 , you’ll sit at the heart of how Legora scales its product. You’ll help us turn complexity into clarity by solving stakeholder alignment challenges, enabling cross‑functional collaboration at scale, and ensuring our teams can ship high‑quality AI products — fast and smoothly.
   

  

 This is a front‑row role at the edge of our product and release engine. You’ll work closely with Product, Engineering, Design, Marketing, Customer Enablement, and Client Support to ensure launches land smoothly, insights flow back into product decisions, and operational friction never slows us down.
   

  

 You’ll also be hands‑on with AI‑driven problem solving: using modern AI tools, building and defining agents, and designing systems that help teams make better decisions and move faster. If you enjoy connecting dots across teams, designing scalable systems, and being the person who makes complex things work — this role is for you.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing**
* Own product operations at scale: create clarity across fast‑moving teams by defining processes, rituals, and tooling that keep Product, Engineering, and Go‑to‑Market aligned as we grow.
* Be the connective tissue between teams: proactively identify stakeholder misalignment, surface trade‑offs, and drive resolution across Product, Engineering, Marketing, Customer Enablement, and Client Support.
* Operate at the front edge of releases: coordinate complex, multi‑track launches; manage timelines, dependencies, and communications; and ensure every release is impactful, predictable, and well‑understood across the company.
* Solve problems with AI: leverage AI tools and analytics to uncover insights, automate workflows, and build or define agents that help teams scale decision‑making, triage issues, and learn faster from customers.
* Translate signal into action: synthesize data, feedback, and operational insights into clear narratives that shape roadmaps, priorities, and product strategy.
* Drive product excellence: partner with Product to define success metrics, track adoption and product health, and recommend improvements grounded in both qualitative and quantitative insights.
* Design scalable systems: build and continuously improve processes for release management, incident handling, feedback loops, and cross‑functional execution.
* Lead through ambiguity: manage high‑severity incidents and escalations, advocate for tech‑debt reduction, and help teams focus on the highest‑impact problems.


**What We’re Looking For**
* A strong generalist with 2–6 years of experience, ideally with a background in Computer Science, Business, Data, or similar — and a deep interest in product, systems thinking, and how organizations scale.
* Demonstrated ability to manage complex stakeholder landscapes, influence without authority, and drive alignment across multiple teams.
* Comfort working with data and AI‑powered tools: experience with SQL and analytics platforms is a nice to have, but curiosity about using AI agents and automation to solve operational problems is a must have.
* A builder’s mindset: you enjoy designing processes from scratch, iterating quickly, and improving systems over time.
* Clear, confident communicator who can turn messy inputs into structured plans, decisions, and narratives.
* Thrives in ambiguity, moves fast with a bias for action, and cares deeply about making teams and products more effective.


**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: Cybersecurity Consultant
description:

 Netlight strives to be a truly diverse, equitable and inclusive organization. Regardless of who you are, what personality, background, and experience you have, you enrich our culture through your values.  Netlight provides a full range of premium IT-consulting services at the forefront of the digital industry and stands out for its product- and technology-independent expertise in a wide range of industries and clients.  You will build the products, systems and technical solutions of today and tomorrow. This means that our consultants get the opportunity to help build and scale existing and new products and companies and also continuously learn and master a variety of technical tools. At Netlight, we will challenge you. Our clients will challenge you. You will challenge our clients. You will challenge us. We will grow together and unleash the potential in each other.
 



  





 Specifically as a Cybersecurity Consultant, you will collaborate with other Netlighters and clients in Stockholm and across offices. It can be working as Security Engineer, Information Security Engineer, Security Architect, Security Analyst, Solution Engineering, Site Reliability Engineer, DevSecOps Engineer, Security Lead, Security Manager, Security Officer, Secure Cloud Architect, it can be working in a backend role building a secure system, it can be working as part of a security advisory team, Project Manager of building a secure system, or being part of a Technical Due Diligence project bringing the security perspectives, to give some examples. In parallel to this, you will be an important part of improving our Cybersecurity work and being an important part of our passionate Cybersecurity community at Netlight.
 



  





**Minimum Qualifications** 



* Master Degree in Engineering or Technology
* Verbal and written fluency in English is required, and meriting with Swedish/Danish/Norwegian
* 0,5-5 years of work experience with Cybersecurity, Information Security or building secure systems
* International mindset, as you will collaborate with Netlighters and clients across offices.



  





**Application** 




 We are always looking for new Netlighters, so feel free to apply if you meet the qualifications. We try to get in touch within two weeks
 
 if
 
 we find that your profile and experiences are a match beyond the qualifications at this time.

title: Senior M365 Generalist & Information Security Specialist
description:
Vill du arbeta med säkerhet, Microsoft 365 och leda tekniska implementationer i ett team där man har riktigt roligt tillsammans på jobbet? Du blir en nyckelspelare i att utveckla och förvalta våra kunders digitala arbetsplats med Microsoft 365 som plattform.
   

  

 På Accigo får du möjlighet att växa i en kultur som värderar kunskapsdelning, innovation och ett starkt kundfokus. Vi är stolta över att leverera lösningar som inte bara möter, utan överträffar våra kunders förväntningar. Skicka gärna din ansökan redan idag!
   

  

 Vi söker dig
   

  

 Med tidigare erfarenhet i rollen som konsult, samt gedigen erfarenhet av Microsoft 365-plattformen. För att bli framgångsrik hos oss behöver du vara tekniskt duktig på Microsoft 365 och de ingående tjänsterna. Du ska också vara en kommunikativ person som har lätt att leda dig själv, kunden och andra kollegor i stora som små åtaganden.
   

  

 Du behöver ha erfarenhet inom projektledning och att leda tekniska implementationer inom högt reglerade branscher, exempelvis har du jobbat med kunder inom bank & finans tidigare. Då du själv är arkitekten i många införanden, behöver du vara både teknisk duktig men även ha en kommunikativ förmåga för att kunna leda kunden och projektet. Att hålla i säljmöten, leda kravanalys och workshops är din vardag där du känner dig riktigt bekväm.
   

  

 Du kommer också ha yngre kollegor med dig så att kunna delegera ansvar och ge stöd och coaching är viktigt.
   

  

**Vad du får göra hos oss**
 På Accigo kommer du att få planera, driva och implementera Microsoft 365-projekt och vara med och bygga lösningar på Microsoft 365-plattformen. Detta innefattar allt från att hjälpa företag bli digitala arbetsplatser, bidra i utrullning av enskilda applikationer och större införanden.
   

  

 Exempel: Digital transformation och design av Microsoft 365, införande av klassning och skydd, GAP-analyser, AI-readiness, Second opinion, NIS2, implementation av robust identitetsstyrning och avancerade dokumenthanteringslösningar.
   

  

**Vi söker dig som har**
 3-5 års praktisk erfarenhet av arbete med Microsoft 365, inklusive
   

  

* Teams, Sharepoint, OneDrive, Exchange Online, Purview, Intune
* Identitetshantering med Entra ID
* Grundläggande säkerhetsfunktioner i Microsoft 365 Erfarenhet av att arbeta verksamhetsnära och stötta organisationer i användning och nyttjande av Microsoft 365.


 Förståelser för informationssäkerhet kopplat till Microsoft 365, exempelvis:
   

  

* Säkerhetsprinciper enligt Zero-Trust
* Grundläggande dataskydd och identitetsskydd
* Kunskap om klassning och skydd
* Djup erfarenhet av projektledning och kravanalys
* Erfarenhet av att driva eller stötta i förändringsledning kopplat till Microsoft 365
* Förmåga att kommunicera med både IT-tekniker, Verksamhet och Ledning.


**Meriterande för tjänsten**
* Det är starkt meriterande om du kan och är van att jobba med M365 E5.
* Erfarenhet av avancerade säkerhetslösningar i Microsoft 365 såsom Defender, Conditional Access eller Purview.
* Certifieringar inom Microsoft 365; Exempelvis MS-500,SC-300,SC-400/1
* Förståelse för AI och hur moderna verktyg påverkar den digitala arbetsplatsen.
* Bekväm att arbeta i CLI
* Praktisk erfarenhet, kunskap & förståelse för regulatoriska ramverk(NIS2, DORA, GDPR, ISO27001, AI Act, NPAP)
* Riskbedömningar & GAP analyser


**Vårt team**
 I Security & Compliance-teamet arbetar vi med Microsoft 365, informationssäkerhet och design av säkra miljöer, teamet har en stor spännvidd, där många olika kompetenser bidrar till en dynamisk och härlig mix – från de som djupdyker i tekniken, till kollegor som exempelvis driver compliance-utredningar med våra kunder som har höga informationssäkerhetskrav.
   

  

 Flera aktiviteter gör vi ute hos kund och vissa gör vi från vårt kontor.
   

  

 Vi fokuserar mycket på att bygga teamkänsla, där vi både gör olika aktiviteter ihop och pratar om det som behöver pratas om. I vårt team skapar vi förutsättningar för oss konsulter att växa, att styra över oss själva och vår egen tid. På jobbet förutsätter vi att ”vill du det – så händer det”!
   

  

 Kompensation och förmåner
   

  

 Vår förmånspolicy är utvecklad för att möta både dina professionella och personliga behov. I vårt omfattande förmånspaket ingår friskvårdsbidrag, tjänstepension och frivillig sjukvårdsförsäkring. Vår ersättningsmodell består av en konkurrenskraftig fast del och en rörlig del som ger dig möjlighet att påverka din lön baserat på din prestation och ambition. Vi erbjuder både professionell och personlig utveckling.
   

  

**Nyfiken?** 
 Vi svarar gärna på frågor, eller berättar mer om oss över en kaffe - du kan enkelt komma i kontakt med oss: Amir.hosseini@accigo.se
   

  

 Accigo är ett konsultbolag som hjälper företag och organisationer med digital affärs- och verksamhetsutveckling med tekniken som möjliggörare. För oss handlar digitalisering till 90% om människor och 10% om teknik. Det är när samspelet mellan människa och teknik fungerar som digitaliseringens fulla styrka visar sig.
   

  

 För många handlar digitalisering mest om teknik. För oss är det så otroligt mycket större. Digitalisering kan få både människor och organisationer att våga sikta högre, följa sina drömmar och öppna dörrar som de inte ens visste fanns. Och när man ser igenom tekniken och börjar skönja vilka möjligheter som gömmer sig där bakom. Då ser man att framtiden kan vara en fantastisk plats – fylld av mänsklig energi och värme – och digitalisering är inget annat än vår superkraft för att komma dit.

title: People Tech Manager
description:
**About Us**
 Legora is on a mission: to redefine how legal work gets done. From the very start we have been very clear about the fact that we are not building a solution for lawyers, we are building it with them, because it is the only way to make sure it gets done the right way; working side-by-side every step of the way.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace empowers legal professionals not just to work faster - but to ask better questions, unlock new insights. Every day, we push the boundaries of legal tech to make complex processes smarter, faster, and more human. From thousands of documents analysed in minutes to intelligent workflows designed in collaboration with leading practices, we’re turning possibility into reality.
   

  

 Today we are trusted by global firms like Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Bird & Bird and Linklaters in over 40 countries, but we have no plans on stopping here. We ship fast, we iterate effectively, and we scale rapidly - not by accident, but by design.
   

  

 When you join Legora, you become part of a team that believes "good enough" isn’t good enough and that the way to win is together, by empowering lawyers to do their best work with technology that truly understands them. If you’re excited by building from first principles, working with exceptional people, and accelerating change in a high-stakes, high-impact domain—then this is the moment and the place.
   

  

**We’re not just shaping the future of legal tech — we’re defining it. Ready to join us in building the intelligent future of law?**
**The Role**
 As our People Tech Manager, you’ll own the design, implementation, and scaling of our HR systems, tools, and data infrastructure that power our people operations as we grow 3× over the next 10 months.
   

  

 Reporting to and working closely with the People Tech Lead, you’ll work hands-on across our HR tech stack while partnering closely with People Enablement, IT, Finance, Legal, and business leaders.
   

  

**Your mission:** 
 ensure our people infrastructure scales ahead of the company, not behind it.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
**System Management & Optimisation**
* Own, manage and improve our people technology stack, including HRIS, ATS, document management systems, and the cloud-based integrations that connect them.
* Configure systems for scalability, security, and regulatory compliance, proactively anticipating future requirements.
* Maintain data accuracy, system reliability, and technical documentation to ensure a single source of truth for people data.


**Automation & Integration**
* Design and build integrations that create seamless, reliable data flows between systems.
* Identify manual, repetitive processes across the employee lifecycle and automate them.
* Build custom solutions where off-the-shelf tools fall short.


**Process Design & Enablement**
* Translate complex HR operations and regulatory requirements into scalable, system-driven solutions that embed compliance by design while increasing operational velocity and efficiency.
* Enable the People Enablement team and managers to use systems confidently and effectively, designing intuitive, user-centric processes that require little to no training—even for non-technical users.
* Design and document scalable processes across the full employee lifecycle, from hire to retire.


**Who You Are**
 You are a systems-oriented builder. When you encounter manual processes, you instinctively think about how they could be automated, standardised, or eliminated.
   

  

 You balance technical execution with long-term thinking. You are comfortable configuring complex HRIS workflows and integrations, preferably code-first solutions (Typescript) while planning for future requirements at a significantly larger scale (1000+ employees and beyond).
   

  

 You approach internal tools with a product mindset. You consider usability, reliability, and adoption across the entire organisation, and you understand when to optimise for robustness versus when to deliver a pragmatic, iterative solution.
   

  

**What We’re Looking For**
* 2-4+ years of experience managing internal technology in high-growth environments.
* Deep, hands-on experience with modern HRIS platforms and the broader HR technology ecosystem.
* Ideally, a strong Typescript foundation to maintain, operate, and evolve cloud-based integrations and event-driven workflows.
* Strong project management skills, with experience delivering multi-system implementations in fast-paced environments.
* Experience with people analytics, data governance, and dashboarding/reporting.
* Comfort making decisions with incomplete information and iterating quickly.


**Why This Role Matters**
 People technology is foundational to how Legora scales. Every system you implement, process you automate, and data structure you design directly shapes organisational speed, data integrity, and regulatory compliance —enabling impact at pace.
   

  

 If you want to build world-class people operations through intelligent systems, automation, and thoughtful technical design—and see the impact of your work immediately and at scale—this role is for you.
   

  

**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

description:

 Legora is on a mission: to redefine how legal work gets done.
