title: Senior Software Tester (embedded systems)
description:
**Senior****Software****Tester****- E****mbedded****systems**
=============================================================

 **Be part of building the future of test automation**


**Overview**
------------

  

Do you want to take a leading role in shaping *how* embedded systems are tested – not just *what* is tested?


At Munters, we develop sustainable and energy‑efficient climate solutions for industrial environments. Our embedded control systems are a critical part of this mission – and now we are looking for a Senior Software Tester for Embedded Systems who wants to be a key driver in our test automation journey.


This is not a “maintain what already exists”-role. You will join us in an early and formative phase of test automation, where our clear ambition is to automate everything that can be automated – from hardware‑near system tests to integration and regression testing.


You will have the opportunity to shape strategy, tools, frameworks and ways of working, and to use your experience to raise both quality and efficiency across the organization. If you enjoy taking ownership, challenging old truths, and driving change – this role is for you.

**What you will do**
--------------------

  

As a Senior Software Tester, you will act as a **technical leader within test and quality for embedded systems**, working closely with software, hardware and product teams.


You will:

* Take **overall ownership of test strategy, test****design****and test automation** for embedded control systems
* Be a driving force in the **transition towards high test automation coverage**, choosing and implementing frameworks, tools and best practices
* Design and execute **advanced system tests**, both manual and automated, including hardware‑near testing
* Build and evolve **test environments, simulators,****stubs****and tooling**
* Advocate for **testability early in the development lifecycle**, influencing architecture and requirements
* Analyze complex system failures and lead root‑cause investigations
* Coach and mentor other testers and developers in testing and automation practices
* Collaborate closely with developers, product management and quality functions to embed quality throughout the lifecycle
* Communicate risks, insights and improvement proposals clearly to stakeholders

You won’t wait to be told what to improve – you will **see opportunities, take initiative, and push the organization forward**.

 **Our****ambition****within****test automation**

  

We are at the beginning of a focused journey where:

* Test automation is a **first**‑**class****citizen**, not an afterthought
* We aim for **maximum automation coverage** where it creates value
* Test is integrated into CI/CD and daily development workflows
* We continuously explore **new technologies**, including **AI**‑**assisted****testing**, to improve speed, coverage and insight

You will have a **real mandate** to influence this journey.

**Who we think you are**
------------------------


You are an experienced tester within embedded systems, but just as importantly, you are a change driver.


You likely have:

* Several years of experience in system testing of embedded systems
* Several years of experience in test automation, e.g. Python, Robot Framework or similar
* Strong understanding of microcontrollers, embedded Linux and communication protocols
* Experience with HIL testing and troubleshooting
* Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and version control
* Experience working in agile/SCRUM environments

It’s a plus if you have experience within industrial or climate control systems, C/C++, IoT/cloud technologies, or electrical systems – but mindset and drive are just as important as the exact background.

**Personal****qualities****we****value**
----------------------------------------

* **Proactive and courageous** – you are not afraid to challenge existing solutions
* **Driven by improvement** – quality, efficiency and technical excellence motivate you
* **Strategic yet****hands**‑**on** – you can define direction and still build things yourself
* **Collaborative and communicative** – you enjoy working across disciplines
* Curious and open‑minded, with an interest in **new tools,****methods****and****AI**‑**based****solutions** that create real value.
**Why****Munters?**
-------------------

* A **real opportunity to influence** architecture, tooling and quality direction
* A role with **both technical leadership and****hands**‑**on****work**
* Products that contribute to a **more sustainable world**
* A collaborative and knowledgeable engineering culture
* A transformation journey where **your experience truly matters**
company_description: Munters is a global leader in climate control solutions for mission-critical processes.

title: Account Manager III - Specialist
description:
Sinch is pioneering the way the world communicates. More than 175,000 businesses — including Google, Uber, Paypal, Visa, Tinder, and many others — rely on Sinch’s Customer Communications Cloud to power engaging customer experiences through mobile messaging, voice, and email.
  

Whether you need to verify users or craft omnichannel campaigns, Sinch makes it easy. Our AI-infused Super Network, APIs, and applications ensure yu can connect with your customers reliably and securely, at every step of their journey.
  

At Sinch we “Dream Big”, “Win Together”, “Keep it simple”, and “Make it Happen”. These values are our foundation!


**About the role**

This role is responsible for architecting and executing the commercial strategy for our customers. You will be the go-to expert for pricing, profitability, and routing optimization within the dynamic telecommunications landscape. This is a role where you will not only master the data but also confidently present your findings in high-stakes client negotiations. You will use data-driven insights to influence key business decisions, protect and grow margins, and build long-term customer value by acting as a trusted analytical partner.


**Key Responsibilities:**

* Provides analytics and strategic recommendations for pricing decisions on complex accounts with a global delivery footprint
* Design, develop, and innovate profitability models to address evolving market dynamics and client needs
* Directly engage with key customers, confidently presenting and defending pricing models, performance analyses, and strategic recommendations in business reviews and negotiations
* Serve as the key analytical partner to the Sales team during major RFP bids and contract renewals, providing the data-backed authority needed to secure favorable terms
* Proactively identify and implement sophisticated pricing and commercial strategies that drive higher sale values, improve conversion rates, and expand margin
* Conduct in-depth sensitivity analyses on input costs and market trends, presenting actionable insights and mitigation strategies
* Data usage enhancement: identify data points that are available but not widely used which can be useful for improving account performance in operational and pricing processes
Demonstrate a strong sense of initiative and the ability to multitask and complete projects timely and accurately  
* 

**About you**

* 3-5 years of experience in pricing, commercial strategy, or a highly analytical role where you directly influenced profitability
* Experience in mobile communications (SMS) is a must
* Proven experience in a client-facing role, with the confidence and polish to present complex data, pricing models, and recommendations directly to key customers
* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent work experience
* Highly organized analytical thinker
* Experience in a role requiring quick and accurate decisions based on data analysis
* Proficiency in using Microsoft Excel and Tableau
* Ability to thrive in a collaborative environment
* Must respect and maintain confidentiality of data

Our corporate language is English, **please submit your application in English** .  



  

At Sinch, we value learning, embrace change, and offer opportunities for personal and professional growth. This position is open exclusively to candidates currently based in Munich, Stockholm, Prague, or Madrid. Applications from other locations will not be considered. Unfortunately, we are not supporting relocation outside the EU at this time.  



  

Applicants must:  



  

* Hold Spanish/German/Swedish/Czech Republic or EU/EEA citizenship.
* Hold a valid work permit for your country of residence.

  

**Our hiring process**  

We are committed to ensuring a recruitment process that is fair, objective, consistent, and inclusive. Our approach includes structured, competency-based interviews designed to evaluate your skills, experience, and qualifications relevant to the role. At times, we may include a data-driven assessment to enhance our hiring success and identify candidates likely to excel.  



  

We believe in a two-way process and encourage you to ask questions throughout the journey. If this role isn't what you're looking for, please explore the other opportunities listed on our career page: https://www.sinch.com/careers/. No matter who you are, we hope you find an exciting path forward - hopefully with us!
company_description: We help companies to communicate with customers via messaging, voice and video using multiple channels. Simplifying life by bringing all people and businesses together using technology is our purpose.

title: Principal Consultant/ Industry Principal
description:
Role - Principal Consultant/SAP LeanIX, Signavio S/4HANA
  
Technology – SAP LeanIX, Signavio S/4HANA
  
Location – Sweden
  
Job Description
  
Today, the corporate landscape is dynamic and the world ahead is full of possibilities! None of the amazing things we do at Infosys would be possible without an equally amazing culture, the environment where ideas can flourish and where you are empowered to move forward as far as your ideas will take you.
  
  

At Infosys, we assure that your career will never stand still, we will inspire you to build what’s next and we will navigate further together. Our journey of learnability, values and trusted relationships with our clients continue to be the cornerstones of our organization and these values are upheld only because of our people.
  
Your role
  
Infosys is seeking a highly experienced and dynamic Principal Consultant – SAP to join our growing SAP practice. This role demands deep expertise in SAP technologies, strong leadership capabilities, and a proven track record of delivering complex transformation programs. As a Principal Consultant, you will lead solution architecture, client engagements, and delivery excellence across SAP S/4HANA projects.
  
  

**Key Responsibilities:**  

* Lead SAP solutions across multiple end-to-end implementations and transformation programs.
* Drive client engagements from Phase 0 through execution, including Greenfield, Brownfield, and Hybrid S/4HANA projects.
* Collaborate with client stakeholders (Business and IT) to define roadmaps, assess readiness, and build transformation strategies..
* Architect the Integrated Ecosystem: Build and maintain the end-to-end integration between LeanIX, Signavio, and SAP Cloud ALM (CALM) to create a seamless "Single Source of Truth" for our S/4HANA journey.
* Operationalize Business Architecture: Map business processes in Signavio directly to IT landscapes in LeanIX, ensuring every process change is backed by architectural transparency.
* Drive Implementation Excellence: Lead the "Clean Core" strategy by orchestrating project requirements, testing, and deployments within SAP CALM.
* Maximize Digital Adoption: Design and deploy WalkMe DAP solutions to simplify complex workflows and ensure 100% user proficiency across the SAP landscape.
* Innovate the Toolchain: Continuously optimize the automation and data flow between these platforms to eliminate manual overhead in our transformation office.
* Represent Infosys in client meetings with professionalism and strong interpersonal communication.
* Stay current with SAP innovations and contribute to internal knowledge sharing.


**Skill Required:**  

* Experience in SAP S/4HANA, Business AI, LeanIX, Signavio, Cloud ALM
* Hands-on SAP consulting experience.
* Minimum of 4 full lifecycle SAP project implementations.
* Experience in leading teams in SAP projects.
* Exposure to at least two types of S/4HANA projects: Greenfield, Brownfield, or Hybrid.
* Experience in transformation preparation or Phase 0 activities.
* Proficiency in SAP toolchain usage or administration.
* Valid SAP certification in relevant skill areas.
* Strong client-facing skills with the ability to engage middle management effectively.
* Proven ability to build solution proposals and estimate efforts accurately.
* Demonstrated flexibility, team spirit, and a results-driven mindset.


**Preferred Qualifications:**  

* Exposure to multiple SAP modules or skill areas within the SAP product portfolio.
* Publications or thought leadership in SAP or industry-specific domains.


About Infosys
  
Infosys is a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting. We enable clients in 56 countries to navigate their digital transformation. With over three decades of experience in managing the systems and workings of global enterprises, we expertly steer our clients through the many next of their digital journey. We do it by enabling the enterprise with an AI-powered core that helps prioritize the execution of change. We also empower the business with agile digital at scale to deliver unprecedented levels of performance and customer delight. Our always-on learning agenda drives their continuous improvement through building and transferring digital skills, expertise and ideas from our innovation ecosystem.
  
Visit www.infosys.com to see how Infosys can help your enterprise navigate your next.
  
All aspects of the hiring process and employment at Infosys are based on merit, competence and performance. We are committed to embracing diversity and creating an inclusive environment for all employees. Infosys is proud to be an equal opportunity employer.
company_description: Infosys is a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting. We enable clients in 59 countries to navigate their digital transformation.

title: Digital Product Marketer
description:
Proposales™ is the modern proposal and e-signature platform for Groups & Event teams, trusted by more than 1,000 hotels across Europe and beyond.
  
Hotels use Proposales™ to respond to incoming requests within minutes, boost conversions to 75 percent and save up to 1,000 hours per year per hotel. Our deep integrations with leading PMS, EMS and CRM platforms, including Oracle OPERA Cloud, Mews, OSEM, Event Temple, Salesforce and SuperOffice, are a key part of our competitive advantage
  
We’re now looking for a Digital Product Marketer who can own the marketing strategy while staying hands-on with execution.
  
**Please note:** this role is fully on-site (5 days/week) in Stockholm.
  
Role Overview
  
This is a hybrid strategic and operational marketing role. You will be responsible for shaping Proposales’ marketing direction while executing initiatives that drive pipeline, product adoption as well as brand positioning.
  
You will work closely with sales, product and leadership to develop messaging, campaigns and growth strategies that accelerate customer acquisition.
  
This role is ideal for someone who has experience in B2B SaaS marketing and product marketing and wants to step into a future CMO track.
  
This role is fully on site.
  
Key Responsibilities
  
Product Marketing & Positioning Own product positioning, messaging and differentiation. Translate features into clear customer value and lead launches of new features and updates. Develop sales enablement materials (pitch decks, demos, battlecards).
  
Growth & Demand Generation Plan and execute strategies to drive qualified pipeline. Own and optimize digital channels (website, SEO, paid, LinkedIn, marketing automation) and improve conversion across the full funnel.
  
Brand & Content Shape Proposales’ category narrative and thought leadership. Create high-impact content (case studies, blogs, product explainers, sales collateral) and strengthen brand presence in the B2B SaaS space.
  
Sales Collaboration Partner closely with sales to improve lead quality, support account-based initiatives, and aligning campaigns with targets.
  
Analytics & Optimization Track performance, optimize campaigns and manage key KPIs. Which includes pipeline contribution, CAC, conversion rates and marketing-sourced revenue.
  
Marketing Leadership Define the marketing roadmap, manage external partners, in addition to contributing to the long-term strategy and go-to-market direction.
  
Requirements
  
Experience
  
  

3+ years of experience in B2B SaaS marketing
  
  

Strong background in product marketing or growth marketing
  
  

Experience working closely with sales teams
  
  

Proven ability to drive pipeline and growth
  
  

Skills
  
  

Strong messaging and positioning skills
  
  

Experience with digital marketing tools (HubSpot, CRM, analytics)
  
  

Ability to translate product features into customer value
  
  

Data-driven mindset
  
  

Excellent communication and storytelling skills
  
  

Bonus
  
  

Experience in sales tech / proposal software / revenue tools
  
  

Experience in early-stage or scale-up SaaS
  
  

Experience building marketing functions from scratch

title: Nattreceptionister med erfarenhet från Opera, MEWS & HMS
description:
**Om jobbet:** Nattreceptionist på varierande arbetsplatser i Stockholm. Vi bemannar Stockholms mest attraktiva hotell med alltifrån enstaka pass till längre uppdrag. Arbeta när det passar dig och på den arbetsplats du trivs bäst. Arbetet är nattetid och varierar om du arbetar själv på hotellet eller med kollegor. Tjänsten passar dig som vill kombinera med studier eller annat arbete.
  
Vem är du? Är du en nattuggla som trivs bäst när alla andra sover? Arbetar du kanske redan på ett hotell som nattreceptionist men vill arbeta extra under din lediga vecka?
  
Vi söker dig som har minst 1 års erfarenhet från hotellreception och känner dig trygg med något av följande bokningssystem: Opera, Opera Cloud, Mews, Hotsoft, HMS. Som person ser vi att du är flexibel, serviceminded och ordningsam. Du behöver kunna kommunicera obehindrat på engelska i tal och skrift. Varför ska du jobba på RA Hospitality? Att jobba hos oss är framförallt väldigt roligt! Vem vill inte ha hundratals härliga kollegor och möjlighet att jobba på massor av spännande arbetsplatser?
  
Erfarenhet - Hos oss får du snabbt erfarenheter som annars tar flera år att uppnå. Jobba på allt från en till 30 olika arbetsplatser, hos oss finns alla möjligheter! Lär känna nya branschkollegor och skaffa dig ett brett nätverk i branschen!
  
Flexibelt schema - Jobba eller vara ledig? Hos oss får du sms-förfrågningar och väljer själv hur mycket, när och vart du vill jobba. Vi erbjuder både heltid, deltid och extraanställningar!
  
Personalaktiviteter - Få vänner för livet! Vi hittar på massa kul tillsammans för att stärka gemenskapen och visa vår uppskattning.
  
️‍ ️ Friskvård och förmåner – Vi erbjuder alla våra anställda oavsett anställningsgrad rabatterade träningskort. Vi erbjuder även rabatt på hotellvistelser i hela Norden!
  
Utbildning - Flera gånger per år anordnar vi utbildningar på olika nivåer. Vi har också ett samarbete med externa parter, bl.a. Restaurangakademien.
  
Trygga och bra villkor med kollektivavtal - Hos oss ingår allt, försäkring, pension och semesterersättning. Dessutom så får du en konkurrenskraftig lön samt tillägg för obekväma arbetstider.
  
Mer om oss RA Hospitality är Nordens ledande bemanningsföretag inom besöksnäringen. Vi har funnits i över 20 år och har kontor i Stockholm, Göteborg, Malmö och Oslo. Vi bemannar, rekryterar och outsourcar personal till hotellkedjor, stjärnkrogar, företagsrestauranger, kommuner, konferensanläggningar, cateringföretag och stora Arenor.
  
Våra ledord är effektivitet, kvalitet, flexibilitet och omtanke.

title: Systems Engineer
description:
**Systems Engineer**

**Systems Engineer**

Join Fortinet, a cybersecurity pioneer with over two decades of excellence, as we continue to shape the future of cybersecurity and redefine the intersection of networking and security. At Fortinet, our mission is to safeguard people, devices, and data everywhere. We are currently seeking a dynamic System Engineer, to contribute to the success of our rapidly growing business.


.  



**With us you will**

* Lead all technical aspects of a sales cycle with the Enterprise customers, from the initial RFIs, through to RFPs & RFQs when required. This includes the project management and active participation in POCs in partnership with the relevant teams both internally and within the customer and/or commercial partner.
* Have the ability to listen and to understand the technical requirements of the customer, reading between the lines to build a solution which outperforms the competitor offering.
* Be the primary technical point of contact for the customer(s) and partners in close collaboration with your sales partner.
* Continuously strive to improve knowledge around the Fortinet products and solutions, along with maintaining a deep understanding of the competitive landscape and Fortinet’s ability to provide long lasting protection against the ever-evolving threats.
* Have a strong ability to position Fortinet solutions to the customer, whether this be remotely or in person. This requires strong communication skills and the ability to confidently present through whiteboarding, technical white papers, technical plans or customer discussions.
* Manage your time effectively when working on multiple deals simultaneously, ensuring a positive customer experience is maintained.
Maintain accurate activity, contact, and account technical information of all customers and prospects in our CRM (Salesforce).  
* 

**Apply if you**

* Have a high aptitude for security technology, specifically encryption, authentication, with further knowledge of network security, intrusion detection, anti-virus, routing, switching, LAN and WAN being desirable. The CISSP accreditation would also be beneficial.
* Are currently or have previously worked in a pre-sales engineer role, managing end to end technical aspects of deals, through to technical closure.
* Can demonstrate your problem solving skills and how this has impacted key wins within your current organisation.
* Understand and can demonstrate your ability to build and maintain customer relationships, including your ability to effectively communicate technically to a range of both external and internal stakeholders.
Have a strong understanding one or multiple solutions e.g SD-WAN, ZTNA, IAM, Firewall, Switching and Wireless, SecOps, Cloud Security etc.  
* 

**Why Join Us:**

At Fortinet, we embrace diversity and inclusivity. We encourage applications from diverse backgrounds and identities. Explore our welcoming work environment designed for a rewarding career journey with an attractive Total Rewards package to support you with your overall health and financial well-being . Join us in bringing solutions that make a meaningful and lasting impact to our 660,000+ customers around the globe.  



**What you can expect from us**

* Excellent training and development opportunities, providing you with all the tools you need to be successful.
* An open working environment, sharing knowledge and information collaboratively and transparently, with respect to everyone’s thoughts and opinions.
* The opportunity to be part of an innovative, collaborative and winning team.
A competitive salary and incentive compensation package, including stock awards, health and welfare benefits.  
* 

From the start, the Fortinet vision has been to deliver broad, truly integrated, high-performance security across the IT infrastructure. Today, we secure the largest enterprises, service providers and government organizations around the world.  



Fortinet empowers its customers with intelligent, seamless protection across the expanding attack surface and the power to take on ever-increasing performance requirements of the borderless network – today and into the future. We have proven to be a truly innovative technology driven network security company with over 619 registered Global Patents. This is over 3 times more than our closest most innovative competitor!  



#LI-Remote
company_description: Mission: Dedicated to Delivering Security Without Compromise

title: Head of Business Control
description:
**Head of Business Control – Telia Cygate**

  

We’re looking for a Head of Business Control to join us at Telia Cygate.
  

I’m Elisabeth Stén, CFO, and I’m searching for someone ready to lead and further develop our Business Control function. We are a forward-thinking finance organization focused on building data-driven decision support, scalable governance models, and enabling profitable growth across the business.  

  



  

**What you’ll do**

  

As Head of Business Control, you will lead and develop our Business Control team and play a central role in shaping financial steering, analysis, and performance management across Telia Cygate.  



  

* Lead and develop the Business Control team (currently 3 employees)
* Drive financial planning processes (budget, forecast, long-term planning)
* Own and develop performance management, including monthly business reviews and management reporting
* Partner with business and leadership to provide actionable insights and decision support
* Drive governance, internal control (especially revenue) and financial transparency
* Own and develop BI capabilities (Qlik) and advance data-driven ways of working
* Lead transformation initiatives within digitalization, AI, and automation of finance processes
* Develop commercial steering, including margin management, sales performance, and bonus models
  

**What will help you thrive in this role**

  

You are a driven, analytical, and inspiring leader who combines strong financial expertise with a genuine interest in business development and digitalization.


* Proven experience as a senior Business Controller or similar role
* Leadership experience, with a track record of building strong and high-performing teams
* Strong business understanding and ability to translate data into actionable insights
* Experience from transformation environments, including digitalization and process improvement
* Strong analytical and communication skills, with ability to influence senior stakeholders
* Interest and experience in AI, BI, and data-driven decision making
* Fluency in English and Swedish

  

**About the role and context**

You will be part of the CFO Office and work closely with Financial Control & Accounting, Sales Operations, CDO, and Process Development.  



  

The role offers a unique opportunity to:  



  

* Combine strategic leadership and operational execution
* Shape the future steering model of Telia Cygate
* Play a key role in supporting a high-growth and transformation agenda
* Take a central role in shaping both the finance function and the broader business performance agenda.
**Why Telia Cygate?**

  

At Telia Cygate, we’re not only experts in networks, security, and various types of cloud solutions – we’re also a team that believes work should be fun! As part of Telia Company, we have the strength to create real impact on a large scale, contribute to societal value, and help our customers navigate the world of digitalization. And we always do it with warmth, care, and a smile. Here, it’s our ideas and diverse perspectives that make us strong, and together we ensure that the world of technology becomes a place where everyone feels good – and where you belong.  



  

Your development matters to us. We encourage continuous learning and make sure that you and your interests are in focus. We know that people are the heart of our company, which is why we value joy, creativity, and different perspectives in everything we do.  



  

Welcome to grow together with us – where we make technology human and create real impact!


Telia Cygate is proud to be certificated as Great Place to Work!
  

With us, people are at the center – here you get the chance to grow, be challenged, and thrive together with dedicated colleagues. We are building a culture where security, togetherness, and opportunities go hand in hand. Do you want to be part of the journey? Welcome to a workplace that truly lives up to its name.


**What we offer**

When you join us, you'll receive a comprehensive benefits package tailored to your local market, opportunities for remote work, and more. You'll also have the chance to earn a bonus based on your performance and Telia's results.  



  

We look forward to receiving your application by 2026-06-08. Please note that we might close the position earlier if we find the right candidate, so don’t wait too long to apply!


Location: Solna


If you’re selected for the next stage, you’ll be contacted by our Talent Acquisition Partner.
  

Background and reference checks will be part of the process.  



  

Want to know more about this role? Please reach out to Elisabeth at Elisabeth.Sten@cygate.se  



  

We kindly ask recruitment agencies and external vendors not to contact us regarding this position.  



  

**Equal opportunities**

  

At Telia, we recognize talent by professional skills and growth potential. We champion diversity, ensuring every individual’s needs are met, regardless of disability, gender, age, nationality, sexual orientation, or social status. Together, we’re dedicated to fostering an inclusive work environment where your uniqueness is our strength.  



  

**Welcome to Telia Cygate – Home of Experts**

title: Application Support Analyst
description:
**Location:**

Ludvika, Dalarna County, Sweden
**Job ID:**

R0127788
**Date Posted:**

2026-05-05
**Company Name:**

HITACHI ENERGY SWEDEN AB
**Profession (Job Category):**

Engineering & Science
**Job Schedule:**

Full time
**Remote:**

No
**Job Description:**

**The opportunity**

HVDC (High Voltage Direct Current) is a product group in Hitachi Energy, which develops, manufactures and sells DC transmission systems on a global market. HVDC technology is used to transmit electricity over long distances and for power transmission via submarine cables. It is also used to connect power systems. Are you looking for a new challenge in an exciting, high-tech environment?  



  

Join Hitachi Energy as an Application Support Analyst where you support and train users in PLM & Engineering apps, provide documentation and training materials. As an Application Support Analyst you will also be involved in projects and process and maintaining of it. Everyone has different skills and competencies, and we are interested in learning more about you and what you can contribute with.  



  

This role is based in Västerås or Ludvika, Sweden.  



  

**How you’ll make an impact**

* Support and develop virtualized and private cloud environments using technologies such as VMware vSphere, vRealize Operations, vCloud Director, and vCloud Usage Meter.
* Contribute to stable, scalable, and secure multi-tenant environments, including capacity planning, templates and media file management, and ongoing platform improvements.
* Resolve incidents and service requests through structured ticket handling, collaboration, and continuous improvement.
* User license and access management, solving and managing support issues continuously.
* Support and train our Global users and Power Users.
* Reporting and collaborating with 3rd line support (Vendor and Application Suppliers).
* Use automation and scripting (PowerShell) to improve reliability, efficiency, and user experience.
* Ability to work collaboratively in cross-functional teams

**Your background**

* Experience working with virtualization and cloud platforms, including VMware vSphere, vRealize Operations, vCloud Director, and related tools.
* Solid understanding of infrastructure fundamentals, such as physical servers, TCP/IP, Active Directory, DNS, and access management.
* Familiarity with multi-tenant architecture, strategic capacity planning, and enterprise-scale environments.
* Comfortable working in support-oriented roles, handling incidents, change requests, and collaborating across teams.
* A structured, curious, and collaborative approach, with an interest in learning and sharing knowledge.
* Knowledge from HVDC design and engineering is qualifying.
* Excellent communication skills in English, oral and written. Able to communicate in Swedish is considered as advantage.
* Should have knowledge of ITIL

**What we offer**

* Collective agreement
* Flexible working hours
* Health care and wellness allowance
* Fantastic career possibilities within Hitachi Energy both within Sweden and globally
* Mentor to support you throughout onboard phase
* Various trainings and education supporting employee development
* Diversified company with over 70+ nationalities working in Sweden
* Supplementary compensation for parental leave
* Employee Benefit Portal with thousands of discounts and perks

**More about us**

Are you ready for a new exciting opportunity? Does the above description sound like you? Welcome to apply! Applications will be reviewed on an ongoing basis, so don’t delay – apply today!


Recruiting Manager Raviraj Umardand, raviraj.umardand@hitachienergy.com , will answer your questions about the position. All other questions can be directed to Talent Acquisition Partner Oliver Chicaiza, oliver.chicaiza@hitachienergy.com


Union representatives – Sveriges Ingenjörer: Mikael Hjort, +46 107-38 29 86; Ledarna: Frank Hollstedt, +46 10 7387043; Unionen: Fredrik Holmgren, +46 107-38 21 85.


**Qualified individuals with a disability may request a reasonable accommodation if you are unable or limited in your ability to use or access the Hitachi Energy career site as a result of your disability. You may request reasonable accommodations by completing a** **general inquiry form** **on our website. Please include your contact information and specific details about your required accommodation to support you during the job application process.**
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**This is solely for job seekers with disabilities requiring accessibility assistance or an accommodation in the job application process. Messages left for other purposes will not receive a response.**
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

title: SAP Senior Project Manager
description:
**Role: SAP S/4HANA Rollout Manager**  

**Role Summary**  

We are seeking an experienced **SAP S/4HANA Rollout Manager** to lead and deliver **industrialized SAP rollouts across multiple countries in the EU region**. The role requires a hands-on delivery leader with strong SAP domain knowledge, proven rollout execution experience, and **deep expertise in at least one core delivery area** (outlined below). The Rollout Manager will be responsible for end-to-end rollout delivery within defined scope, timeline, budget, and quality standards, while enforcing the global template and minimizing deviations.  

  

**Core Expertise Requirement (Mandatory)**  

The candidate **must demonstrate strong, hands-on expertise in at least Two** of the following areas. One or more of these should be the candidate’s **core strength**:* **Global Test Management** – end-to-end ownership of integration testing and UAT across multi-country rollouts
* **Cutover Lead** – planning and execution of mock cutovers, go-live simulations, and production cutovers
* **Migration Lead** – industrialized data migration strategy, execution, and governance
* **Solution lead**– bringing multiple process streams together, stiching E2E processes, managing rollout backlog (fits, gaps), ensuring design authority and scope approvals, ensuring on time and on budget Build and successful functional testing

  

**Key Responsibilities**  

**Project Planning & Initiation*** Define rollout scope, objectives, and deliverables in collaboration with business and IT stakeholders
* Develop detailed rollout plans including timelines, budgets, resource plans, and risk management strategies
* Lead rollout kick-offs and establish strong governance and delivery cadence

**Rollout Execution & Monitoring*** Lead and manage rollout teams across one or more countries as part of a rollout cluster
* Drive synergies and reuse across rollouts using an industrialized rollout framework
* Track progress, proactively manage dependencies, risks, and issues, and ensure timely resolution

**Stakeholder Management*** Engage effectively with business users, IT teams, external partners, and executive stakeholders
* Manage expectations and provide clear, regular status reporting throughout the rollout lifecycle

  

**SAP & Delivery Leadership**  

**SAP S/4HANA & Methodology*** Strong working knowledge of **SAP S/4HANA**, SAP Line of Business solutions, and rollout best practices
* Practical experience with **SAP Activate, SAP Rise with SAP, Validated Partner Methodology, SAFe Agile** methodology etc.
* Solid understanding of **Clean Core principles** and **Cloud mindset**

**Template Enforcement & Fit-to-Template*** Plan and lead Fit-to-Template workshops
* Establish local business process baselines
* Drive early agreement on legal and local deviations
* Work with solution governance bodies to control and minimize template deviations

  

**Delivery Track Responsibilities (Based on Core Strength)**  

**Data Migration (if applicable)*** Define and execute an industrialized migration approach
* Coordinate legacy data cleansing, extraction, transformation, and loading
* Orchestrate migration activities across solution, testing, and deployment streams
* Experience with tools such as **SNP, Syniti**, or similar is expected

**Test Management (if applicable)*** Own rollout test strategy, integration testing, and UAT cycles
* Deploy testing accelerators to enable industrialization
* Manage testing capacity across customer and provider teams

**Cutover Management (if applicable)*** Lead cutover planning, rehearsals, and production cutovers
* Demonstrate situational leadership during high-pressure go-live phases
* Coordinate business, IT, and partner activities during go-live windows

**AMS Delivery (if applicable)*** Lead transition from project to AMS
* Drive stabilization, hypercare, and steady-state operations
* Ensure clear handover, SLAs, and governance for post–go-live support

  

**Organizational Change Management*** Good understanding of OCM frameworks, activities, RACIs, and deliverables
* Coordinate closely with OCM leads to ensure business readiness and adoption

  

**Experience Requirements*** **15+ years** of overall project / delivery management experience, preferably in SAP environments
* Experience leading **smaller to mid-sized programs or rollout waves**
* Strong experience managing one or more rollout delivery tracks (Test, Cutover, Migration, AMS)
* Experience running structured SAP process or Fit-to-Template workshops
* Local European language proficiency (B1 level) preferred
* Readiness for travel

  

**Skills & Qualifications*** Excellent client-facing, written, and verbal communication skills
* Strong organizational and multitasking abilities
* Working knowledge of project management tools and Microsoft Office
* PMP / PRINCE II certification is a plus
* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent practical experience

  

All aspects of employment at Infosys are based on merit, competence and performance. We are committed to embracing diversity and creating an inclusive environment for all employees. Infosys is proud to be an equal opportunity employer.
company_description: Infosys is a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting. We enable clients in 59 countries to navigate their digital transformation.

title: Loyalty and Partnerships Analyst
description:
#### **Location**

Sweden, Stockholm
#### **Apply by**

2026-05-27
  
**About the role**


We are looking for a Loyalty and Partnerships Analyst to join our Commercial Insights & Personalization team. In this role, you will be key to identifying how we can improve the loyalty member program, member experience, and overall member value. You will be the dedicated analytics partner of the Loyalty team.


You will work closely with other analysts and specialists, and interact regularly with business experts from Loyalty, Partnerships (Spenn), Product, Marketing, and other relevant Commercial teams.


We are looking for someone who is not only analytical, but also curious, proactive, and commercially minded - a true sparring partner who can translate data into business actions and value.

**What you will do**

* Analyze internal and external data to answer business questions, provide recommendations, and enable actions that improve the member experience
* Gather relevant data and proactively create compelling reports, analysis and insights for Commercial stakeholders
* Ensure delivery of data and insights that drive the development roadmap for the Loyalty programme and partner portfolio
* Interpret and analyze customer segmentation, recommendation models, and experimentations to improve personalization for members
* Create what-if scenarios and run experiments to test hypotheses about member behaviors, partnerships performance, and value-creation
* Analyze loyalty partners and evaluate their financial contribution to the organization and the loyalty programme
* Spread data awareness across the business, increase appetite for analytics, and support the organization's data-driven decision-making goals

**What we are looking for**

* At least 5 years of experience in Loyalty analytics, or in a similar role
* Strong understanding of loyalty programs, loyalty data, and loyalty economics
* Relevant experience handling member data, including loyalty partnerships and financial modelling
* Proficiency in SQL, BigQuery/Google Cloud, and visualization tools such as PowerBI or Tableau
* Experience using CRM platforms or similar tools
* Strong communication and storytelling skills to explain insights clearly
* A commercial mindset with the ability to proactively identify business opportunities aligned to programme and commercial KPIs
* A curious and proactive mindset – you explore data, ask questions, and challenge the status quo

**Nice to have**

* Working exposure to Product Analytics or Product Management
* Working exposure to Financial Analytics
* Background in e-commerce, hospitality, travel, or subscription-based businesses

**What success looks like**

* You identify key insights in the member experience using various data and reports, and proactively recommend improvements
* You help strengthen both the transactional and emotional loyalty of our members
* You act as a trusted advisor and thought leader, and not just a data provider
* You help the organization move towards data-driven loyalty management
* Your insights directly shape the Loyalty programme roadmap and partner strategy

title: Technical Program Manager (Sweden)
description:
Led by an experienced management team and supported by a strong investor group, including large and experienced institutions and strategic partners, EdgeConneX offers a dynamic, fast-paced work environment where we are bringing flexibility, proximity, power, and connectivity to some of the world's key businesses. With major offices in Herndon, Denver, and Amsterdam, we have a global footprint and a unified team of employees committed to providing a premier customer experience and delivering the full spectrum of data center solutions, from core to edge, like no other data center provider can do.



Focused on driving innovation and helping our customers define and deliver their own unique vision for the Edge, at any scale, in any market worldwide, for any requirement, we are building tomorrow's data center infrastructure, today for some of the world's most demanding Network, Content, and Cloud customers.



The Technical Program Manager is responsible for the end-to-end delivery of hyperscale, colocation, and enterprise data center projects, from design review through construction, commissioning, and operational handover. The role ensures projects are delivered on time, within budget, and in compliance with quality, safety, and regulatory standards.



This position requires close coordination with multi-disciplinary teams including mechanical, electrical, plumbing (MEP), civil, IT infrastructure, security, and operations. The ideal candidate brings strong mechanical and electrical expertise, hands-on experience with Tier III+ and hyperscale data centers, and proven leadership in complex project environments.



**Key Responsibilities**


**Project Delivery & Governance**


* Lead the full project lifecycle including planning, design, procurement, construction, commissioning, energization, and handover.
* Develop and manage master schedules, budgets, and resource plans.
* Establish project governance, reporting cadence, executive dashboards, and portfolio-level reporting aligned with corporate PMO standards.
* Identify and manage project risks, maintain risk registers, and escalate critical issues.
* Ensure contractor compliance with contractual milestones, performance guarantees, and LD provisions.
* Support procurement strategy and evaluation of EPC / D&B / CM delivery models, including tender evaluations and contract award recommendations.
* Monitor CAPEX budgets, cost forecasts, funding requests, variance reporting, and progress payment certifications.
* Track procurement schedules and mitigate supply chain risks.


**Engineering & Technical Oversight**


* Review, approve, and coordinate technical designs across electrical, mechanical, HVAC, fire protection, security, and IT infrastructure.
* Validate system redundancy (N+1, N+2, 2N, 2N+1), operational reliability, and maintainability requirements.
* Ensure compliance with local regulations, utility requirements, and international standards (Uptime Tier III/IV, NFPA, IEC, TIA, ISO).
* Coordinate with utility providers for grid interconnection, energization, and regulatory approvals.
* Oversee HV/MV infrastructure delivery, protection coordination, energization strategy, and power system studies (short circuit, load flow, arc flash).
* Manage vendor, contractor, and consultant performance to ensure adherence to technical specifications and project objectives.


**Leadership & Stakeholder Management**


* Lead multi-disciplinary internal teams, contractors, consultants, and suppliers.
* Act as the primary interface with clients, utility authorities, and internal stakeholders.
* Ensure clear communication, alignment, and coordination across all parties.
* Mentor junior engineers and project staff, promoting knowledge transfer and operational excellence.
* Support the Director of Engineering in strategic planning and executive-level reporting.


**Compliance, Quality & Safety**


* Enforce engineering standards, corporate governance, and safety regulations.
* Review quality reports to validate installation quality and workmanship.
* Support environmental, health, and safety (EHS) initiatives and ensure statutory and environmental compliance throughout the project lifecycle.


**Operations & Handover**


* Ensure a smooth transition to operations, including as-built documentation, SOPs, MOPs, EOPs, and asset registers.
* Ensure operational readiness, uptime SLA compliance, and post-handover stabilization.
* Support training of O&M teams.
* Validate performance metrics including PUE, WUE, and system reliability KPIs.


**Qualifications**


**Education & Certifications**


* Bachelor's degree in Electrical, Mechanical, or Building Services Engineering.
* Master's degree in Business Administration, engineering leadership, or similar preferred.
* Preferred certifications: PMP, CDCP, ATD (Accredited Tier Designer).


**Experience**


* Minimum 10 years' experience in data center construction, commissioning, or hyperscale infrastructure projects.
* Proven delivery of large-scale Tier III+ or hyperscale data centers (50 MW+).
* Experience with HV grid intake (100–400 kV) and campus-scale developments preferred.
* Strong working knowledge of critical data center systems including HVAC, electrical distribution, UPS, generators, fire suppression systems, and BMS/SCADA.
* Experience managing EPC / D&B contractors and complex stakeholder environments.


**Skills & Competencies**


* Strong technical knowledge across electrical, mechanical, plumbing, HVAC, IT infrastructure, and security systems.
* Proficiency with project management tools such as Primavera P6 or MS Project.
* Excellent leadership, communication, negotiation, and decision-making skills in high-pressure environments.
* Fluent in English. Swedish is preferable but not mandatory.
* Willingness to travel within Sweden


EdgeConneX believes inclusion – of thought, backgrounds and experiences – affects all that we do, from our employees to the solutions we deliver. Our goal is to create an environment where embracing differences helps deepen the lives and work experience of our employees, enhances our innovation and creativity, and enriches our involvement in our communities. EdgeConneX is an equal employment opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, age, national origin or ancestry, physical or mental disability, as well as any other category protected by applicable federal, state, or local laws.



EdgeConneX offers a competitive benefits package.



For more information on how we process your data, visit our Data Privacy Policy here.

title: Technical Program Manager (Sweden)
description:
Led by an experienced management team and supported by a strong investor group, including large and experienced institutions and strategic partners, EdgeConneX offers a dynamic, fast-paced work environment where we are bringing flexibility, proximity, power, and connectivity to some of the world's key businesses. With major offices in Herndon, Denver, and Amsterdam, we have a global footprint and a unified team of employees committed to providing a premier customer experience and delivering the full spectrum of data center solutions, from core to edge, like no other data center provider can do.



Focused on driving innovation and helping our customers define and deliver their own unique vision for the Edge, at any scale, in any market worldwide, for any requirement, we are building tomorrow's data center infrastructure, today for some of the world's most demanding Network, Content, and Cloud customers.



The Technical Program Manager is responsible for the end-to-end delivery of hyperscale, colocation, and enterprise data center projects, from design review through construction, commissioning, and operational handover. The role ensures projects are delivered on time, within budget, and in compliance with quality, safety, and regulatory standards.



This position requires close coordination with multi-disciplinary teams including mechanical, electrical, plumbing (MEP), civil, IT infrastructure, security, and operations. The ideal candidate brings strong mechanical and electrical expertise, hands-on experience with Tier III+ and hyperscale data centers, and proven leadership in complex project environments.



**Key Responsibilities**


**Project Delivery & Governance**


* Lead the full project lifecycle including planning, design, procurement, construction, commissioning, energization, and handover.
* Develop and manage master schedules, budgets, and resource plans.
* Establish project governance, reporting cadence, executive dashboards, and portfolio-level reporting aligned with corporate PMO standards.
* Identify and manage project risks, maintain risk registers, and escalate critical issues.
* Ensure contractor compliance with contractual milestones, performance guarantees, and LD provisions.
* Support procurement strategy and evaluation of EPC / D&B / CM delivery models, including tender evaluations and contract award recommendations.
* Monitor CAPEX budgets, cost forecasts, funding requests, variance reporting, and progress payment certifications.
* Track procurement schedules and mitigate supply chain risks.


**Engineering & Technical Oversight**


* Review, approve, and coordinate technical designs across electrical, mechanical, HVAC, fire protection, security, and IT infrastructure.
* Validate system redundancy (N+1, N+2, 2N, 2N+1), operational reliability, and maintainability requirements.
* Ensure compliance with local regulations, utility requirements, and international standards (Uptime Tier III/IV, NFPA, IEC, TIA, ISO).
* Coordinate with utility providers for grid interconnection, energization, and regulatory approvals.
* Oversee HV/MV infrastructure delivery, protection coordination, energization strategy, and power system studies (short circuit, load flow, arc flash).
* Manage vendor, contractor, and consultant performance to ensure adherence to technical specifications and project objectives.


**Leadership & Stakeholder Management**


* Lead multi-disciplinary internal teams, contractors, consultants, and suppliers.
* Act as the primary interface with clients, utility authorities, and internal stakeholders.
* Ensure clear communication, alignment, and coordination across all parties.
* Mentor junior engineers and project staff, promoting knowledge transfer and operational excellence.
* Support the Director of Engineering in strategic planning and executive-level reporting.


**Compliance, Quality & Safety**


* Enforce engineering standards, corporate governance, and safety regulations.
* Review quality reports to validate installation quality and workmanship.
* Support environmental, health, and safety (EHS) initiatives and ensure statutory and environmental compliance throughout the project lifecycle.


**Operations & Handover**


* Ensure a smooth transition to operations, including as-built documentation, SOPs, MOPs, EOPs, and asset registers.
* Ensure operational readiness, uptime SLA compliance, and post-handover stabilization.
* Support training of O&M teams.
* Validate performance metrics including PUE, WUE, and system reliability KPIs.


**Qualifications**


**Education & Certifications**


* Bachelor's degree in Electrical, Mechanical, or Building Services Engineering.
* Master's degree in Business Administration, engineering leadership, or similar preferred.
* Preferred certifications: PMP, CDCP, ATD (Accredited Tier Designer).


**Experience**


* Minimum 10 years' experience in data center construction, commissioning, or hyperscale infrastructure projects.
* Proven delivery of large-scale Tier III+ or hyperscale data centers (50 MW+).
* Experience with HV grid intake (100–400 kV) and campus-scale developments preferred.
* Strong working knowledge of critical data center systems including HVAC, electrical distribution, UPS, generators, fire suppression systems, and BMS/SCADA.
* Experience managing EPC / D&B contractors and complex stakeholder environments.


**Skills & Competencies**


* Strong technical knowledge across electrical, mechanical, plumbing, HVAC, IT infrastructure, and security systems.
* Proficiency with project management tools such as Primavera P6 or MS Project.
* Excellent leadership, communication, negotiation, and decision-making skills in high-pressure environments.
* Fluent in English. Swedish is preferable but not mandatory.
* Willingness to travel within Sweden


EdgeConneX believes inclusion – of thought, backgrounds and experiences – affects all that we do, from our employees to the solutions we deliver. Our goal is to create an environment where embracing differences helps deepen the lives and work experience of our employees, enhances our innovation and creativity, and enriches our involvement in our communities. title: Product Expert Network Security
description:
*Vill du vara med och framtidssäkra Länsförsäkringars nätverkssäkerhet? Som Product Expert – Network Security får du en nyckelroll i att utveckla våra hybrida nätverkstjänster, både on-prem och i publika moln. Du blir en del av Private Cloud Platforms, där vi driver framåtlutade initiativ för att skapa säkra, tillförlitliga och kostnadseffektiva lösningar som stöttar hela LF.*


**Om jobbet**  

Som Product Expert – Network Security får du en central roll i att säkerställa och utveckla våra nätverkssäkerhetstjänster inom området Private Cloud Platforms, som ingår i Development Solutions & Operation Platforms. Vårt uppdrag är att leverera tillgängliga, säkra och stabila hybrida IT-infrastrukturtjänster som möter både dagens och framtidens behov. Du arbetar nära Product Owner Network, IT-säkerhetsavdelningen samt andra interna och externa partners för att ta fram och realisera innovativa tekniska lösningar. Tillvaron är dynamisk och präglas av en pågående digital förflyttning, där du får stora möjligheter att påverka hur vi stärker våra nätverksleveranser och vår säkerhetsnivå. Rollen rapporterar till chefen för Private Cloud Platforms, medan den dagliga arbetsledningen sker av produktägaren för Network.



Dina arbetsuppgifter kommer vara bland annat:

  

* Säkerställa och utveckla våra nätverkssäkerhetstjänster, både on-prem och i publika moln.
* Kravställa och följa upp mot externa partners och leverantörer.
* Hantera incidenter och problem.
* Driva kontinuerliga förbättringar och säkerställa kvaliteten på leveranserna.
* Erbjuda tekniskt stöd till interna konsumenter.
* Utveckla och implementera vår Product Road Map.


**Vi har riktigt bra förmåner**
-------------------------------

Personalvillkor på bolån och blancolån


Rabatt på sak-, person- och djurförsäkring


Friskvårdsbidrag och friskvårdstimma


Gym & gruppträning på kontoret


Lunchförmån


Fyra extra lediga dagar/år utöver semesterdagarna


Följande kommer göra dig framgångsrik i denna tjänst:

  

* Relevant kompetens inom området genom akademisk utbildning (t.ex. data-/systemvetenskap, civilingenjör) eller motsvarande arbetslivserfarenhet.
* God erfarenhet av infrastrukturell utveckling och teknisk kravhantering gentemot externa partners och leverantörer.
* Gedigen erfarenhet av drift och design av brandväggar, WAAP (Web Application and API Protection), DDoS-skydd, global lastbalansering samt proxy-tjänster från ledande leverantörer.
* Stark förmåga att driva mot en hög grad av automation i hanteringen av ovanstående plattformar.
* Kompetens och erfarenhet av loggning, monitorering och säkerhetsarbete, exempelvis härdning av hårdvara och mjukvara.
* Erfarenhet av riskhantering och arbete med säkerhetsramverk och tillhörande revisioner (t.ex. ISO27001, CIS, NIS/NIS2 och DORA).
* Vana att arbeta med förändringshantering och ramverk som ITIL och SAFe.
* Du har mycket god kommunikations- och presentationsförmåga och kan förmedla komplex information på ett enkelt och tydligt sätt, både på svenska och engelska



Meriterande är även om du har:

  

* Erfarenhet av den operativa processen att designa och hantera en produkt eller tjänst under hela dess livscykel.
* Erfarenhet av att effektivisera ditt dagliga arbete med hjälp av AI-verktyg.



Som person är du självgående och har förmågan att driva ditt arbete framåt självständigt, samtidigt som du är en lagspelare som stöttar och samarbetar nära med dina kollegor. Du har en stark helhetssyn som hjälper dig att nå både dina egna och teamets mål. Du trivs i en dynamisk och förändringsbenägen miljö, är strukturerad, kvalitetsmedveten och har ett genuint intresse för nätverkssäkerhet och moderna infrastrukturlösningar.



**Kontaktpersoner**  

Rekryterande chef: bjorn.fagerstedt@lansforsakringar.se  

Facklig representant Forena: jessica.loow@lansforsakringar.se  

Facklig representant Akademikerföreningen: lisa-maria.carensjo@lansforsakringar.se

  

*Låter det spännande? Då vill vi veta mer om dig! Välkommen med din ansökan redan idag. Vi arbetar löpande med denna rekrytering och kan komma att tillsätta tjänsten innan sista ansökningsdag.*


  
Länsförsäkringar AB är en inkluderande arbetsplats där mod, möjligheter och engagemang står i centrum. Vi erbjuder ett hållbart arbetsliv med flexibla villkor och satsar på att alla medarbetare ska kunna växa och trivas, oavsett bakgrund.


Digital & IT är hjärtat i Länsförsäkringsgruppens digitala utveckling. Vi driver den gemensamma digitala transformationen och levererar förstklassiga IT-lösningar, datadrivna insikter och innovativa digitala tjänster som skapar värde för hela verksamheten. Vårt uppdrag är att bygga en robust och framtidssäker IT-miljö – både på plats och i molnet – som möjliggör kundnära och effektiva affärer i hela gruppen.



Hos oss möts teknik, affär och innovation. Vi arbetar tvärfunktionellt ute i verksamheten i agila team där utveckling, drift och strategi går hand i hand. Vi ansvarar för allt från IT-styrning, enterprisearkitektur och leverantörshantering till applikationsutveckling, cybersäkerhet och verksamhetsberedskap.


  
Björn Fagerstedt | Kontaktperson

title: Senior Partner Account Manager
description:
### **Senior Partner Account Manager**


* JR-160610
* Hybrid
* Stockholm
* Sales
* Full time

**Who are we?**



Equinix is the world’s digital infrastructure company®, shortening the path to connectivity to enable the innovations that enrich our work, life and planet.

  


A place where bold ideas are welcomed, human connection is valued, and everyone has the opportunity to shape their future.



A career at Equinix means being at the center of shaping what comes next and amplifying customer value through innovation and impact. You’ll work across teams, influence key decisions, and help shape the path forward. You’ll find belonging, purpose, and a team that welcomes you—because when you feel valued, you’re empowered to do your best work.**Job Summary**


Recruits, develops, and manages partner's relationships to achieve company bookings goals through new and existing channel partners. Works closely with Equinix Field Sales, Corporate Sales, Solution Architects and Sales Engineers to facilitate their support of partner’s end user customer needs to ensure partner and customer satisfaction. Works closely with cross-functional team members to drive the solution integration of partner services or creation of complimentary joint offerings. Works closely with Channel Marketing to develop go to market plans to promote joint solution awareness among partner’s end user customer base. Oversees channel partner relationships for assigned accounts or manages select Strategic Alliance. Drives overall deal registration, funnel creation and pipeline development. Builds awareness at the Partner Companies and inside Equinix Sales organization of the overall benefits of the partnership and related joint value proposition (“JVP”). Evangelizes Platform Equinix in conjunction with go-to-market plan execution. Conducts business reviews to track and measure joint progress; ensures proper opportunity registration; facilitates local meetings with Equinix and partner.

**Responsibilities**


Partner Recruitment

* Collaborates with cross-functional teams, such as Sales Leadership, Business Development and the Global Accounts Organization, in the identification of strategic alliance partners and definition of initial related joint value proposition


Integrated Solutions/ Joint Value Proposition

* Engages partner and Equinix cross-functional team members, such as Sales Engineers, Solutions Architects, and Product Management, for technical positioning, alignment, and packaging
* Facilitates development and alignment for joint value proposition and bundled offer


Go-to-market

* Responsible for GTM Preparation: collateral and messaging, JVP content, use cases, partner central, partner directory, and partner sales training
* Establishes Sales ROE and onboarding plan and achieves agreement on how the companies will communicate during sales pursuits
* Engages Channel Marketing and coordinates development of initial go-to-market and first deal strategy
* Responsible for GTM Execution: pipeline development, sales targets, sales plan, deal management, Day 2 support, billing and ordering support, and QBRs


Partner Relationship Management

* Identifies and establishes contact with initial sponsor within prospective partners
* Manages long-term relationships with partner
* Ensures the designation and alignment of Executive sponsors


Partner Development / Activation & Enablement

* Conducts or participates in the process of Reseller Activation
* Responsible for identification of Strategic partner supporting reseller community


Business/Pipeline Reviews

* Participates in Global Joint Business Planning
* Oversees deal tagging / tracking process
* Has joint funnel oversight


Cross-Functional Collaboration

* Works closely with Equinix Field Sales, Corporate Sales, Sales Engineers, Marketing, Customer Fulfillment and Support, Sales Operations, Operations, and Data Center staff
* Coordinates development and approval of Marketing Plan, targets, strategies, activities, and co-marketing investments to support Channel Partner Business Plan with Platform Partner alignment
* Educates Strategic partners on how to engage Equinix resources (including GSA, SE, CSM) to define, quote, and order solution
* Facilitates cross-functional review of partnership performance, including sales, operations, and marketing, as established in Partner Business Plan
* Leverages executive sponsors appropriately


Communications

* Tailors message and partner pitch to partner company on how partnering with Equinix can help to grow their business
* Delivers relevant message to confirm mutual interest in moving forward, uncovering interest and motivation of prospective partner stakeholders, identifying their business driver to partner with Equinix
* Expertly articulates business value of joint value proposition with Equinix

**Qualifications**

* Proven years of proven success in channel sales for an internet, network, data center, hyperscaler or cloud based products or services provider preferred
* Swedish -Native level and Fluent English Bachelor's Degree required


Equinix is committed to ensuring that our employment process is open to all individuals, including those with a disability. If you are a qualified candidate and need assistance or an accommodation, please let us know by completing form.


Equinix is an Equal Employment Opportunity and, in the U.S., an Affirmative Action employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to unlawful consideration of race, color, religion, creed, national or ethnic origin, ancestry, place of birth, citizenship, sex, pregnancy / childbirth or related medical conditions, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, marital or domestic partnership status, age, veteran or military status, physical or mental disability, medical condition, genetic information, political / organizational affiliation, status as a victim or family member of a victim of crime or abuse, or any other status protected by applicable law.

**We use artificial intelligence in our hiring process. Learn more** **here****.**


This posting is for a backfill position, meaning it is to fill an existing vacancy within our organization.
